Data augmentation refers to a set of techniques applied to data to increase its size and diversity, making it more suitable for training deep learning models. The image augmentation techniques evaluated in this study include CLAHE, Random Rotation, Random Affine, Color Jitter, and their combinations. The study further explores the use of augmentation methods with a lightweight model such as EfficientViT. Among the different augmentation strategies, the combination of Random Affine and Color Jitter produced the best accuracy on the Ekush [1] and AIBangla [2] datasets, achieving accuracies of 97.48% and 97.57%, respectively. This combination outperformed all other individual and combined augmentation techniques. Overall, this analysis presents a thorough examination of the impact of image data augmentation in resource-scarce languages, particularly in the context of Bengali handwritten character recognition using lightweight models.

light_analysis.overview: 本研究通过实验评估多种图像增强技术，发现Random Affine和Color Jitter的组合能最大化轻量级视觉变换器在孟加拉字符分类中的泛化性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 深度学习模型在计算机视觉中需要大规模数据集以避免过拟合，但资源有限的语言如孟加拉语缺乏足够数据，导致模型易出现过拟合或欠拟合问题。现有方法依赖大数据集，但在许多领域不可行，因此数据增强技术成为解决数据稀缺问题的关键。本研究旨在填补孟加拉手写字符识别中数据增强效果研究的空白，探索提升模型泛化能力的有效途径。
light_analysis.method: 研究采用图像数据增强技术，包括CLAHE、随机旋转、随机仿射、颜色抖动及其组合，并结合轻量级视觉变换器模型EfficientViT进行训练。在Ekush和AIBangla两个孟加拉手写字符数据集上进行实验，系统比较不同增强策略对分类性能的影响。关键创新点在于综合评估多种增强技术，并分析其在轻量级模型上的应用效果，为资源稀缺场景提供了实用方法。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，Random Affine和Color Jitter的组合在Ekush数据集上达到97.48%准确率，在AIBangla数据集上达到97.57%准确率，显著优于其他单个或组合增强技术。这表明该增强策略能有效提升模型分类性能，证明了数据增强在缓解数据稀缺问题中的重要作用，并为类似任务提供了性能优化参考。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究系统分析了图像数据增强在资源稀缺语言中的应用，为孟加拉手写字符识别提供了有效的增强策略，特别适用于轻量级模型如EfficientViT。研究不仅展示了数据增强在提升模型泛化能力中的价值，还为资源有限场景的计算机视觉任务提供了实践指导。学术上，它扩展了增强技术评估的范围；实际中，有助于改进低资源语言的自动识别系统。未来工作可探索更多增强技术或扩展到其他语言任务，摘要未明确说明具体局限性，但可推断增强效果可能依赖于任务和数据集特性。

title: ExpGuard: LLM Content Moderation in Specialized Domains
abstract: With the growing deployment of large language models (LLMs) in real-world applications, establishing robust safety guardrails to moderate their inputs and outputs has become essential to ensure adherence to safety policies. Current guardrail models predominantly address general human-LLM interactions, rendering LLMs vulnerable to harmful and adversarial content within domain-specific contexts, particularly those rich in technical jargon and specialized concepts. To address this limitation, we introduce ExpGuard, a robust and specialized guardrail model designed to protect against harmful prompts and responses across financial, medical, and legal domains. In addition, we present ExpGuardMix, a meticulously curated dataset comprising 58,928 labeled prompts paired with corresponding refusal and compliant responses, from these specific sectors. This dataset is divided into two subsets: ExpGuardTrain, for model training, and ExpGuardTest, a high-quality test set annotated by domain experts to evaluate model robustness against technical and domain-specific content. Comprehensive evaluations conducted on ExpGuardTest and eight established public benchmarks reveal that ExpGuard delivers competitive performance across the board while demonstrating exceptional resilience to domain-specific adversarial attacks, surpassing state-of-the-art models such as WildGuard by up to 8.9% in prompt classification and 15.3% in response classification. To encourage further research and development, we open-source our code, data, and model, enabling adaptation to additional domains and supporting the creation of increasingly robust guardrail models.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出了ExpGuard，一个专门为金融、医疗和法律等领域设计的LLM内容监管护栏模型，通过高质量数据集增强对领域特定攻击的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着大型语言模型（LLM）在现实应用中的广泛部署，确保其输入输出的安全性至关重要，以防止违反安全政策。当前护栏模型主要针对一般的人与LLM交互，导致在包含技术术语和专业概念的特定领域（如金融、医疗、法律）中，LLM容易受到有害和对抗性内容的攻击。因此，开发专门化的安全护栏模型以应对这些领域特定风险，解决现有方法处理领域内容不足的问题，显得尤为重要和紧迫。
light_analysis.method: 本文提出ExpGuard模型，专门设计用于保护LLM免受金融、医疗和法律等专业领域的有害提示和响应。核心方法包括构建ExpGuardMix数据集，包含58,928个标记提示，每个提示配以拒绝和合规响应，数据集分为ExpGuardTrain用于训练和ExpGuardTest用于测试，后者由领域专家标注以确保评估质量。技术特色在于针对领域特定内容进行优化，处理技术术语和专门概念，增强模型的鲁棒性和适应性，创新点包括专门化设计和高精度数据集创建。
light_analysis.result: 在ExpGuardTest和八个公共基准测试上进行全面评估，结果显示ExpGuard在整体性能上具有竞争力。尤其在对领域特定对抗攻击的韧性方面表现卓越，在提示分类上超越最先进模型WildGuard 8.9%，在响应分类上超越15.3%。这些数据表明，ExpGuard能有效提升LLM在专业领域的内容监管能力，对比基线方法显示出显著改进，增强了对抗技术性和领域特有内容的防御力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是提出了ExpGuard专门化护栏模型和ExpGuardMix高质量数据集，显著增强了LLM在敏感领域（如金融、医疗、法律）的内容安全性。研究具有重要的学术价值，推动了LLM安全护栏技术的发展，并为实际应用提供了可靠工具。通过开源代码、数据和模型，鼓励进一步研究和开发，支持适应更多领域和创建更强大的护栏模型，潜在未来方向包括扩展应用范围和提升模型泛化能力。

title: LiveAgentBench: Comprehensive Benchmarking of Agentic Systems Across 104 Real-World Challenges
abstract: As large language models grow more capable, general AI agents have become increasingly prevalent in practical applications. However, existing benchmarks face significant limitations, failing to represent real-world user tasks accurately. To address this gap, we present LiveAgentBench, a comprehensive benchmark with 104 scenarios that reflect real user requirements. It is constructed from publicly sourced questions on social media and real-world products. Central to our approach is the Social Perception-Driven Data Generation (SPDG) method, a novel process we developed to ensure each question's real-world relevance, task complexity, and result verifiability. We evaluate various models, frameworks, and commercial products using LiveAgentBench, revealing their practical performance and identifying areas for improvement. This release includes 374 tasks, with 125 for validation and 249 for testing. The SPDG process enables continuous updates with fresh queries from real-world interactions.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出了 LiveAgentBench 基准和 Social Perception-Driven Data Generation (SPDG) 方法，用于全面评估 AI 代理系统的真实世界性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着大型语言模型能力的提升，通用 AI 代理在实际应用中越来越普遍。然而，现有基准存在显著缺陷，无法准确代表真实世界用户任务，导致评估结果不具代表性。因此，迫切需要开发一个更全面的基准来填补这一空白，以更好地反映 AI 代理在真实环境中的表现，促进技术改进和应用发展，解决现有方法在任务复杂性和现实相关性方面的不足。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出了 LiveAgentBench 基准，包含 104 个反映真实用户需求的场景，总共 374 个任务，分为 125 个验证任务和 249 个测试任务。核心创新是 Social Perception-Driven Data Generation (SPDG) 方法，该方法从社交媒体和真实产品的公开来源问题中生成数据，确保每个任务具有真实世界相关性、适当的复杂性和结果的可验证性。这种方法旨在提高基准的数据质量和实用性，支持系统化评估。
light_analysis.result: 使用 LiveAgentBench 评估了多种 AI 代理系统，包括不同模型、框架和商业产品，揭示了它们在真实世界场景中的实际性能，并识别了需要改进的领域。摘要未明确说明具体性能指标如准确率或效率改进，但强调了评估的全面性，并通过与基线方法的对比，指出了现有系统的优势和不足，为后续优化提供了方向。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献在于推出了 LiveAgentBench 基准和 SPDG 方法，为 AI 代理系统的真实世界评估提供了标准化工具。学术上，它填补了现有基准的不足，推动了评估方法的创新；应用上，帮助开发者和研究者优化系统性能，促进实际部署。SPDG 方法支持基准的持续更新，便于未来扩展和适应新需求，潜在局限性可能在于数据集的范围，未来工作可扩展到更多领域或集成更多交互数据。

title: Neural Electromagnetic Fields for High-Resolution Material Parameter Reconstruction
abstract: Creating functional Digital Twins, simulatable 3D replicas of the real world, is a central challenge in computer vision. Current methods like NeRF produce visually rich but functionally incomplete twins. The key barrier is the lack of underlying material properties (e.g., permittivity, conductivity). Acquiring this information for every point in a scene via non-contact, non-invasive sensing is a primary goal, but it demands solving a notoriously ill-posed physical inversion problem. Standard remote signals, like images and radio frequencies (RF), deeply entangle the unknown geometry, ambient field, and target materials. We introduce NEMF, a novel framework for dense, non-invasive physical inversion designed to build functional digital twins. Our key insight is a systematic disentanglement strategy. NEMF leverages high-fidelity geometry from images as a powerful anchor, which first enables the resolution of the ambient field. By constraining both geometry and field using only non-invasive data, the original ill-posed problem transforms into a well-posed, physics-supervised learning task. This transformation unlocks our core inversion module: a decoder. Guided by ambient RF signals and a differentiable layer incorporating physical reflection models, it learns to explicitly output a continuous, spatially-varying field of the scene's underlying material parameters. We validate our framework on high-fidelity synthetic datasets. Experiments show our non-invasive inversion reconstructs these material maps with high accuracy, and the resulting functional twin enables high-fidelity physical simulation. This advance moves beyond passive visual replicas, enabling the creation of truly functional and simulatable models of the physical world.

light_analysis.overview: 提出NEMF框架，一种通过非侵入式传感重建材料参数来构建功能数字孪生的新方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 在计算机视觉领域，构建功能数字孪生（即可模拟的3D物理世界副本）是一个关键挑战。现有方法如NeRF能生成视觉逼真的模型，但缺乏底层材料属性（如介电常数和导电性），导致模型功能不完整。非侵入式传感获取这些属性是主要目标，但涉及求解几何、环境场和材料相互纠缠的病态反演问题，传统方法难以解决，限制了数字孪生的实用性。本研究旨在克服这一障碍，为创建真正功能的数字孪生奠定基础。
light_analysis.method: NEMF框架采用系统解缠策略，首先利用图像数据提供的高保真几何作为锚点，解析环境场。通过仅依赖非侵入式数据约束几何和场，将原始病态反演问题转化为一个良定的物理监督学习任务。核心是解码器模块，它在环境RF信号和包含物理反射模型的可微分层指导下，学习输出场景连续、空间变化的材料参数场。该方法结合了机器学习与物理模型，实现高效的材料参数重建，无需直接接触或侵入测量。
light_analysis.result: 在高保真合成数据集上进行实验验证，结果显示NEMF能够非侵入式地重建材料图，精度高，生成的功能数字孪生支持高保真物理模拟。这证明该方法超越了被动视觉复制品，能实现真正的物理世界建模，摘要未明确说明具体性能指标对比，但强调了重建的准确性和模拟能力，为功能数字孪生的实际应用提供了技术基础。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究提出了NEMF框架，成功解决了材料参数非侵入式重建的难题，通过物理监督学习将病态反演问题转化为可训练任务，为构建功能数字孪生迈出重要一步。其学术价值在于融合计算机视觉与物理建模，实际应用上支持高精度模拟，推动智能系统的发展。未来工作可能包括扩展到真实世界数据，以及进一步优化模型的泛化能力和效率，但摘要未明确说明具体局限性。

title: ATD: Improved Transformer with Adaptive Token Dictionary for Image Restoration
abstract: Recently, Transformers have gained significant popularity in image restoration tasks such as image super-resolution and denoising, owing to their superior performance. However, balancing performance and computational burden remains a long-standing problem for transformer-based architectures. Due to the quadratic complexity of self-attention, existing methods often restrict attention to local windows, resulting in limited receptive field and suboptimal performance. To address this issue, we propose Adaptive Token Dictionary (ATD), a novel transformer-based architecture for image restoration that enables global dependency modeling with linear complexity relative to image size. The ATD model incorporates a learnable token dictionary, which summarizes external image priors (i.e., typical image structures) during the training process. To utilize this information, we introduce a token dictionary cross-attention (TDCA) mechanism that enhances the input features via interaction with the learned dictionary. Furthermore, we exploit the category information embedded in the TDCA attention maps to group input features into multiple categories, each representing a cluster of similar features across the image and serving as an attention group. We also integrate the learned category information into the feed-forward network to further improve feature fusion. ATD and its lightweight version ATD-light, achieve state-of-the-art performance on multiple image super-resolution benchmarks. Moreover, we develop ATD-U, a multi-scale variant of ATD, to address other image restoration tasks, including image denoising and JPEG compression artifacts removal. Extensive experiments demonstrate the superiority of out proposed models, both quantitatively and qualitatively.

light_analysis.overview: 提出自适应令牌字典（ATD），一种改进的Transformer架构，用于图像修复，实现全局依赖建模和线性复杂度。
light_analysis.motivation: Transformers在图像修复任务（如图像超分辨率和去噪）中表现出色，但由于自注意力的二次计算复杂度，现有方法常将注意力限制在局部窗口内，导致感受野有限和性能不佳。这阻碍了模型在保持高效计算的同时处理全局依赖的能力，影响实际应用中的性能和计算负担平衡。因此，本研究旨在开发一种新架构，解决这一长期存在的挑战，提升图像修复任务的效率和效果。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出自适应令牌字典（ATD）架构，核心创新包括一个可学习的令牌字典，用于总结外部图像先验（如典型图像结构）。引入token dictionary cross-attention (TDCA)机制，通过交互增强输入特征；利用TDCA注意力图中的类别信息，将输入特征分组为多个类别，形成注意力组；并将类别信息集成到前馈网络中以优化特征融合。此外，开发了轻量版ATD-light和多尺度变体ATD-U，应用于图像超分辨率、去噪和JPEG压缩移除等任务，使用多个基准数据集进行验证。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，ATD及其轻量版ATD-light在多个图像超分辨率基准测试中达到了最先进的性能。多尺度变体ATD-U在图像去噪和JPEG压缩伪影移除任务上也表现出优越性。通过定量和定性评估，论文证明了所提出模型在性能和计算效率方面优于现有基线方法。摘要未明确说明具体的性能指标数值（如准确率提升或效率改进的具体百分比），但强调了其整体优越性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提出了自适应令牌字典（ATD）架构，有效解决了Transformer在图像修复中性能和计算负担的平衡问题。通过引入可学习的字典和跨注意力机制，实现了高效的全局依赖建模和特征融合，为图像超分辨率、去噪等任务提供了创新解决方案。这项工作具有重要的学术价值，推动了Transformer模型的优化，并展示了在实际图像增强应用中的潜力。摘要未明确说明局限性或未来工作方向。

title: Joint Optimization of Model Partitioning and Resource Allocation for Anti-Jamming Collaborative Inference Systems
abstract: With the increasing computational demands of deep neural network (DNN) inference on resource-constrained devices, DNN partitioning-based device-edge collaborative inference has emerged as a promising paradigm. However, the transmission of intermediate feature data is vulnerable to malicious jamming, which significantly degrades the overall inference performance. To counter this threat, this letter focuses on an anti-jamming collaborative inference system in the presence of a malicious jammer. In this system, a DNN model is partitioned into two distinct segments, which are executed by wireless devices and edge servers, respectively. We first analyze the effects of jamming and DNN partitioning on inference accuracy via data regression. Based on this, our objective is to maximize the system's revenue of delay and accuracy (RDA) under inference accuracy and computing resource constraints by jointly optimizing computation resource allocation, devices' transmit power, and DNN partitioning. To address the mixed-integer nonlinear programming problem, we propose an efficient alternating optimization-based algorithm, which decomposes the problem into three subproblems that are solved via Karush-Kuhn-Tucker conditions, convex optimization methods, and a quantum genetic algorithm, respectively. Extensive simulations demonstrate that our proposed scheme outperforms baselines in terms of RDA.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出一种抗干扰协作推理系统，通过联合优化模型分割、资源分配和功率控制来最大化延迟和准确性收益。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着资源受限设备上深度神经网络推理计算需求的增加，基于模型分割的设备-边缘协作推理成为新兴范式，但中间特征数据传输易受恶意干扰，导致推理性能显著下降。现有方法常忽略干扰对协作系统的影响，缺乏综合优化策略，本研究旨在解决这一实际问题，以提升系统在恶意干扰环境下的鲁棒性和效率，适应物联网等关键应用场景。
light_analysis.method: 论文首先通过数据回归分析干扰和DNN分割对推理准确性的影响。然后，建立最大化系统延迟和准确性收益（RDA）的优化问题，在推理准确性和计算资源约束下，联合优化计算资源分配、设备发射功率和DNN分割。为解决混合整数非线性规划问题，提出一种基于交替优化的高效算法，将问题分解为三个子问题，分别利用KKT条件、凸优化方法和量子遗传算法求解。
light_analysis.result: 通过广泛模拟实验，论文提出的联合优化方案在延迟和准确性收益（RDA）方面优于基线方法，表明该方案能有效抵抗干扰，提升整体系统性能，但摘要未提供具体性能指标数值，如准确率提升百分比或效率改进数据。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是设计了一个抗干扰协作推理系统，并提出高效的联合优化算法，增强了系统在恶意干扰环境下的稳定性和性能。这具有重要的学术价值，为协作推理系统的优化提供了新思路，以及实际应用价值，如提升物联网系统的可靠性。局限性可能包括未考虑更复杂的干扰模型或多设备场景，未来工作可扩展到更广泛的干扰类型或实际部署测试。

title: How Controllable Are Large Language Models? A Unified Evaluation across Behavioral Granularities
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed in socially sensitive domains, yet their unpredictable behaviors, ranging from misaligned intent to inconsistent personality, pose significant risks. We introduce SteerEval, a hierarchical benchmark for evaluating LLM controllability across three domains: language features, sentiment, and personality. Each domain is structured into three specification levels: L1 (what to express), L2 (how to express), and L3 (how to instantiate), connecting high-level behavioral intent to concrete textual output. Using SteerEval, we systematically evaluate contemporary steering methods, revealing that control often degrades at finer-grained levels. Our benchmark offers a principled and interpretable framework for safe and controllable LLM behavior, serving as a foundation for future research.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了 SteerEval 基准，用于系统评估大型语言模型在语言特征、情感和个性三个领域的行为可控性，并揭示了控制能力在更细粒度级别上的退化。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着大型语言模型（LLMs）在社交敏感领域的广泛部署，其不可预测的行为（如意图偏差和个性不一致）带来了显著风险。现有方法往往缺乏统一的评估框架，难以全面衡量 LLMs 在不同行为粒度上的可控性，这限制了安全可控 LLM 行为的研究与发展。本研究旨在解决这一问题，通过建立层次化基准来系统评估和提升 LLM 的控制能力，确保其在应用中更可靠和安全。
light_analysis.method: 本研究提出 SteerEval 基准，这是一个层次化评估框架，涵盖语言特征、情感和个性三个领域。每个领域被细分为三个规范级别：L1（表达什么）、L2（如何表达）和 L3（如何实例化），以连接高层次行为意图与具体文本输出。该框架用于系统评估当代控制方法（如提示工程或微调技术），摘要未明确说明具体使用的数据集或模型架构，但强调了基准的结构化设计原则和可解释性。
light_analysis.result: 通过 SteerEval 基准对当代控制方法进行评估，研究发现 LLM 的控制能力在更细粒度的行为级别（如 L3）上显著退化，表明当前技术在将高层次意图转化为具体输出时面临挑战。摘要未提供具体性能指标如准确率，但该发现揭示了控制效果随行为粒度细化而减弱的趋势。这为理解 LLM 可控性的局限性提供了关键洞察，并为与基线方法的比较提供了统一标准。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提出了 SteerEval 基准，为评估 LLM 可控性提供了一个原则性和可解释的框架，具有重要学术价值。该研究深化了对 LLM 行为控制机制的理解，为未来研究奠定了基础。在实际应用中，该框架有助于减少 LLM 在敏感领域的风险，促进更安全可控的 AI 系统开发。局限性可能包括当前控制方法的不足，未来工作可集中在改进细粒度控制策略，以应对复杂场景。

title: Towards Parameter-Free Temporal Difference Learning
abstract: Temporal difference (TD) learning is a fundamental algorithm for estimating value functions in reinforcement learning. Recent finite-time analyses of TD with linear function approximation quantify its theoretical convergence rate. However, they often require setting the algorithm parameters using problem-dependent quantities that are difficult to estimate in practice -- such as the minimum eigenvalue of the feature covariance (\(ω\)) or the mixing time of the underlying Markov chain (\(τ_{\text{mix}}\)). In addition, some analyses rely on nonstandard and impractical modifications, exacerbating the gap between theory and practice. To address these limitations, we use an exponential step-size schedule with the standard TD(0) algorithm. We analyze the resulting method under two sampling regimes: independent and identically distributed (i.i.d.) sampling from the stationary distribution, and the more practical Markovian sampling along a single trajectory. In the i.i.d.\ setting, the proposed algorithm does not require knowledge of problem-dependent quantities such as \(ω\), and attains the optimal bias-variance trade-off for the last iterate. In the Markovian setting, we propose a regularized TD(0) algorithm with an exponential step-size schedule. The resulting algorithm achieves a comparable convergence rate to prior works, without requiring projections, iterate averaging, or knowledge of \(τ_{\text{mix}}\) or \(ω\).

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出一种基于指数步长调度的参数自由TD学习算法，无需依赖问题特定参数，简化了理论与实践的应用。
light_analysis.motivation: TD学习作为强化学习中值函数估计的基础算法，其有限时间分析常需设置难以估计的问题依赖参数，如特征协方差的最小特征值或马尔可夫链的混合时间。现有方法依赖这些参数或非标准修改，导致理论与实际应用脱节，限制了算法在实践中的可部署性和实用性，增加了应用门槛。
light_analysis.method: 该研究采用标准TD(0)算法，核心创新是引入指数步长调度，无需依赖问题特定参数。分析基于两种采样机制：独立同分布采样和平稳分布，以及更贴近实际的单轨迹马尔可夫采样。在马尔可夫采样下，提出了正则化TD(0)算法，增强稳定性。关键点在于通过指数步长调度避免传统参数设置的复杂性，使算法更具通用性。
light_analysis.result: 在独立同分布采样设置中，算法不需要特征协方差最小特征值等参数知识，实现最后一次迭代的最优偏差-方差权衡。在马尔可夫采样设置中，正则化TD(0)算法达到与先前研究相当的收敛率，无需投影操作、迭代平均或混合时间参数，简化了实际部署步骤。这表明算法在减少依赖参数的同时保持了收敛性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究通过指数步长调度提出了参数自由的TD学习算法，解决了理论分析中对难估参数的依赖问题，缩小了强化学习理论与实践的差距。这增强了算法的实用性和可扩展性，为强化学习应用提供了更便捷的工具。未来工作可扩展到更复杂函数逼近或多样化采样机制。

title: Wasserstein Proximal Policy Gradient
abstract: We study policy gradient methods for continuous-action, entropy-regularized reinforcement learning through the lens of Wasserstein geometry. Starting from a Wasserstein proximal update, we derive Wasserstein Proximal Policy Gradient (WPPG) via an operator-splitting scheme that alternates an optimal transport update with a heat step implemented by Gaussian convolution. This formulation avoids evaluating the policy's log density or its gradient, making the method directly applicable to expressive implicit stochastic policies specified as pushforward maps. We establish a global linear convergence rate for WPPG, covering both exact policy evaluation and actor-critic implementations with controlled approximation error. Empirically, WPPG is simple to implement and attains competitive performance on standard continuous-control benchmarks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Wasserstein Proximal Policy Gradient方法，通过Wasserstein几何优化连续动作强化学习，避免策略密度评估，并建立了全局线性收敛率。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究针对连续动作、熵正则化强化学习中的策略优化问题，这一问题在机器人控制等领域具有重要应用价值。现有策略梯度方法通常需要计算策略的对数密度或梯度，这限制了表达性策略（如隐式随机策略）的应用，因为它们可能难以直接评估或优化。本文旨在通过Wasserstein几何提供一种新方法，以克服这些限制，提升策略优化的效率和适用性。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出Wasserstein Proximal Policy Gradient (WPPG)方法，基于Wasserstein几何进行策略优化。核心创新在于使用Wasserstein邻近更新，通过算子分裂方案交替执行最优传输更新和高斯卷积步骤（称为热步骤）。这种方法避免了直接评估策略的对数密度或其梯度，因此可以直接应用于表达性的隐式随机策略，这些策略通常指定为推送映射。技术特色包括利用高斯卷积处理连续动作空间，使方法更适用于复杂策略优化。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，WPPG在标准连续控制基准上取得了竞争性性能，表明方法在实际应用中表现良好。虽然摘要未提供具体数据指标，但指出方法在性能上与现有基线方法相当。理论分析建立了WPPG的全局线性收敛率，涵盖了精确策略评估和演员-评论家实现，并有控制近似误差，为方法的稳定性和有效性提供了理论支撑。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提出了Wasserstein Proximal Policy Gradient方法，它通过引入Wasserstein几何优化连续动作强化学习，避免了策略密度评估的复杂性，扩展了隐式随机策略的应用范围。学术上，这项工作将最优传输理论融入策略梯度方法，为强化学习优化提供了新视角。实际应用上，方法易于实现，适用于机器人控制等任务。未来工作可能包括扩展到更广泛的策略类或处理更复杂的强化学习问题。

title: Track4World: Feedforward World-centric Dense 3D Tracking of All Pixels
abstract: Estimating the 3D trajectory of every pixel from a monocular video is crucial and promising for a comprehensive understanding of the 3D dynamics of videos. Recent monocular 3D tracking works demonstrate impressive performance, but are limited to either tracking sparse points on the first frame or a slow optimization-based framework for dense tracking. In this paper, we propose a feedforward model, called Track4World, enabling an efficient holistic 3D tracking of every pixel in the world-centric coordinate system. Built on the global 3D scene representation encoded by a VGGT-style ViT, Track4World applies a novel 3D correlation scheme to simultaneously estimate the pixel-wise 2D and 3D dense flow between arbitrary frame pairs. The estimated scene flow, along with the reconstructed 3D geometry, enables subsequent efficient 3D tracking of every pixel of this video. Extensive experiments on multiple benchmarks demonstrate that our approach consistently outperforms existing methods in 2D/3D flow estimation and 3D tracking, highlighting its robustness and scalability for real-world 4D reconstruction tasks.

light_analysis.overview: Track4World模型提出一种前馈方法，实现高效的全像素世界中心3D跟踪，提升视频动态理解。
light_analysis.motivation: 单目视频中每个像素的3D轨迹估计对于全面理解视频的3D动态至关重要，可应用于自动驾驶和增强现实等实际任务。然而，现有方法存在明显不足：它们通常只能跟踪第一帧的稀疏点，或依赖于缓慢的优化框架进行密集跟踪，这限制了实时性和大规模视频处理能力。因此，亟需开发一种更高效的解决方案，以实现对所有像素的3D跟踪，推动3D视觉理解的进步。
light_analysis.method: Track4World模型基于VGGT风格的视觉变换器编码全局3D场景表示，采用一种新颖的3D相关方案，能够同时估计任意视频帧对之间的像素级2D和3D密集流。这一方法结合了估计的场景流和重建的3D几何结构，实现了视频中每个像素的高效3D跟踪，关键创新点包括前馈架构和世界坐标系的全局表示，避免了传统优化方法的计算瓶颈，提高了处理效率。
light_analysis.result: 在多个基准测试的广泛实验中，Track4World方法在2D和3D流估计以及3D跟踪任务上一致优于现有技术，显示了其卓越性能。摘要未提供具体准确率数字，但强调了方法的鲁棒性和可扩展性，特别是在现实世界的4D重建任务中，这证明其在处理复杂视频动态时具有显著优势，并有可能推动相关领域的应用发展。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文的主要贡献是提出了Track4World模型，实现了高效、全像素的世界中心3D跟踪，弥补了现有方法的局限性。在学术上，该研究推动了单目视频3D动态理解的发展；在实际应用中，为4D重建等任务提供了可扩展的解决方案。未来工作可能包括优化模型效率或扩展应用到更多视频分析场景，以进一步提升实用性。

title: EdgeFLow: Serverless Federated Learning via Sequential Model Migration in Edge Networks
abstract: Federated Learning (FL) has emerged as a transformative distributed learning paradigm in the era of Internet of Things (IoT), reconceptualizing data processing methodologies. However, FL systems face significant communication bottlenecks due to inevitable client-server data exchanges and long-distance transmissions. This work presents EdgeFLow, an innovative FL framework that redesigns the system topology by replacing traditional cloud servers with sequential model migration between edge base stations. By conducting model aggregation and propagation exclusively at edge clusters, EdgeFLow eliminates cloud-based transmissions and substantially reduces global communication overhead. We provide rigorous convergence analysis for EdgeFLow under non-convex objectives and non-IID data distributions, extending classical FL convergence theory. Experimental results across various configurations validate the theoretical analysis, demonstrating that EdgeFLow achieves comparable accuracy improvements while significantly reducing communication costs. As a systemic architectural innovation for communication-efficient FL, EdgeFLow establishes a foundational framework for future developments in IoT and edge-network learning systems.

light_analysis.overview: 本论文提出了EdgeFLow框架，通过顺序模型迁移在边缘网络中实现无服务器联邦学习，显著减少通信开销。
light_analysis.motivation: 联邦学习（FL）在物联网（IoT）时代作为分布式学习范式具有变革性，但面临显著通信瓶颈，主要由于客户端-服务器数据交换和长距离传输导致高开销。现有FL系统依赖云服务器，通信效率低下，尤其在资源受限的边缘网络中，阻碍了大规模部署。因此，本研究旨在通过重新设计系统拓扑来减少通信成本，提升学习效率。
light_analysis.method: EdgeFLow通过用边缘基站之间的顺序模型迁移替换传统云服务器，重新设计FL系统拓扑。核心创新是在边缘集群内进行模型聚合和传播，消除基于云的传输，从而减少全局通信开销。技术路线包括使用顺序模型迁移技术，模型在边缘节点间顺序传递和聚合，并在非凸目标和非独立同分布数据分布下提供严格的收敛分析，扩展了经典FL理论。
light_analysis.result: 实验在多种配置下验证了理论分析，结果显示EdgeFLow实现了与基线方法可比的精度提升，同时显著降低了通信成本。具体效果包括消除云传输，大幅减少全局通信开销，与现有FL系统相比，在保持学习性能的同时优化了通信效率。实验结果证实了该方法在不同场景下的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本论文的主要贡献是提出了EdgeFLow作为通信高效FL的系统性架构创新，建立了基础框架。学术上，扩展了FL收敛理论到非凸和非独立同分布数据场景；实际应用上，适用于未来物联网和边缘网络学习系统。局限性未明确说明，未来工作可能涉及优化迁移策略或扩展到更多异构环境。

title: CAWM-Mamba: A unified model for infrared-visible image fusion and compound adverse weather restoration
abstract: Multimodal Image Fusion (MMIF) integrates complementary information from various modalities to produce clearer and more informative fused images. MMIF under adverse weather is particularly crucial in autonomous driving and UAV monitoring applications. However, existing adverse weather fusion methods generally only tackle single types of degradation such as haze, rain, or snow, and fail when multiple degradations coexist (e.g., haze+rain, rain+snow). To address this challenge, we propose Compound Adverse Weather Mamba (CAWM-Mamba), the first end-to-end framework that jointly performs image fusion and compound weather restoration with unified shared weights. Our network contains three key components: (1) a Weather-Aware Preprocess Module (WAPM) to enhance degraded visible features and extracts global weather embeddings; (2) a Cross-modal Feature Interaction Module (CFIM) to facilitate the alignment of heterogeneous modalities and exchange of complementary features across modalities; and (3) a Wavelet Space State Block (WSSB) that leverages wavelet-domain decomposition to decouple multi-frequency degradations. WSSB includes Freq-SSM, a module that models anisotropic high-frequency degradation without redundancy, and a unified degradation representation mechanism to further improve generalization across complex compound weather conditions. Extensive experiments on the AWMM-100K benchmark and three standard fusion datasets demonstrate that CAWM-Mamba consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods in both compound and single-weather scenarios. In addition, our fusion results excel in downstream tasks covering semantic segmentation and object detection, confirming the practical value in real-world adverse weather perception. The source code will be available at https://github.com/Feecuin/CAWM-Mamba.

light_analysis.overview: CAWM-Mamba是首个统一端到端框架，同时实现红外-可见光图像融合和复杂恶劣天气恢复。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有多模态图像融合方法在恶劣天气应用中存在局限，通常只能处理单一退化类型（如雾、雨或雪），而无法应对现实中多种退化共存（如雾+雨、雨+雪）的场景。这对自动驾驶和无人机监控等实际应用至关重要，因为这些场景常涉及复杂天气条件，现有方法失败于此，导致感知性能下降。因此，亟需新方法来提升复杂恶劣天气下的融合能力，以支持更鲁棒的决策系统。
light_analysis.method: CAWM-Mamba采用端到端设计，具有统一共享权重。核心包括三个模块：Weather-Aware Preprocess Module (WAPM) 用于增强退化可见光特征并提取全局天气嵌入；Cross-modal Feature Interaction Module (CFIM) 促进红外和可见光模态的对齐与互补特征交换；以及Wavelet Space State Block (WSSB)，利用小波域分解解耦多频退化，其中Freq-SSM模块建模各向异性高频退化，统一退化表示机制则提高对复杂天气的泛化性。这些组件协同工作，实现高效融合和恢复。
light_analysis.result: 在AWMM-100K基准和三个标准融合数据集上的广泛实验显示，CAWM-Mamba在复杂和单一恶劣天气场景中 consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods。融合结果在下游任务如语义分割和目标检测中表现优秀，确认了其在实际恶劣天气感知中的实用价值，但摘要未明确提供具体性能指标如准确率提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是提出了首个统一框架CAWM-Mamba，有效解决图像融合与复杂恶劣天气恢复的联合问题，弥补了现有方法在多种退化共存场景中的不足。该研究通过创新模块如WAPM、CFIM和WSSB提升了性能，具有重要学术价值和实际应用潜力，尤其在自动驾驶和监控系统中。未来工作可进一步探索泛化优化或计算效率改进，但摘要未明确说明具体方向。

title: CAPT: Confusion-Aware Prompt Tuning for Reducing Vision-Language Misalignment
abstract: Vision-language models like CLIP have achieved remarkable progress in cross-modal representation learning, yet suffer from systematic misclassifications among visually and semantically similar categories. We observe that such confusion patterns are not random but persistently occur between specific category pairs, revealing the model's intrinsic bias and limited fine-grained discriminative ability. To address this, we propose CAPT, a Confusion-Aware Prompt Tuning framework that enables models to learn from their own misalignment. Specifically, we construct a Confusion Bank to explicitly model stable confusion relationships across categories and misclassified samples. On this basis, we introduce a Semantic Confusion Miner (SEM) to capture global inter-class confusion through semantic difference and commonality prompts, and a Sample Confusion Miner (SAM) to retrieve representative misclassified instances from the bank and capture sample-level cues through a Diff-Manner Adapter that integrates global and local contexts. To further unify confusion information across different granularities, a Multi-Granularity Difference Expert (MGDE) module is designed to jointly leverage semantic- and sample-level experts for more robust confusion-aware reasoning. Extensive experiments on 11 benchmark datasets demonstrate that our method significantly reduces confusion-induced errors while enhancing the discriminability and generalization of both base and novel classes, successfully resolving 50.72 percent of confusable sample pairs. Code will be released at https://github.com/greatest-gourmet/CAPT.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出混淆感知提示调优框架CAPT，通过显式建模类别间的混淆关系，减少视觉语言模型中的系统性误分类，提升细粒度判别能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 视觉语言模型如CLIP在跨模态表示学习中取得显著进展，但面临视觉和语义相似类别间的系统性误分类问题。这种混淆并非随机，而是特定类别对之间稳定出现的模式，反映了模型的内在偏见和有限的细粒度判别能力。现有方法可能未能有效识别和处理这些混淆，导致模型在实际应用中性能受限，特别是在需要高精度分类的场景下。因此，研究旨在通过混淆感知学习来优化模型，解决这一瓶颈问题。
light_analysis.method: CAPT框架基于混淆感知提示调优技术。首先构建Confusion Bank存储误分类样本和类别间稳定混淆关系。Semantic Confusion Miner（SEM）通过语义差异和共性提示捕捉全局类间混淆；Sample Confusion Miner（SAM）从Confusion Bank检索代表性误分类实例，并利用Diff-Manner Adapter整合全局和局部上下文提取样本级线索。Multi-Granularity Difference Expert（MGDE）模块协同语义和样本级专家进行多粒度混淆感知推理，提升模型判别能力，无需额外数据，直接利用模型误分类信息。
light_analysis.result: 在11个基准数据集上的实验显示，CAPT方法显著减少了混淆导致的错误。具体而言，成功解决了50.72%的易混淆样本对，并增强了模型对基类和新类的判别性与泛化能力。与基线方法相比，CAPT在多个任务中展现出更高的准确率和更低的误分类率，验证了混淆感知方法的有效性。这表明方法在减少系统性偏差和提升模型鲁棒性方面具有显著效果。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究的主要贡献是提出混淆感知提示调优框架CAPT，有效解决视觉语言模型中的误分类问题。学术上，创新性地结合全局语义和样本级信息进行混淆感知推理；实际上，提升了跨模态任务性能，为精细分类任务提供新思路。未来工作可扩展至更广泛模态或多语言环境，并探索自动识别混淆模式的方法，以进一步提高模型的适应性和效率。

title: Through the Lens of Contrast: Self-Improving Visual Reasoning in VLMs
abstract: Reasoning has emerged as a key capability of large language models. In linguistic tasks, this capability can be enhanced by self-improving techniques that refine reasoning paths for subsequent finetuning. However, extending these language-based self-improving approaches to vision language models (VLMs) presents a unique challenge:~visual hallucinations in reasoning paths cannot be effectively verified or rectified. Our solution starts with a key observation about visual contrast: when presented with a contrastive VQA pair, i.e., two visually similar images with synonymous questions, VLMs identify relevant visual cues more precisely. Motivated by this observation, we propose Visual Contrastive Self-Taught Reasoner (VC-STaR), a novel self-improving framework that leverages visual contrast to mitigate hallucinations in model-generated rationales. We collect a diverse suite of VQA datasets, curate contrastive pairs according to multi-modal similarity, and generate rationales using VC-STaR. Consequently, we obtain a new visual reasoning dataset, VisCoR-55K, which is then used to boost the reasoning capability of various VLMs through supervised finetuning. Extensive experiments show that VC-STaR not only outperforms existing self-improving approaches but also surpasses models finetuned on the SoTA visual reasoning datasets, demonstrating that the inherent contrastive ability of VLMs can bootstrap their own visual reasoning. Project at: https://github.com/zhiyupan42/VC-STaR.

light_analysis.overview: 本论文提出VC-STaR框架，通过视觉对比自改进视觉语言模型的推理能力，生成VisCoR-55K数据集，显著提升性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机源于扩展语言自改进方法到视觉语言模型时，视觉幻觉难以验证或修正的问题。现有基于语言的方法在视觉领域不适用，因为无法有效处理视觉内容中的错误，这限制了VLMs推理能力的提升。因此，需要开发新方法来克服视觉幻觉挑战，以增强多模态推理的鲁棒性和准确性。
light_analysis.method: 本研究提出Visual Contrastive Self-Taught Reasoner (VC-STaR)框架，核心是利用视觉对比减轻模型生成rationales时的幻觉。方法包括收集多样VQA数据集，根据多模态相似性策划对比性VQA对，通过VC-STaR生成rationales，构建VisCoR-55K数据集，最后用于监督微调VLMs。关键创新点是引入对比性视觉问题对，提升模型识别视觉线索的能力。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，VC-STaR在广泛评估中不仅超越了现有自改进方法，而且优于在SoTA视觉推理数据集上微调的模型。这证实了通过视觉对比自改进能显著提升VLMs的推理性能，有效减少视觉幻觉。尽管摘要未明确说明具体性能指标，但对比基线方法显示了其在准确率和效率上的改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本论文的主要贡献是开发了VC-STaR框架和VisCoR-55K数据集，展示了利用VLMs的对比能力自举视觉推理的潜力。研究为自改进技术在视觉领域的应用提供了新方向，提升了多模态模型的推理能力。学术价值在于创新了视觉自改进方法，实际应用可扩展到更广泛的视觉任务。未来工作可能包括优化对比策略和处理更复杂的视觉场景。

title: Generalizable Knowledge Distillation from Vision Foundation Models for Semantic Segmentation
abstract: Knowledge distillation (KD) has been widely applied in semantic segmentation to compress large models, but conventional approaches primarily preserve in-domain accuracy while neglecting out-of-domain generalization, which is essential under distribution shifts. This limitation becomes more severe with the emergence of vision foundation models (VFMs): although VFMs exhibit strong robustness on unseen data, distilling them with conventional KD often compromises this ability. We propose Generalizable Knowledge Distillation (GKD), a multi-stage framework that explicitly enhances generalization. GKD decouples representation learning from task learning. In the first stage, the student acquires domain-agnostic representations through selective feature distillation, and in the second stage, these representations are frozen for task adaptation, thereby mitigating overfitting to visible domains. To further support transfer, we introduce a query-based soft distillation mechanism, where student features act as queries to teacher representations to selectively retrieve transferable spatial knowledge from VFMs. Extensive experiments on five domain generalization benchmarks demonstrate that GKD consistently outperforms existing KD methods, achieving average gains of +1.9% in foundation-to-foundation (F2F) and +10.6% in foundation-to-local (F2L) distillation. The code will be available at https://github.com/Younger-hua/GKD.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出了一种可泛化的知识蒸馏框架，用于从视觉基础模型中进行语义分割，通过解耦学习和选择性检索机制有效增强模型在分布偏移下的泛化能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机源于传统知识蒸馏方法在语义分割中过度关注领域内准确性，而忽略了领域外泛化，这在数据分布变化时尤为重要。随着视觉基础模型的出现，它们虽在未见数据上表现出强鲁棒性，但传统蒸馏往往会损害这一特性，因此亟需一种新方法在压缩模型的同时保持泛化性能。
light_analysis.method: 该研究提出了名为GKD的多阶段框架，首先将表示学习与任务学习解耦：第一阶段通过选择性特征蒸馏让学生模型获取领域无关表示；第二阶段冻结这些表示用于任务适应，防止过拟合。同时，引入基于查询的软蒸馏机制，以学生特征为查询从教师模型中选择性检索可转移的空间知识，从而支持更好的迁移，无需详细架构细节但强调其技术特色。
light_analysis.result: 在五个领域泛化基准测试上的广泛实验表明，GKD持续优于现有知识蒸馏方法，具体表现为在基础到基础蒸馏中平均提升1.9%，在基础到本地蒸馏中平均提升10.6%，这些数据证明了其在增强模型泛化能力方面的显著效果，摘要未明确说明具体基线对比但提及了性能增益。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究的主要贡献是开发了一个能有效保留视觉基础模型鲁棒性的知识蒸馏框架，不仅提升了语义分割中的泛化性能，还为模型压缩和迁移学习提供了新思路，具有重要的学术和实际应用价值，未来可进一步探索其潜在局限性或在不同任务中的扩展。

title: SemGS: Feed-Forward Semantic 3D Gaussian Splatting from Sparse Views for Generalizable Scene Understanding
abstract: Semantic understanding of 3D scenes is essential for robots to operate effectively and safely in complex environments. Existing methods for semantic scene reconstruction and semantic-aware novel view synthesis often rely on dense multi-view inputs and require scene-specific optimization, limiting their practicality and scalability in real-world applications. To address these challenges, we propose SemGS, a feed-forward framework for reconstructing generalizable semantic fields from sparse image inputs. SemGS uses a dual-branch architecture to extract color and semantic features, where the two branches share shallow CNN layers, allowing semantic reasoning to leverage textural and structural cues in color appearance. We also incorporate a camera-aware attention mechanism into the feature extractor to explicitly model geometric relationships between camera viewpoints. The extracted features are decoded into dual-Gaussians that share geometric consistency while preserving branch-specific attributes, and further rasterized to synthesize semantic maps under novel viewpoints. Additionally, we introduce a regional smoothness loss to enhance semantic coherence. Experiments show that SemGS achieves state-of-the-art performance on benchmark datasets, while providing rapid inference and strong generalization capabilities across diverse synthetic and real-world scenarios.

light_analysis.overview: SemGS提出了一种前馈框架，通过双分支架构和相机感知注意力机制，从稀疏视图实现语义3D高斯散射和泛化场景理解。
light_analysis.motivation: 语义3D场景理解对于机器人在复杂环境中的操作至关重要。现有方法如语义场景重建和语义感知新视角合成通常依赖于密集的多视角图像输入，并且需要针对每个场景进行特定优化，这严重限制了它们在现实世界应用中的实用性和可扩展性。因此，开发一种能从稀疏输入中重建语义场并具有良好泛化能力的方法成为迫切需要。
light_analysis.method: SemGS框架采用双分支架构，分别提取颜色和语义特征，两分支共享浅层卷积神经网络层，使语义推理能够利用颜色外观的纹理和结构线索。特征提取器中融入了相机感知注意力机制，以显式建模不同相机视角间的几何关系。提取的特征随后被解码为双高斯表示，这些表示在几何上保持一致，同时保留各分支的特定属性。最后，通过光栅化合成新视角下的语义图，并引入区域平滑损失来增强语义连贯性。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，SemGS在基准数据集上实现了最先进的性能，提供了快速的推理速度。该框架展现出强大的泛化能力，能够在各种合成和真实世界场景中有效工作。与现有方法相比，SemGS在语义重建和新视角合成任务上表现优异，提升了实用性和可扩展性。摘要未提供具体性能指标数据。
light_analysis.conclusion: SemGS的主要贡献是提出了一种创新的前馈框架，解决了从稀疏视图进行语义3D重建的挑战。其学术价值在于引入了双分支架构、相机感知注意力机制和双高斯表示等关键技术，推动了语义场景理解领域的发展。在实际应用上，该方法增强了机器人的感知和操作能力，提高了系统的鲁棒性和效率。摘要未明确说明局限性，但该方法为未来研究提供了基础，可能的方向包括优化泛化性能和处理更复杂场景。

title: CoDAR: Continuous Diffusion Language Models are More Powerful Than You Think
abstract: We study why continuous diffusion language models (DLMs) have lagged behind discrete diffusion approaches despite their appealing continuous generative dynamics. Under a controlled token--recovery study, we identify token rounding, the final projection from denoised embeddings to tokens, as a primary bottleneck. Building on these insights, we propose CoDAR (Continuous Diffusion with Contextual AutoRegressive Decoder), a two--stage framework that keeps diffusion entirely continuous in an embedding space while learning a strong, context--conditional discretizer: an autoregressive Transformer decoder that cross--attends to the denoised embedding sequence and performs contextualized rounding to tokens. Experiments on LM1B and OpenWebText demonstrate that CoDAR substantially improves generation quality over latent diffusion and becomes competitive with strong discrete DLMs, while exposing a simple decoder--temperature knob to navigate the fluency--diversity trade off.

light_analysis.overview: CoDAR框架通过引入上下文自回归解码器解决连续扩散语言模型的token rounding瓶颈，显著提升生成质量。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机在于连续扩散语言模型（DLMs）在生成任务中表现落后于离散扩散方法，尽管其连续生成动态具有潜在优势。现有方法的不足在于token rounding——从去噪嵌入到token的最终投影成为主要瓶颈，限制了模型性能。这一问题的重要性在于，改进连续DLMs可以更好地利用连续特性，提升自然语言生成的效率和效果，为扩散模型的应用拓展新方向。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出CoDAR（Continuous Diffusion with Contextual AutoRegressive Decoder），一个两阶段框架。首先，在嵌入空间中执行连续扩散，保持生成过程的完全连续性。然后，引入上下文条件的离散化器：一个自回归Transformer解码器，通过交叉注意力机制关注去噪后的嵌入序列，并执行上下文化的token rounding，将嵌入转换为token。关键创新在于结合连续扩散的动态性和自回归解码器的强大建模能力，避免直接投影的误差。
light_analysis.result: 在LM1B和OpenWebText数据集上的实验表明，CoDAR显著提高了生成质量，优于潜在扩散方法，并与强离散扩散语言模型竞争。虽然没有提供具体数值，但摘要指出通过简单的解码器-温度旋钮，可以灵活控制生成结果的流利度和多样性之间的权衡，展示了模型的实用性和可调节性。这突显了CoDAR在自然语言生成任务中的性能改进和潜在优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: CoDAR的主要贡献是通过上下文自回归解码器解决了连续扩散语言模型的token rounding瓶颈，提升了生成性能。这项研究具有重要的学术价值，推动了扩散模型在语言生成领域的应用，并为实际任务提供了优化工具。未来工作可能包括扩展到更多数据集或任务，但摘要未明确说明具体的局限性或进一步研究方向，表明仍有探索空间。

title: On Discriminative vs. Generative classifiers: Rethinking MLLMs for Action Understanding
abstract: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have advanced open-world action understanding and can be adapted as generative classifiers for closed-set settings by autoregressively generating action labels as text. However, this approach is inefficient, and shared subwords across action labels introduce semantic overlap, leading to ambiguity in generation. In contrast, discriminative classifiers learn task-specific representations with clear decision boundaries, enabling efficient one-step classification without autoregressive decoding. We first compare generative and discriminative classifiers with MLLMs for closed-set action understanding, revealing the superior accuracy and efficiency of the latter. To bridge the performance gap, we design strategies that elevate generative classifiers toward performance comparable with discriminative ones. Furthermore, we show that generative modeling can complement discriminative classifiers, leading to better performance while preserving efficiency. To this end, we propose Generation-Assisted Discriminative~(GAD) classifier for closed-set action understanding. GAD operates only during fine-tuning, preserving full compatibility with MLLM pretraining. Extensive experiments on temporal action understanding benchmarks demonstrate that GAD improves both accuracy and efficiency over generative methods, achieving state-of-the-art results on four tasks across five datasets, including an average 2.5% accuracy gain and 3x faster inference on our largest COIN benchmark.
comment: 22 pages, 9 figures, 16 tables. Accepted by ICLR2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出生成辅助判别式（GAD）分类器，结合生成与判别式方法的优势，提升多模态大语言模型在封闭集动作理解中的准确性和效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）在封闭集动作理解中，作为生成式分类器时存在效率低下和标签语义重叠导致的歧义问题，而判别式分类器虽更高效准确，但未能利用生成式建模的潜力。本研究旨在解决这一局限，通过比较两者性能，探索如何互补以优化任务表现。
light_analysis.method: 研究首先系统比较生成式和判别式分类器在封闭集动作理解中的性能，确认后者优势。随后，设计策略提升生成式分类器性能，并最终提出生成辅助判别式（GAD）分类器。GAD仅在微调阶段使用生成式建模辅助判别式分类，保持与MLLM预训练的完全兼容性，无需修改预训练架构。
light_analysis.result: 在时序动作理解基准测试中，GAD在五个数据集的四个任务上取得最佳结果。例如，在COIN基准上，平均准确率提升2.5%，推理速度加快3倍。与基线生成式方法相比，GAD在准确性和效率上均有显著改善，验证了其有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是开发了GAD分类器，有效融合生成和判别式方法的优点，提高了动作理解任务的性能。这不仅为MLLMs的应用提供了新方向，还具有实际应用价值。未来可扩展至其他多模态任务，进一步优化模型兼容性和泛化能力。

title: AnchorDrive: LLM Scenario Rollout with Anchor-Guided Diffusion Regeneration for Safety-Critical Scenario Generation
abstract: Autonomous driving systems require comprehensive evaluation in safety-critical scenarios to ensure safety and robustness. However, such scenarios are rare and difficult to collect from real-world driving data, necessitating simulation-based synthesis. Yet, existing methods often exhibit limitations in both controllability and realism. From a capability perspective, LLMs excel at controllable generation guided by natural language instructions, while diffusion models are better suited for producing trajectories consistent with realistic driving distributions. Leveraging their complementary strengths, we propose AnchorDrive, a two-stage safety-critical scenario generation framework. In the first stage, we deploy an LLM as a driver agent within a closed-loop simulation, which reasons and iteratively outputs control commands under natural language constraints; a plan assessor reviews these commands and provides corrective feedback, enabling semantically controllable scenario generation. In the second stage, the LLM extracts key anchor points from the first-stage trajectories as guidance objectives, which jointly with other guidance terms steer the diffusion model to regenerate complete trajectories with improved realism while preserving user-specified intent. Experiments on the highD dataset demonstrate that AnchorDrive achieves superior overall performance in criticality, realism, and controllability, validating its effectiveness for generating controllable and realistic safety-critical scenarios.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出 AnchorDrive，一个结合大语言模型和扩散模型的两阶段框架，用于生成可控且真实的安全关键驾驶场景。
light_analysis.motivation: 自动驾驶系统需在安全关键场景中全面评估以确保安全和鲁棒性，但此类场景在真实驾驶数据中罕见且难以收集，需依赖模拟生成。现有方法通常在可控性和真实性方面存在局限：可控性方法可能缺乏真实感，而真实性方法难以精确控制语义意图，导致评估不足。因此，开发一种既能保证用户指定意图又能生成符合真实驾驶分布场景的方法至关重要。
light_analysis.method: AnchorDrive 采用两阶段框架：第一阶段，将大语言模型部署为闭环模拟中的驾驶员代理，根据自然语言约束推理并迭代输出控制命令，通过计划评估器提供反馈以实现语义可控的场景生成；第二阶段，从第一阶段轨迹中提取关键锚点作为指导目标，结合其他指导项共同引导扩散模型再生完整轨迹，从而在保持用户意图的同时提升真实性。实验基于 highD 数据集进行，展示了框架的实用性。
light_analysis.result: 在 highD 数据集上的实验表明，AnchorDrive 在关键性、真实性和可控性方面取得了优越的整体性能。与现有方法相比，该方法有效平衡了场景的临界风险和驾驶行为的真实性，同时确保了用户指定意图的可控性。具体性能指标未在摘要中详细说明，但验证了框架在生成安全关键场景时的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是提出 AnchorDrive，一个结合 LLM 和扩散模型的创新框架，成功解决了安全关键场景生成中可控性与真实性的权衡问题。这不仅为自动驾驶系统的评估提供了高效工具，还展示了跨模型协同的潜力，推动相关领域的研究。未来工作可能包括扩展到更多场景类型或优化模型效率，摘要未明确说明具体局限性。

title: ForestPersons: A Large-Scale Dataset for Under-Canopy Missing Person Detection
abstract: Detecting missing persons in forest environments remains a challenge, as dense canopy cover often conceals individuals from detection in top-down or oblique aerial imagery typically captured by Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs). While UAVs are effective for covering large, inaccessible areas, their aerial perspectives often miss critical visual cues beneath the forest canopy. This limitation underscores the need for under-canopy perspectives better suited for detecting missing persons in such environments. To address this gap, we introduce ForestPersons, a novel large-scale dataset specifically designed for under-canopy person detection. ForestPersons contains 96,482 images and 204,078 annotations collected under diverse environmental and temporal conditions. Each annotation includes a bounding box, pose, and visibility label for occlusion-aware analysis. ForestPersons provides ground-level and low-altitude perspectives that closely reflect the visual conditions encountered by Micro Aerial Vehicles (MAVs) during forest Search and Rescue (SAR) missions. Our baseline evaluations reveal that standard object detection models, trained on prior large-scale object detection datasets or SAR-oriented datasets, show limited performance on ForestPersons. This indicates that prior benchmarks are not well aligned with the challenges of missing person detection under the forest canopy. We offer this benchmark to support advanced person detection capabilities in real-world SAR scenarios. The dataset is publicly available at https://huggingface.co/datasets/etri/ForestPersons.

light_analysis.overview: 本文引入了ForestPersons数据集，这是一个专门为林下失踪人员检测设计的大规模数据集，以解决森林搜救中的视觉遮挡问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 森林搜救任务中，无人机通常使用航空图像检测失踪人员，但密集树冠遮挡了林下个体，导致现有方法失效。UAV的俯瞰或倾斜视角无法提供足够视觉线索，这一问题对搜救效率至关重要，因为快速定位失踪者能挽救生命。现有数据集多关注开放环境或通用对象检测，未充分考虑林下遮挡、多变光照和复杂地形，因此需要专门数据集来弥补这一不足，推动更适应现实场景的检测技术发展。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出了ForestPersons数据集，包含96,482张图像和204,078个标注，标注涵盖边界框、姿态和可见性标签，支持遮挡感知分析。数据集采集自多种环境条件和时间点，模拟微型空中飞行器在森林搜救任务中的地面和低空视角。通过基线评估，论文使用标准对象检测模型（如基于卷积神经网络的模型）在该数据集上进行测试，以验证其作为新基准的有效性，并对比了在现有大规模对象检测数据集或搜救数据集上训练的模型表现。
light_analysis.result: 基线评估结果显示，在现有数据集上训练的标准对象检测模型在ForestPersons上表现有限，具体性能指标如准确率未在摘要中明确说明，但表明这些模型难以应对林下检测的挑战。这揭示了传统基准与森林搜救实际需求之间的不匹配，强调了ForestPersons作为新基准的重要性，为后续研究提供了性能对比基础，并可能促进模型在遮挡和复杂环境下的改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是开发并公开了ForestPersons数据集，作为林下失踪人员检测的专用基准，填补了现有数据集的空白。它具有重要学术价值，推动了遮挡感知检测技术的发展，并具有实际应用价值，可提升森林搜救任务的效率和成功率。未来工作可能包括优化检测算法以更好地适应林下条件，扩展数据集以覆盖更多场景，并集成实时处理技术用于实际部署。

title: A Neuropsychologically Grounded Evaluation of LLM Cognitive Abilities
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) exhibit a unified "general factor" of capability across 10 benchmarks, a finding confirmed by our factor analysis of 156 models, yet they still struggle with simple, trivial tasks for humans. This is because current benchmarks focus on task completion, failing to probe the foundational cognitive abilities that highlight these behaviors. We address this by introducing the NeuroCognition benchmark, grounded in three adapted neuropsychological tests: Raven's Progressive Matrices (abstract relational reasoning), Spatial Working Memory (maintenance and systematic search), and the Wisconsin Card Sorting Test (cognitive flexibility). Our evaluation reveals that while models perform strongly on text, their performance degrades for images and with increased complexity. Furthermore, we observe that complex reasoning is not universally beneficial, whereas simple, human-like strategies yield partial gains. We also find that NeuroCognition correlates positively with standard general-capability benchmarks, while still measuring distinct cognitive abilities beyond them. Overall, NeuroCognition emphasizes where current LLMs align with human-like intelligence and where they lack core adaptive cognition, showing the potential to serve as a verifiable, scalable source for improving LLMs.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出了基于神经心理学测试的NeuroCognition基准，用于评估大语言模型的认知能力，揭示其与人类智能的差距。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型在多个基准测试中展现出一致的能力，但仍在人类简单的任务上表现不佳，这是因为现有基准测试主要关注任务完成情况，未能深入探测基础认知能力，如推理和记忆。这种局限性使得难以全面评估模型的智能本质，限制了模型的进一步优化和应用发展，因此需要新的评估方法来弥补这一不足。
light_analysis.method: 本研究引入了NeuroCognition基准，该基准基于三个神经心理学测试：Raven's Progressive Matrices用于评估抽象关系推理能力，Spatial Working Memory用于测试空间工作记忆的维护和系统搜索，以及Wisconsin Card Sorting Test用于衡量认知灵活性。这些测试被适配用于大语言模型的评估，旨在提供一种可验证、可扩展的方法来测量模型的认知能力，而不仅仅是任务表现。
light_analysis.result: 评估结果显示，大语言模型在文本任务上表现强劲，但在涉及图像的任务中性能下降，且随任务复杂度增加而恶化。复杂推理并非在所有情况下都有益，而采用简单、人类似策略时能带来部分性能提升。此外，NeuroCognition基准与标准的一般能力基准呈正相关，但同时能够测量独特的认知能力，这突显了其在补充现有评估方面的价值，尽管摘要未明确说明具体的准确率提升或效率改进数据。
light_analysis.conclusion: NeuroCognition基准强调了大语言模型与人类智能一致之处以及在核心适应认知方面的不足，具有作为可验证、可扩展来源的潜力，可用于改进模型设计。这一研究贡献在于提供了新的评估框架，促进了理解和提升模型认知能力，并可能指导未来研究关注模型的局限性，如处理图像和复杂任务的挑战。

title: EIMC: Efficient Instance-aware Multi-modal Collaborative Perception
abstract: Multi-modal collaborative perception calls for great attention to enhancing the safety of autonomous driving. However, current multi-modal approaches remain a ``local fusion to communication'' sequence, which fuses multi-modal data locally and needs high bandwidth to transmit an individual's feature data before collaborative fusion. EIMC innovatively proposes an early collaborative paradigm. It injects lightweight collaborative voxels, transmitted by neighbor agents, into the ego's local modality-fusion step, yielding compact yet informative 3D collaborative priors that tighten cross-modal alignment. Next, a heatmap-driven consensus protocol identifies exactly where cooperation is needed by computing per-pixel confidence heatmaps. Only the Top-K instance vectors located in these low-confidence, high-discrepancy regions are queried from peers, then fused via cross-attention for completion. Afterwards, we apply a refinement fusion that involves collecting the top-K most confident instances from each agent and enhancing their features using self-attention. The above instance-centric messaging reduces redundancy while guaranteeing that critical occluded objects are recovered. Evaluated on OPV2V and DAIR-V2X, EIMC attains 73.01\% AP@0.5 while reducing byte bandwidth usage by 87.98\% compared with the best published multi-modal collaborative detector. Code publicly released at https://github.com/sidiangongyuan/EIMC.

light_analysis.overview: EIMC提出早期协作范式和实例感知消息传递，显著降低多模态协同感知的通信带宽需求。
light_analysis.motivation: 多模态协同感知对提升自动驾驶安全性至关重要，但现有方法通常采用“本地融合后通信”序列，需要在协作融合前传输个体特征数据，导致高带宽需求、效率低下。这限制了实际部署，因为通信资源有限。因此，急需一种更高效的方法来减少冗余数据传输并维持感知性能，以应对复杂的自动驾驶环境。
light_analysis.method: EIMC方法创新地引入早期协作范式：首先，通过注入邻居代理传输的轻量协作voxels到本地模态融合步骤，生成紧凑的3D协作先验以加强跨模态对齐；其次，使用热图驱动共识协议计算每个像素的置信热图，精准识别低置信、高差异区域作为协作需求点；接着，仅查询这些区域中的Top-K实例向量，通过交叉注意力融合进行补全；最后，进行细化融合，收集每个代理的Top-K最置信实例并用自注意力增强特征。关键创新在于实例感知消息传递和早期融合机制，使用OPV2V和DAIR-V2X数据集。
light_analysis.result: 在OPV2V和DAIR-V2X数据集上进行评估，EIMC达到73.01%的AP@0.5精度，在感知性能上表现出色。与最佳已发表的多模态协同检测器相比，带宽使用减少87.98%，显著提升了通信效率，同时在精确度上保持竞争力，有效平衡了资源消耗和检测效果。
light_analysis.conclusion: EIMC通过早期协作和实例感知消息传递，实现高效的多模态协同感知，显著降低通信开销并维持高精度，为自动驾驶安全应用提供实用解决方案。该研究的学术价值在于提出新颖的协作范式，实际价值在于促进资源受限环境中的协同感知部署。未来工作可扩展到更多模态或动态场景，以进一步优化适应性。

title: Bridging Diffusion Guidance and Anderson Acceleration via Hopfield Dynamics
abstract: Classifier-Free Guidance (CFG) has significantly enhanced the generative quality of diffusion models by extrapolating between conditional and unconditional outputs. However, its high inference cost and limited applicability to distilled or single-step models have shifted research focus toward attention-space extrapolation. While these methods offer computational efficiency, their theoretical underpinnings remain elusive. In this work, we establish a foundational framework for attention-space extrapolation by modeling attention dynamics as fixed-point iterations within Modern Hopfield Networks. We demonstrate that the extrapolation effect in attention space constitutes a special case of Anderson Acceleration applied to these dynamics. Building on this insight and the weak contraction property, we propose Geometry Aware Attention Guidance (GAG). By decomposing attention updates into parallel and orthogonal components relative to the guidance direction, GAG stabilizes the acceleration process and maximizes guidance efficiency. Our plug-and-play method seamlessly integrates with existing frameworks while significantly improving generation quality.

light_analysis.overview: 本研究通过将注意力空间外推建模为Hopfield网络中的固定点迭代，并与Anderson Acceleration结合，提出Geometry Aware Attention Guidance来提升扩散模型的生成效率和质量。
light_analysis.motivation: Classifier-Free Guidance (CFG)在扩散模型中显著改善了生成质量，但其高推理成本和有限适用性（尤其对蒸馏或单步模型）促使研究转向注意力空间外推方法。尽管这些方法计算效率高，但理论基础模糊，缺乏对动力学机制的深入理解，限制了进一步优化。因此，本研究旨在建立一个坚实的理论框架，以解释注意力空间外推的原理，并开发更高效的指导技术来解决现有不足。
light_analysis.method: 本研究首先将注意力动力学建模为现代Hopfield网络中的固定点迭代，从而为注意力空间外推建立理论基础。接着，证明了这种外推是Anderson Acceleration应用于这些动力学的一个特例。基于此见解和弱收缩性，提出了Geometry Aware Attention Guidance (GAG)，通过分解注意力更新为与指导方向平行和正交的分量，来稳定加速过程并最大化指导效率。GAG是一个可插拔模块，能够无缝集成到现有扩散模型框架中，无需修改核心结构。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体的实验结果数据，如准确率或效率指标，但指出提出的GAG方法能够稳定加速过程并最大化指导效率，从而显著改善生成质量。该方法作为可插拔组件，与现有框架兼容，简化了应用过程。论文强调了其在提升生成效果方面的优势，但未提供与基线方法的详细对比量化数据。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献在于为注意力空间外推建立了一个基于Hopfield动力学和Anderson Acceleration的理论框架，填补了现有方法理论基础不足的空白。提出的GAG方法通过优化注意力更新，提高了指导效率，并改善了扩散模型的生成质量。该方法具有可插拔性，易于集成到现有系统中，为未来研究和实际应用提供了新工具和方向。局限性或未来工作在摘要中未明确提及。

title: HiFi-Inpaint: Towards High-Fidelity Reference-Based Inpainting for Generating Detail-Preserving Human-Product Images
abstract: Human-product images, which showcase the integration of humans and products, play a vital role in advertising, e-commerce, and digital marketing. The essential challenge of generating such images lies in ensuring the high-fidelity preservation of product details. Among existing paradigms, reference-based inpainting offers a targeted solution by leveraging product reference images to guide the inpainting process. However, limitations remain in three key aspects: the lack of diverse large-scale training data, the struggle of current models to focus on product detail preservation, and the inability of coarse supervision for achieving precise guidance. To address these issues, we propose HiFi-Inpaint, a novel high-fidelity reference-based inpainting framework tailored for generating human-product images. HiFi-Inpaint introduces Shared Enhancement Attention (SEA) to refine fine-grained product features and Detail-Aware Loss (DAL) to enforce precise pixel-level supervision using high-frequency maps. Additionally, we construct a new dataset, HP-Image-40K, with samples curated from self-synthesis data and processed with automatic filtering. Experimental results show that HiFi-Inpaint achieves state-of-the-art performance, delivering detail-preserving human-product images.

light_analysis.overview: HiFi-Inpaint通过引入共享增强注意力和细节感知损失，实现高保真的基于参考修复，专为生成细节保持的人-物图像设计。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机在于解决生成人-物图像时产品细节难以高保真保存的实际问题，这在广告和电子商务中至关重要。现有基于参考的修复方法存在三个主要局限：缺乏多样化的大规模训练数据，导致模型泛化能力不足；模型难以聚焦于产品细节保存，容易丢失精细特征；以及粗监督方式无法提供精确指导，影响修复精度。因此，亟需一种新方法来克服这些缺陷，提升图像生成质量。
light_analysis.method: 本研究提出HiFi-Inpaint框架，其核心创新包括Shared Enhancement Attention（SEA）模块，用于细化产品特征以增强细节关注，和Detail-Aware Loss（DAL），利用高频图实施像素级监督以确保精确指导。此外，构建了HP-Image-40K数据集，通过自合成数据并结合自动过滤技术提供多样化的训练样本，支持模型的训练和评估，整体框架旨在优化参考图像与目标图像的融合过程。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，HiFi-Inpaint在生成人-物图像时达到最先进性能，有效保持产品细节，优于现有基线方法。尽管摘要未提供具体性能指标（如准确率），但提及了状态级性能的达成，暗示在细节保存和图像质量方面有显著提升。对比其他基于参考的修复模型，HiFi-Inpaint通过引入新机制和高频监督，显示出更强的细节捕捉能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提出HiFi-Inpaint框架，通过SEA和DAL创新技术，推动基于参考修复领域的发展。其学术价值在于解决细节保存的挑战，增强图像生成的真实性和精确性；实际应用价值高，可提升广告和电子商务中图像的质量。摘要未明确说明潜在局限性或未来工作方向，但可推断进一步优化或扩展到其他图像任务为可能方向。

title: OnlineX: Unified Online 3D Reconstruction and Understanding with Active-to-Stable State Evolution
abstract: Recent advances in generalizable 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) have enabled rapid 3D scene reconstruction within seconds, eliminating the need for per-scene optimization. However, existing methods primarily follow an offline reconstruction paradigm, lacking the capacity for continuous reconstruction, which limits their applicability to online scenarios such as robotics and VR/AR. In this paper, we introduce OnlineX, a feed-forward framework that reconstructs both 3D visual appearance and language fields in an online manner using only streaming images. A key challenge in online formulation is the cumulative drift issue, which is rooted in the fundamental conflict between two opposing roles of the memory state: an active role that constantly refreshes to capture high-frequency local geometry, and a stable role that conservatively accumulates and preserves the long-term global structure. To address this, we introduce a decoupled active-to-stable state evolution paradigm. Our framework decouples the memory state into a dedicated active state and a persistent stable state, and then cohesively fuses the information from the former into the latter to achieve both fidelity and stability. Moreover, we jointly model visual appearance and language fields and incorporate an implicit Gaussian fusion module to enhance reconstruction quality. Experiments on mainstream datasets demonstrate that our method consistently outperforms prior work in novel view synthesis and semantic understanding, showcasing robust performance across input sequences of varying lengths with real-time inference speed.
comment: Accepted by CVPR Finding 2026 (Project page: https://xiac20.github.io/OnlineX/)

light_analysis.overview: 提出了OnlineX框架，通过解耦主动到稳定状态演化范式，实现在线3D视觉和语言场重建，有效解决累积漂移问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机源于通用3D高斯泼溅（3DGS）方法虽能快速重建3D场景，但主要局限于离线模式，缺乏连续重建能力，不适用于在线场景如机器人导航和VR/AR。累积漂移问题是关键障碍，源自内存状态在主动更新局部几何和稳定保持全局结构之间的冲突，这限制了在线3D重建的实用性和扩展性，现有方法无法有效平衡高频率更新与长期稳定性，导致重建质量下降和潜在错误累积。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法采用前馈框架OnlineX，核心创新是解耦主动到稳定状态演化范式。框架将内存状态分离为主动状态（负责动态捕获高频局部几何）和稳定状态（负责保守积累长期全局结构），通过融合机制将信息从前者整合到后者，以实现保真度和稳定性的平衡。此外，联合建模视觉外观和语言场，并引入隐式高斯融合模块以增强重建质量，使用流式图像作为输入，无需逐场景优化，支持端到端的在线处理流程。
light_analysis.result: 在主流数据集上的实验表明，OnlineX在新视图合成和语义理解任务上持续优于先前工作，展现出鲁棒的性能，能处理不同长度输入序列，并具有实时推理速度。具体性能指标如准确率提升百分比未在摘要中明确说明，但实验验证了其在在线场景中的有效性和效率优势，与基线方法对比显示出显著改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是开发了OnlineX框架，成功解决在线3D重建中的累积漂移问题，通过状态演化实现高保真和稳定的重建。研究推动了在线场景理解技术的发展，为机器人、VR/AR等应用提供实用解决方案。学术价值在于提出了新颖的解耦范式，实际应用价值高，但摘要未明确说明潜在局限性或未来工作方向。

title: SimRecon: SimReady Compositional Scene Reconstruction from Real Videos
abstract: Compositional scene reconstruction seeks to create object-centric representations rather than holistic scenes from real-world videos, which is natively applicable for simulation and interaction. Conventional compositional reconstruction approaches primarily emphasize on visual appearance and show limited generalization ability to real-world scenarios. In this paper, we propose SimRecon, a framework that realizes a "Perception-Generation-Simulation" pipeline towards cluttered scene reconstruction, which first conducts scene-level semantic reconstruction from video input, then performs single-object generation, and finally assembles these assets in the simulator. However, naively combining these three stages leads to visual infidelity of generated assets and physical implausibility of the final scene, a problem particularly severe for complex scenes. Thus, we further propose two bridging modules between the three stages to address this problem. To be specific, for the transition from Perception to Generation, critical for visual fidelity, we introduce Active Viewpoint Optimization, which actively searches in 3D space to acquire optimal projected images as conditions for single-object completion. Moreover, for the transition from Generation to Simulation, essential for physical plausibility, we propose a Scene Graph Synthesizer, which guides the construction from scratch in 3D simulators, mirroring the native, constructive principle of the real world. Extensive experiments on the ScanNet dataset validate our method's superior performance over previous state-of-the-art approaches.

light_analysis.overview: SimRecon提出一个框架，通过感知-生成-模拟流水线，结合Active Viewpoint Optimization和Scene Graph Synthesizer，提升从真实视频的组合场景重建的视觉保真度和物理合理性。
light_analysis.motivation: 组合场景重建旨在从现实世界视频创建对象中心表示，直接适用于模拟和交互，但传统方法侧重于视觉外观，对复杂真实场景的泛化能力有限，导致重建结果视觉不真实且物理不合理。现有方法在处理杂乱场景时效果不佳，因此需要改进以提升重建质量和实际适用性。
light_analysis.method: SimRecon框架实现感知-生成-模拟流水线：首先从视频输入进行场景级语义重建，然后执行单个对象生成，最后在模拟器中组装资产。关键创新是引入两个桥接模块：Active Viewpoint Optimization在3D空间中主动搜索最优投影图像作为对象补全条件，提高视觉保真度；Scene Graph Synthesizer指导模拟器中从零构建场景，模拟现实世界的构造原则，增强物理合理性。使用ScanNet数据集进行实验。
light_analysis.result: 在ScanNet数据集上的广泛实验验证了SimRecon方法优于先前最先进的方法，摘要未明确说明具体性能指标如准确率，但实验结果表明该方法在组合场景重建任务中显著提升了视觉保真度和物理合理性，与基线方法对比显示出优越性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: SimRecon的主要贡献是提出完整的感知-生成-模拟框架，并通过桥接模块解决视觉和物理问题。该方法在学术上推动了视频到模拟的场景重建技术，在实际应用中增强了模拟和交互任务的真实性。摘要未明确提及局限性或未来工作方向。

title: Nano-EmoX: Unifying Multimodal Emotional Intelligence from Perception to Empathy
abstract: The development of affective multimodal language models (MLMs) has long been constrained by a gap between low-level perception and high-level interaction, leading to fragmented affective capabilities and limited generalization. To bridge this gap, we propose a cognitively inspired three-level hierarchy that organizes affective tasks according to their cognitive depth-perception, understanding, and interaction-and provides a unified conceptual foundation for advancing affective modeling. Guided by this hierarchy, we introduce Nano-EmoX, a small-scale multitask MLM, and P2E (Perception-to-Empathy), a curriculum-based training framework. Nano-EmoX integrates a suite of omni-modal encoders, including an enhanced facial encoder and a fusion encoder, to capture key multimodal affective cues and improve cross-task transferability. The outputs are projected into a unified language space via heterogeneous adapters, empowering a lightweight language model to tackle diverse affective tasks. Concurrently, P2E progressively cultivates emotional intelligence by aligning rapid perception with chain-of-thought-driven empathy. To the best of our knowledge, Nano-EmoX is the first compact MLM (2.2B) to unify six core affective tasks across all three hierarchy levels, achieving state-of-the-art or highly competitive performance across multiple benchmarks, demonstrating excellent efficiency and generalization.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Nano-EmoX，首个紧凑型多模态语言模型（2.2B参数），通过认知启发的三层层次结构统一了六个核心情感任务，实现从感知到共情的全面情感智能建模。
light_analysis.motivation: 情感多模态语言模型的发展长期受限于低层感知与高层交互之间的差距，导致模型情感能力分散、泛化性不足。现有方法往往专注于单一任务或缺乏统一框架，难以处理不同认知层次的情感挑战，限制了在实际应用（如人机交互）中的效能。因此，本研究旨在桥接这一鸿沟，构建更全面的情感建模基础，提升模型的适应性和实用性。
light_analysis.method: 本研究提出一个认知启发的三层层次结构（感知、理解、交互），为情感任务提供统一组织框架。基于此，引入Nano-EmoX，一个小型多任务多模态语言模型，整合全模态编码器（如增强的面部编码器和融合编码器）来捕捉关键多模态情感线索，提升跨任务迁移能力。通过异构适配器将输出投影到统一语言空间，赋能轻量级语言模型处理多样情感任务。同时，设计P2E训练框架，采用课程学习逐步培养情感智能，对齐快速感知与链式思维驱动的共情，优化模型学习过程。
light_analysis.result: Nano-EmoX在多个基准测试中取得了最先进或高度竞争的性能，展示了卓越的效率和泛化能力。作为首个紧凑型多模态语言模型（2.2B参数），它统一了六个核心情感任务，覆盖所有三个层次，相比基线方法在多个任务上表现优异，具体性能指标如准确率等由于摘要未提供详细数据而未明确说明，但整体效果显著提升模型的应用潜力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究通过Nano-EmoX和P2E框架，为情感多模态语言模型提供了统一的认知层次结构和训练方法，显著提升了模型的泛化性和效率。学术上，它填补了低层感知与高层交互之间的理论空白，推动了情感智能建模的发展；实际应用中，紧凑设计便于部署，增强了人机交互等场景的适用性。未来工作可扩展任务范围或优化架构，以应对更复杂的情感场景，但摘要未明确说明具体方向。

title: Recursive Think-Answer Process for LLMs and VLMs
abstract: Think-Answer reasoners such as DeepSeek-R1 have made notable progress by leveraging interpretable internal reasoning. However, despite the frequent presence of self-reflective cues like "Oops!", they remain vulnerable to output errors during single-pass inference. To address this limitation, we propose an efficient Recursive Think-Answer Process (R-TAP) that enables models to engage in iterative reasoning cycles and generate more accurate answers, going beyond conventional single-pass approaches. Central to this approach is a confidence generator that evaluates the certainty of model responses and guides subsequent improvements. By incorporating two complementary rewards-Recursively Confidence Increase Reward and Final Answer Confidence Reward-we show that R-TAP-enhanced models consistently outperform conventional single-pass methods for both large language models (LLMs) and vision-language models (VLMs). Moreover, by analyzing the frequency of "Oops"-like expressions in model responses, we find that R-TAP-applied models exhibit significantly fewer self-reflective patterns, resulting in more stable and faster inference-time reasoning. We hope R-TAP pave the way evolving into efficient and elaborated methods to refine the reasoning processes of future AI.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出递归思考-回答过程（R-TAP），通过迭代推理循环提升大型语言模型和视觉语言模型的推理准确性和稳定性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有Think-Answer推理器如DeepSeek-R1虽然利用可解释内部推理取得进展，但单次推理过程仍易输出错误，自反提示如“Oops!”不足以有效纠正。这凸显了传统单次方法的局限性，影响模型在复杂任务中的可靠性和准确性，因此研究旨在开发更稳健的迭代推理方法以克服这些不足。
light_analysis.method: 研究提出Recursive Think-Answer Process（R-TAP），核心是置信度生成器评估模型响应的确定性并引导迭代改进，通过结合递归置信度增加奖励和最终答案置信度奖励优化推理过程。该方法适用于LLMs和VLMs，关键创新在于系统化自反推理实现高效迭代，但摘要未明确说明具体数据集或模型架构细节。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，R-TAP增强的模型在LLMs和VLMs上均优于传统单次推理方法，具体表现为“Oops”类表达式频率显著减少，推理更稳定且速度更快。尽管摘要未提供具体准确率数据，但与基线对比显示R-TAP能有效减少错误并提升推理效率。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究贡献了R-TAP方法，通过迭代推理和置信度引导显著改进模型推理性能，学术上为AI推理过程优化提供新思路，实际上可应用于高可靠性AI系统。未来工作可进一步优化奖励机制或扩展到更多模型类型，推动高效推理方法发展。

title: ClinConsensus: A Consensus-Based Benchmark for Evaluating Chinese Medical LLMs across Difficulty Levels
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly applied to health management, showing promise across disease prevention, clinical decision-making, and long-term care. However, existing medical benchmarks remain largely static and task-isolated, failing to capture the openness, longitudinal structure, and safety-critical complexity of real-world clinical workflows. We introduce ClinConsensus, a Chinese medical benchmark curated, validated, and quality-controlled by clinical experts. ClinConsensus comprises 2500 open-ended cases spanning the full continuum of care--from prevention and intervention to long-term follow-up--covering 36 medical specialties, 12 common clinical task types, and progressively increasing levels of complexity. To enable reliable evaluation of such complex scenarios, we adopt a rubric-based grading protocol and propose the Clinically Applicable Consistency Score (CACS@k). We further introduce a dual-judge evaluation framework, combining a high-capability LLM-as-judge with a distilled, locally deployable judge model trained via supervised fine-tuning, enabling scalable and reproducible evaluation aligned with physician judgment. Using ClinConsensus, we conduct a comprehensive assessment of several leading LLMs and reveal substantial heterogeneity across task themes, care stages, and medical specialties. While top-performing models achieve comparable overall scores, they differ markedly in reasoning, evidence use, and longitudinal follow-up capabilities, and clinically actionable treatment planning remains a key bottleneck. We release ClinConsensus as an extensible benchmark to support the development and evaluation of medical LLMs that are robust, clinically grounded, and ready for real-world deployment.

light_analysis.overview: 论文引入由临床专家验证的中文医疗基准ClinConsensus，用于评估大型语言模型在不同难度级别下的临床适用性和表现。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有医疗基准多为静态且任务孤立，无法捕捉真实临床工作流的开放性、纵向结构和安全关键复杂性，导致医疗LLMs的评估不全面。这阻碍了LLMs在疾病预防、临床决策等健康管理领域的可靠应用，因此需要开发一个动态、综合的基准来模拟复杂临床场景，以促进模型优化和实际部署。
light_analysis.method: 研究提出ClinConsensus基准，包含2500个开放式案例，覆盖从预防到长期随访的全护理流程，涉及36个医学专科和12种临床任务类型，并设计渐进复杂度。采用基于评分标准的评分协议和Clinically Applicable Consistency Score (CACS@k)进行可靠评估。引入双法官评估框架，结合高能力LLM-as-judge和通过监督微调训练的本地部署法官模型，实现可扩展和可复现的评估。
light_analysis.result: 使用ClinConsensus评估多个领先LLMs，结果显示模型在任务主题、护理阶段和医学专科上表现显著异质性。尽管总体分数相似，但模型在推理能力、证据使用和纵向随访方面差异明显，且临床可操作的治疗规划成为关键瓶颈。这表明现有模型在复杂临床任务中仍有不足，需要进一步改进以提升实际应用效果。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是开发了ClinConsensus基准，为医疗LLMs的健壮性、临床基础性和真实世界部署提供了标准化评估工具。研究具有学术价值，推动了医疗AI评估的进步，并揭示了模型在复杂场景中的局限性。未来工作可能包括基准扩展或评估方法优化，以支持更全面的模型开发。摘要未明确说明具体局限性。

title: Hyperparameter Trajectory Inference with Conditional Lagrangian Optimal Transport
abstract: Neural networks (NNs) often have critical behavioural trade-offs that are set at design time with hyperparameters-such as reward weights in reinforcement learning or quantile targets in regression. Post-deployment, however, user preferences can evolve, making initial settings undesirable, necessitating potentially expensive retraining. To circumvent this, we introduce the task of Hyperparameter Trajectory Inference (HTI): to learn, from observed data, how a NN's conditional output distribution changes with its hyperparameters, and construct a surrogate model that approximates the NN at unobserved hyperparameter settings. HTI requires extending existing trajectory inference approaches to incorporate conditions, exacerbating the challenge of ensuring inferred paths are feasible. We propose an approach based on conditional Lagrangian optimal transport, jointly learning the Lagrangian function governing hyperparameter-induced dynamics along with the associated optimal transport maps and geodesics between observed marginals, which form the surrogate model. We incorporate inductive biases based on the manifold hypothesis and least-action principles into the learned Lagrangian, improving surrogate model feasibility. We empirically demonstrate that our approach reconstructs NN outputs across various hyperparameter spectra better than other alternatives.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出了一种基于条件拉格朗日最优传输的超参数轨迹推断方法，用于构建神经网络在超参数变化下的替代模型以避免重新训练。
light_analysis.motivation: 神经网络部署后，用户偏好可能发生变化，导致初始超参数设置不理想，而重新训练需要高昂的计算成本和资源。现有轨迹推断方法在处理超参数条件时面临挑战，难以确保推断路径的可行性，这限制了在动态环境中的应用。该研究旨在解决这一实际问题，通过引入超参数轨迹推断（HTI）任务，学习超参数如何影响神经网络的条件输出分布，以减少重新训练的需求。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出了一种基于条件拉格朗日最优传输的方法，联合学习超参数诱导动力学的拉格朗日函数、从观察到边缘分布的最优传输映射和测地线，构建替代模型以近似未观测超参数下的神经网络输出。关键创新点包括将流形假设和最小作用原理作为归纳偏置纳入学习的拉格朗日函数中，以提高推断路径的可行性和模型的泛化能力。技术路线涉及利用优化传输理论构建动态系统，并通过机器学习算法学习拉格朗日函数和传输路径，摘要未明确说明具体数据集或模型架构。
light_analysis.result: 论文通过实验验证了所提方法在重构各种超参数谱下的神经网络输出方面优于其他替代方法，摘要未提供具体性能指标如准确率或效率改进的数据，但表明该方法在多个超参数设置下展现出更好的重构能力。实验对比了基线方法，突出了其在避免重新训练和适应超参数变化上的优势，强化了其在实践中应用的潜力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究的主要贡献是提出了超参数轨迹推断（HTI）任务并开发了基于条件拉格朗日最优传输的方法，在学术上扩展了轨迹推断和最优传输的交叉领域，具有创新性。实际应用中，该方法可以减少神经网络重新训练的开销，提高系统在动态环境中的适应性，具有重要价值。未来工作可探讨该方法在更复杂模型或真实场景中的适用性，并解决潜在局限性如计算复杂度或泛化性问题。

title: Efficient Test-Time Optimization for Depth Completion via Low-Rank Decoder Adaptation
abstract: Zero-shot depth completion has gained attention for its ability to generalize across environments without sensor-specific datasets or retraining. However, most existing approaches rely on diffusion-based test-time optimization, which is computationally expensive due to iterative denoising. Recent visual-prompt-based methods reduce training cost but still require repeated forward--backward passes through the full frozen network to optimize input-level prompts, resulting in slow inference. In this work, we show that adapting only the decoder is sufficient for effective test-time optimization, as depth foundation models concentrate depth-relevant information within a low-dimensional decoder subspace. Based on this insight, we propose a lightweight test-time adaptation method that updates only this low-dimensional subspace using sparse depth supervision. Our approach achieves state-of-the-art performance, establishing a new Pareto frontier between accuracy and efficiency for test-time adaptation. Extensive experiments on five indoor and outdoor datasets demonstrate consistent improvements over prior methods, highlighting the practicality of fast zero-shot depth completion.
comment: 17 pages, 7 figures [We achieved a new Pareto frontier in test-time depth completion.]

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出一种通过低秩解码器适应实现高效测试时优化的深度完成方法，显著提升零样本深度完成的准确性和效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 零样本深度完成技术因其无需传感器特定数据集或重新训练即可跨环境泛化而备受关注，但现有方法面临计算成本高的问题：基于扩散的测试时优化因迭代去噪计算昂贵，而视觉提示方法虽降低训练成本，仍需通过整个冻结网络进行多次前向-反向传播来优化输入级提示，导致推理速度慢。因此，开发轻量级高效方法以平衡准确性和效率成为重要研究需求，推动实际应用中的快速处理。
light_analysis.method: 本文基于深度基础模型将深度相关信息集中到低维解码器子空间的观察，提出仅适应解码器的轻量级测试时优化方法。核心创新在于仅更新这个低维子空间，使用稀疏深度监督进行参数调整，避免了优化整个网络的计算负担，同时保持性能。具体技术路线包括识别低秩解码器特性，实现快速适应，关键细节如模型架构在摘要中未明确说明。
light_analysis.result: 该方法在五个室内外数据集上进行广泛实验，取得了最先进的性能，并在准确性和效率之间建立了新的帕累托前沿，优于先前方法。实验表明一致性能提升，在减少计算开销的同时保持高精度，与基线方法对比显示出更好的平衡，但摘要未提供具体数据如准确率数值，仅强调了效率和实用性的改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文的主要贡献在于提出了一种高效的测试时适应方法，通过低秩解码器适应促进快速零样本深度完成。学术上，该方法揭示了深度模型中信息集中的特性，为类似优化问题提供新思路；实际上，提高了深度完成任务的实时应用可行性。局限性未在摘要中明确说明，未来工作可能涉及扩展至其他视觉任务或进一步优化计算效率。

title: Operator Learning Using Weak Supervision from Walk-on-Spheres
abstract: Training neural PDE solvers is often bottlenecked by expensive data generation or unstable physics-informed neural network (PINN) involving challenging optimization landscapes due to higher-order derivatives. To tackle this issue, we propose an alternative approach using Monte Carlo approaches to estimate the solution to the PDE as a stochastic process for weak supervision during training. Leveraging the Walk-on-Spheres method, we introduce a learning scheme called \emph{Walk-on-Spheres Neural Operator (WoS-NO)} which uses weak supervision from WoS to train any given neural operator. We propose to amortize the cost of Monte Carlo walks across the distribution of PDE instances using stochastic representations from the WoS algorithm to generate cheap, noisy, estimates of the PDE solution during training. This is formulated into a data-free physics-informed objective where a neural operator is trained to regress against these weak supervisions, allowing the operator to learn a generalized solution map for an entire family of PDEs. This strategy does not require expensive pre-computed datasets, avoids computing higher-order derivatives for loss functions that are memory-intensive and unstable, and demonstrates zero-shot generalization to novel PDE parameters and domains. Experiments show that for the same number of training steps, our method exhibits up to 8.75$\times$ improvement in $L_2$-error compared to standard physics-informed training schemes, up to 6.31$\times$ improvement in training speed, and reductions of up to 2.97$\times$ in GPU memory consumption. We present the code at https://github.com/neuraloperator/WoS-NO

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出Walk-on-Spheres Neural Operator (WoS-NO)，利用蒙特卡洛方法和Walk-on-Spheres的弱监督，高效训练神经算子求解偏微分方程，实现无数据、稳定的训练方案。
light_analysis.motivation: 训练神经偏微分方程（PDE）求解器常受限于昂贵的数据生成或物理信息神经网络（PINN）的优化困难，后者因高阶导数导致损失函数不稳定和内存消耗大。现有方法在效率和稳定性上不足，阻碍了神经算子的实际应用。本研究旨在解决这些问题，提供一种避免高阶导数计算、减少数据依赖的训练方法，以提升训练性能和泛化能力。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出WoS-NO方法，核心是使用Walk-on-Spheres算法的蒙特卡洛估计生成PDE解的随机过程作为弱监督信号。通过摊销蒙特卡洛步行的成本，在PDE实例分布上生成便宜且带噪声的解估计，构建无数据物理信息损失函数，训练神经算子回归这些监督。关键创新包括弱监督的应用和成本摊销策略，适用于任何神经算子架构，不依赖预计算数据集。
light_analysis.result: 实验显示，在相同训练步数下，WoS-NO相比标准物理信息训练方案，L2误差改善高达8.75倍，训练速度提升高达6.31倍，GPU内存消耗减少高达2.97倍。这些结果表明方法在准确性、效率和资源使用方面显著优于基线，实现了高效、低内存的PDE求解。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提出WoS-NO，一种无数据、高效的神经算子训练方法，通过弱监督避免高阶导数计算，实现零样本泛化到新PDE参数和域。学术上解决了PINN中的优化挑战，实际应用为科学计算提供稳定PDE求解方案。局限性摘要未明确说明，未来工作可能包括扩展到更复杂PDE或改进噪声处理。

title: Demystifying Group Relative Policy Optimization: Its Policy Gradient is a U-Statistic
abstract: Group relative policy optimization (GRPO), a core methodological component of DeepSeekMath and DeepSeek-R1, has emerged as a cornerstone for scaling reasoning capabilities of large language models. Despite its widespread adoption and the proliferation of follow-up works, the theoretical properties of GRPO remain less studied. This paper provides a unified framework to understand GRPO through the lens of classical U-statistics. We demonstrate that the GRPO policy gradient is inherently a U-statistic, allowing us to characterize its mean squared error (MSE), derive the finite-sample error bound and asymptotic distribution of the suboptimality gap for its learned policy. Our findings reveal that GRPO is asymptotically equivalent to an oracle policy gradient algorithm -- one with access to a value function that quantifies the goodness of its learning policy at each training iteration -- and achieves asymptotically optimal performance within a broad class of policy gradient algorithms. Furthermore, we establish a universal scaling law that offers principled guidance for selecting the optimal group size. Empirical experiments further validate our theoretical findings, demonstrating that the optimal group size is universal, and verify the oracle property of GRPO.

light_analysis.overview: 本文通过U-statistics框架揭示了GRPO策略梯度的本质，证明其渐近最优性并提供通用缩放定律指导。
light_analysis.motivation: GRPO作为DeepSeek模型的核心方法，用于扩展大语言模型的推理能力，但尽管应用广泛，其理论性质研究不足。现有方法缺乏对策略梯度性质的系统分析，导致优化缺乏理论基础，限制了性能提升和应用扩展。本文旨在填补这一理论空白，通过数学工具提供统一框架，以深入理解GRPO的收敛行为和最优性，解决实践中的不确定性。
light_analysis.method: 论文采用经典U-statistics理论作为分析框架，将GRPO的策略梯度表达为U-statistic。基于这一数学工具，作者推导了策略梯度的均方误差、有限样本误差界以及学习策略的渐近分布，从而揭示了GRPO的内在统计性质。关键创新在于连接强化学习中的策略梯度与统计理论，利用U-statistic的性质来分析算法的收敛性和最优性，为GRPO提供严谨的数学基础。
light_analysis.result: 理论推导表明，GRPO渐近等价于拥有价值函数访问权限的oracle策略梯度算法，在广泛类别的策略梯度算法中达到渐近最优性能。同时，建立了通用缩放定律，为选择最优组大小提供原则性指导。实证实验进一步验证了这些理论发现，证明最优组大小具有通用性，并确认了GRPO的oracle性质，但摘要未明确说明具体性能指标如准确率提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献在于为GRPO提供了坚实的理论支撑，证明了其渐近最优性和稳健性，并建立了缩放定律以指导实践应用。这增强了GRPO在强化学习和大语言模型中的可信度，为未来优化和扩展提供了理论基础。摘要未明确说明局限性，但未来工作可探讨更复杂的场景或扩展分析框架。

title: HeroGS: Hierarchical Guidance for Robust 3D Gaussian Splatting under Sparse Views
abstract: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) has recently emerged as a promising approach in novel view synthesis, combining photorealistic rendering with real-time efficiency. However, its success heavily relies on dense camera coverage; under sparse-view conditions, insufficient supervision leads to irregular Gaussian distributions, characterized by globally sparse coverage, blurred background, and distorted high-frequency areas. To address this, we propose HeroGS, Hierarchical Guidance for Robust 3D Gaussian Splatting, a unified framework that establishes hierarchical guidance across the image, feature, and parameter levels. At the image level, sparse supervision is converted into pseudo-dense guidance, globally regularizing the Gaussian distributions and forming a consistent foundation for subsequent optimization. Building upon this, Feature-Adaptive Densification and Pruning (FADP) at the feature level leverages low-level features to refine high-frequency details and adaptively densifies Gaussians in background regions. The optimized distributions then support Co-Pruned Geometry Consistency (CPG) at parameter level, which guides geometric consistency through parameter freezing and co-pruning, effectively removing inconsistent splats. The hierarchical guidance strategy effectively constrains and optimizes the overall Gaussian distributions, thereby enhancing both structural fidelity and rendering quality. Extensive experiments demonstrate that HeroGS achieves high-fidelity reconstructions and consistently surpasses state-of-the-art baselines under sparse-view conditions.

light_analysis.overview: HeroGS提出一种层次化指导框架，通过在图像、特征和参数级别建立指导，显著提升稀疏视图下3D高斯喷射的渲染质量和结构保真度。
light_analysis.motivation: 3D高斯喷射（3DGS）在新视角合成中具有逼真渲染和实时效率的优势，但其成功严重依赖密集相机覆盖。在稀疏视图条件下，监督不足导致高斯分布不规则，表现为全局稀疏、背景模糊和高频区域失真，这限制了3DGS在现实应用如从少量图像重建3D场景中的可行性。现有方法通常难以有效处理稀疏监督，因此需要开发新技术来克服这一挑战。
light_analysis.method: HeroGS框架通过建立图像、特征和参数三个层次的指导来优化高斯分布。在图像级别，将稀疏监督转化为伪密集指导，全局正则化分布以为后续优化提供一致性基础。特征级别采用特征自适应密集化与剪枝（FADP），利用低级特征细化高频细节并自适应地增加背景区域的高斯密度。参数级别通过共同剪枝几何一致性（CPG）指导几何一致性，通过参数冻结和共同剪枝移除不一致的喷射点，从而系统性地约束整体分布。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明HeroGS在稀疏视图条件下实现了高保真的3D重建，渲染质量和结构保真度均有显著提升。通过广泛实验验证，该方法一致超越现有最先进的基线方法，但在摘要中未明确说明具体性能指标如准确率或效率改进。结果证明HeroGS能有效处理稀疏监督，优于传统方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: HeroGS的核心贡献在于提出了一种层次化指导框架，解决了稀疏视图下3D高斯喷射的渲染和几何一致性挑战，推动了3D重建技术的进步。这项研究具有重要学术价值，为稀疏数据下的场景合成提供了新思路，并增强了3DGS在增强现实等实际应用中的潜力。未来工作可能包括扩展到动态场景或更复杂的稀疏数据环境。

title: Flow Matching-enabled Test-Time Refinement for Unsupervised Cardiac MR Registration
abstract: Diffusion-based unsupervised image registration has been explored for cardiac cine MR, but expensive multi-step inference limits practical use. We propose FlowReg, a flow-matching framework in displacement field space that achieves strong registration in as few as two steps and supports further refinement with more steps.
