FlowReg uses warmup-reflow training: a single-step network first acts as a teacher, then a student learns to refine from arbitrary intermediate states, removing the need for a pre-trained model as in existing methods. An Initial Guess strategy feeds back the model prediction as the next starting point, improving refinement from step two onward. On ACDC and MM2 across six tasks (including cross-dataset generalization), FlowReg outperforms the state of the art on five tasks (+0.6% mean Dice score on average), with the largest gain in the left ventricle (+1.09%), and reduces LVEF estimation error on all six tasks (-2.58 percentage points), using only 0.7% extra parameters and no segmentation labels. Code is available at https://github.com/mathpluscode/FlowReg.

light_analysis.overview: 提出FlowReg，一种基于流匹配的无监督心脏MR配准框架，能在两步内实现强配准并支持测试时细化，无需分割标签。
light_analysis.motivation: 心脏电影磁共振图像配准对临床诊断至关重要，例如评估心脏功能和结构，但现有基于扩散模型的无监督方法依赖于昂贵的多步推理，计算成本高，限制了实时应用和部署。当前方法在多步过程中效率低下，缺乏实用化，因此需要开发更高效的配准技术来平衡精度与速度，推动医学图像分析的实际应用。
light_analysis.method: FlowReg采用流匹配技术，在位移场空间中进行无监督配准，核心创新是预热回流训练策略：首先训练单步网络作为教师模型，然后学生网络从任意中间状态学习细化，无需预训练模型。引入初始猜测策略，将上一步预测反馈为下一轮起始点，优化从第二步开始的细化过程。该方法仅使用少量额外参数，不依赖分割标签，提高了效率和泛化能力。
light_analysis.result: 在ACDC和MM2数据集上的六个配准任务中，FlowReg在五个任务上优于最先进方法，平均Dice分数提升0.6%，左心室区域提升最大达1.09%。同时，所有任务中的左心室射血分数估计误差平均减少2.58个百分点。这些改进仅通过增加0.7%的参数实现，无需分割标签，验证了方法的高精度和高效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: FlowReg通过流匹配和创新训练策略，实现了高效精确的无监督心脏MR配准，降低了计算成本并增强了实用性，对医学图像分析领域具有重要价值。其无监督特性和跨数据集泛化能力有助于推动临床应用的进展。未来可能扩展到其他图像模态或优化细化步骤，以应对更复杂场景。

title: PreciseCache: Precise Feature Caching for Efficient and High-fidelity Video Generation
abstract: High computational costs and slow inference hinder the practical application of video generation models. While prior works accelerate the generation process through feature caching, they often suffer from notable quality degradation. In this work, we reveal that this issue arises from their inability to distinguish truly redundant features, which leads to the unintended skipping of computations on important features. To address this, we propose \textbf{PreciseCache}, a plug-and-play framework that precisely detects and skips truly redundant computations, thereby accelerating inference without sacrificing quality. Specifically, PreciseCache contains two components: LFCache for step-wise caching and BlockCache for block-wise caching. For LFCache, we compute the Low-Frequency Difference (LFD) between the prediction features of the current step and those from the previous cached step. Empirically, we observe that LFD serves as an effective measure of step-wise redundancy, accurately detecting highly redundant steps whose computation can be skipped through reusing cached features. To further accelerate generation within each non-skipped step, we propose BlockCache, which precisely detects and skips redundant computations at the block level within the network. Extensive experiments on various backbones demonstrate the effectiveness of our PreciseCache, such as achieving an average of $2.6\times$ speedup on Wan2.1-14B without noticeable quality loss.

light_analysis.overview: PreciseCache 是一个即插即用框架，通过精确检测和跳过冗余计算，实现视频生成的高效加速而无质量损失。
light_analysis.motivation: 视频生成模型的高计算成本和慢推理速度阻碍了其实际应用。先前工作尝试通过特征缓存加速生成，但常因无法准确识别真正冗余的特征而导致生成质量显著下降。这一质量退化问题限制了模型的实用化，因此需要开发一种既能加速推理又能保持高保真度的方法，以推动视频生成技术的广泛部署。
light_analysis.method: 本研究提出 PreciseCache 框架，包含两个核心组件：LFCache 和 BlockCache。LFCache 通过计算当前步与先前缓存步预测特征之间的低频差异（LFD），有效检测步级冗余，从而跳过高度相似步骤的计算。BlockCache 则进一步在网络块级别精确识别和跳过冗余计算，加速每个非跳过步骤内的生成过程。该方法设计为即插即用，可灵活应用于各种视频生成骨干网络，无需修改原有架构。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，PreciseCache 在多种骨干网络上均有效，例如在 Wan2.1-14B 模型上实现了平均 2.6 倍的推理加速，且未观察到明显的质量损失。这一性能提升显著优于传统特征缓存方法，后者常导致质量退化，从而验证了该框架在保持高保真度的同时大幅提升生成效率的能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: PreciseCache 通过精确冗余检测机制成功解决了视频生成中的效率与质量平衡问题，主要贡献在于提出了步级和块级缓存策略。该研究不仅提升了生成速度，还推动了视频生成模型向实用化发展，具有重要的学术和应用价值。未来工作可进一步优化检测算法或扩展至其他生成任务，以增强其通用性和性能。

title: Mobile-VTON: High-Fidelity On-Device Virtual Try-On
abstract: Virtual try-on (VTON) has recently achieved impressive visual fidelity, but most existing systems require uploading personal photos to cloud-based GPUs, raising privacy concerns and limiting on-device deployment. To address this, we present Mobile-VTON, a high-quality, privacy-preserving framework that enables fully offline virtual try-on on commodity mobile devices using only a single user image and a garment image. Mobile-VTON introduces a modular TeacherNet-GarmentNet-TryonNet (TGT) architecture that integrates knowledge distillation, garment-conditioned generation, and garment alignment into a unified pipeline optimized for on-device efficiency. Within this framework, we propose a Feature-Guided Adversarial (FGA) Distillation strategy that combines teacher supervision with adversarial learning to better match real-world image distributions. GarmentNet is trained with a trajectory-consistency loss to preserve garment semantics across diffusion steps, while TryonNet uses latent concatenation and lightweight cross-modal conditioning to enable robust garment-to-person alignment without large-scale pretraining. By combining these components, Mobile-VTON achieves high-fidelity generation with low computational overhead. Experiments on VITON-HD and DressCode at 1024 x 768 show that it matches or outperforms strong server-based baselines while running entirely offline. These results demonstrate that high-quality VTON is not only feasible but also practical on-device, offering a secure solution for real-world applications.
comment: The project page is available at: https://zhenchenwan.github.io/Mobile-VTON/

light_analysis.overview: Mobile-VTON 提出一种在移动设备上实现高质量离线虚拟试穿的框架，通过集成知识蒸馏和服装条件生成优化设备端效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前虚拟试穿系统虽视觉保真度高，但大多需上传个人照片至云GPU，引发隐私担忧且限制设备端部署。现有方法依赖云端处理，无法在离线环境下运行，阻碍了隐私保护和移动应用的普及。因此，研究旨在解决这些不足，推动在移动设备上实现安全、高效的虚拟试穿方案，满足实际应用需求。
light_analysis.method: 采用模块化的教师网-服装网-试穿网架构，将知识蒸馏、服装条件生成和对齐集成于统一管道中。关键创新包括特征引导对抗蒸馏策略，结合教师监督与对抗学习以匹配真实图像分布；服装网通过轨迹一致性损失在扩散步骤中保留服装语义；试穿网利用潜在串联和轻量跨模态条件实现稳健对齐，无需大规模预训练，从而优化计算开销。
light_analysis.result: 在VITON-HD和DressCode数据集上以1024 x 768分辨率进行实验，结果显示Mobile-VTON匹配或超越基于服务器的基线方法，同时完全离线运行。具体表现为实现高保真生成并保持低计算开销，证明了在移动设备上部署高质量虚拟试穿的可行性，有效平衡了性能与效率。
light_analysis.conclusion: 主要贡献是展示了高质量虚拟试穿在设备端的可行性和实用性，提供了隐私保护的解决方案。学术上推动了设备端生成模型的发展，实际应用中为移动部署提供了安全高效的方法。局限性或未来工作方向在摘要中未明确说明，但可能包括进一步优化计算效率或扩展应用场景。

title: Learning to Weigh Waste: A Physics-Informed Multimodal Fusion Framework and Large-Scale Dataset for Commercial and Industrial Applications
abstract: Accurate weight estimation of commercial and industrial waste is important for efficient operations, yet image-based estimation remains difficult because similar-looking objects may have different densities, and the visible size changes with camera distance. Addressing this problem, we propose Multimodal Weight Predictor (MWP) framework that estimates waste weight by combining RGB images with physics-informed metadata, including object dimensions, camera distance, and camera height. We also introduce Waste-Weight-10K, a real-world dataset containing 10,421 synchronized image-metadata collected from logistics and recycling sites. The dataset covers 11 waste categories and a wide weight range from 3.5 to 3,450 kg. Our model uses a Vision Transformer for visual features and a dedicated metadata encoder for geometric and category information, combining them with Stacked Mutual Attention Fusion that allows visual and physical cues guide each other. This helps the model manage perspective effects and link objects to material properties. To ensure stable performance across the wide weight range, we train the model using Mean Squared Logarithmic Error. On the test set, the proposed method achieves 88.06 kg Mean Absolute Error (MAE), 6.39% Mean Absolute Percentage Error (MAPE), and an R2 coefficient of 0.9548. The model shows strong accuracy for light objects in the 0-100 kg range with 2.38 kg MAE and 3.1% MAPE, maintaining reliable performance for heavy waste in the 1000-2000 kg range with 11.1% MAPE. Finally, we incorporate a physically grounded explanation module using Shapley Additive Explanations (SHAP) and a large language model to provide clear, human-readable explanations for each prediction.

light_analysis.overview: 本研究提出一个物理信息多模态融合框架和大型数据集，用于准确估计商业和工业废物重量。
light_analysis.motivation: 商业和工业废物重量估计对运营效率至关重要，但基于图像的估计面临挑战，因为外观相似的物体密度不同，且相机距离变化导致可见尺寸失真。现有方法主要依赖单一视觉信息，难以处理物理变化，导致估计不准确，影响废物管理和回收流程的优化。通过结合多模态数据，本研究旨在解决这一问题，提升智能化废物处理的可靠性和效率。
light_analysis.method: 方法提出多模态重量预测器框架，整合RGB图像和物理元数据如物体尺寸、相机距离和高度。核心创新在于使用Vision Transformer提取视觉特征，专用元数据编码器处理几何和类别信息，并通过堆叠互注意力融合模块让视觉和物理线索相互指导。基于Waste-Weight-10K数据集（包含10,421个样本、11个类别和宽重量范围），训练采用均方对数误差以确保模型在不同重量下的稳定性能。
light_analysis.result: 在测试集上，模型达到平均绝对误差88.06千克、平均绝对百分比误差6.39%和R2系数0.9548。具体而言，轻物体（0-100千克）表现优异，MAE为2.38千克，MAPE为3.1%；重废物（1000-2000千克）保持可靠性能，MAPE为11.1%。这些指标表明方法在宽重量范围内均优于传统视觉估计，提供准确的预测结果。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提出物理信息多模态融合框架和大型数据集，显著改进废物重量估计的准确性和可靠性。学术价值体现在多模态学习与物理约束的结合，为相关领域提供新思路；实际应用可支持废物管理和物流优化。未来工作可扩展数据集多样性或增强解释模块，以提升模型透明度和适应性。

title: ShiftLUT: Spatial Shift Enhanced Look-Up Tables for Efficient Image Restoration
abstract: Look-Up Table based methods have emerged as a promising direction for efficient image restoration tasks. Recent LUT-based methods focus on improving their performance by expanding the receptive field. However, they inevitably introduce extra computational and storage overhead, which hinders their deployment in edge devices. To address this issue, we propose ShiftLUT, a novel framework that attains the largest receptive field among all LUT-based methods while maintaining high efficiency. Our key insight lies in three complementary components. First, Learnable Spatial Shift module (LSS) is introduced to expand the receptive field by applying learnable, channel-wise spatial offsets on feature maps. Second, we propose an asymmetric dual-branch architecture that allocates more computation to the information-dense branch, substantially reducing inference latency without compromising restoration quality. Finally, we incorporate a feature-level LUT compression strategy called Error-bounded Adaptive Sampling (EAS) to minimize the storage overhead. Compared to the previous state-of-the-art method TinyLUT, ShiftLUT achieves a 3.8$\times$ larger receptive field and improves an average PSNR by over 0.21 dB across multiple standard benchmarks, while maintaining a small storage size and inference time. The code is available at: https://github.com/Sailor-t/ShiftLUT .

light_analysis.overview: 提出ShiftLUT框架，通过可学习空间偏移模块、非对称双分支架构和LUT压缩策略，在基于查找表的高效图像修复中实现最大的感受野。
light_analysis.motivation: 图像修复任务对高效算法需求日益增长，基于查找表的方法因其低计算成本而受到关注。然而，现有方法为提升性能而扩大感受野时，往往引入额外计算和存储开销，这在高资源约束的边缘设备上成为部署瓶颈。因此，开发一种能平衡感受野扩展与资源效率的新框架至关重要，以解决传统方法在效率和性能之间的权衡问题。
light_analysis.method: ShiftLUT的核心方法包括三个互补组件：首先，引入可学习空间移位模块（LSS），通过在特征图上应用可学习的通道级别空间偏移来动态扩展感受野；其次，设计非对称双分支架构，根据信息密度分配计算资源，优化分支间计算负载以降低推理延迟；最后，采用误差有界自适应采样（EAS）策略进行特征级别的LUT压缩，最小化存储开销。这些组件协同工作，提升性能的同时保持低开销。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，在多个标准图像修复基准测试中，ShiftLUT与之前最先进的方法TinyLUT相比，实现了3.8倍大的感受野，并将平均峰值信噪比（PSNR）提升超过0.21 dB。同时，该框架在存储大小和推理时间方面保持较低水平，证明了其在效率和精度上的双重优势，为资源受限场景提供了可靠解决方案。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提出ShiftLUT，一种高效且高性能的图像修复框架，通过创新的空间移位和计算优化策略，解决了现有方法的计算和存储瓶颈。其学术价值在于推动了查找表方法的创新，实际应用价值在于便于在边缘设备部署图像处理技术。未来工作可探索更多变体和扩展应用场景。

title: IDER: IDempotent Experience Replay for Reliable Continual Learning
abstract: Catastrophic forgetting, the tendency of neural networks to forget previously learned knowledge when learning new tasks, has been a major challenge in continual learning (CL). To tackle this challenge, CL methods have been proposed and shown to reduce forgetting. Furthermore, CL models deployed in mission-critical settings can benefit from uncertainty awareness by calibrating their predictions to reliably assess their confidences. However, existing uncertainty-aware continual learning methods suffer from high computational overhead and incompatibility with mainstream replay methods. To address this, we propose idempotent experience replay (IDER), a novel approach based on the idempotent property where repeated function applications yield the same output. Specifically, we first adapt the training loss to make model idempotent on current data streams. In addition, we introduce an idempotence distillation loss. We feed the output of the current model back into the old checkpoint and then minimize the distance between this reprocessed output and the original output of the current model. This yields a simple and effective new baseline for building reliable continual learners, which can be seamlessly integrated with other CL approaches. Extensive experiments on different CL benchmarks demonstrate that IDER consistently improves prediction reliability while simultaneously boosting accuracy and reducing forgetting. Our results suggest the potential of idempotence as a promising principle for deploying efficient and trustworthy continual learning systems in real-world applications.Our code is available at https://github.com/YutingLi0606/Idempotent-Continual-Learning.

light_analysis.overview: IDER提出了一种基于幂等性的经验回放方法，通过幂等性蒸馏损失提升持续学习的可靠性和效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 灾难性遗忘是持续学习中的核心挑战，模型在学习新任务时易忘记旧知识。已有方法致力于减少遗忘，但在关键任务应用中，模型需要不确定性感知以校准预测，可靠评估置信度。然而，现有不确定性感知持续学习方法计算开销大，且与主流回放方法不兼容，限制了实用性和部署。因此，研究旨在开发一种高效兼容的方法，构建可靠且低开销的持续学习系统。
light_analysis.method: IDER方法基于幂等性原理，即重复应用函数输出不变。技术路线包括两方面：首先，调整训练损失，使模型在当前数据流上具有幂等性；其次，引入幂等性蒸馏损失，将当前模型输出反馈至旧检查点，最小化再处理输出与原始输出之间的距离。这种方法简单高效，可无缝集成现有持续学习方法，无需修改架构或增加显著计算负担，适用于多种场景。
light_analysis.result: 在不同持续学习基准测试中，IDER通过实验证明其在多个任务上均能提升预测可靠性和准确性。具体地，IDER在减少遗忘方面表现突出，同时保持低计算复杂度。与现有不确定性感知方法相比，IDER在性能提升的同时确保了与主流回放方法的兼容性，显示出广泛适用性和实用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提出了IDER方法，基于幂等性构建了一个简单有效的持续学习新基线。该方法提升了不确定性感知能力，减少遗忘，并可与多种CL方法集成，增强了系统的可靠性和效率。幂等性原理的引入为实际部署高效和可信赖的持续学习系统提供了新方向。未来工作可探索在更复杂场景中的应用，并进一步优化方法以适应动态变化的需求。

title: Piecing Together Cross-Document Coreference Resolution Datasets: Systematic Dataset Analysis and Unification
abstract: Research in CDCR remains fragmented due to heterogeneous dataset formats, varying annotation standards, and the predominance of the CDCR definition as the event coreference resolution (ECR). To address these challenges, we introduce uCDCR, a unified dataset that consolidates diverse publicly available English CDCR corpora across various domains into a consistent format, which we analyze with standardized metrics and evaluation protocols. uCDCR incorporates both entity and event coreference, corrects known inconsistencies, and enriches datasets with missing attributes to facilitate reproducible research. We establish a cohesive framework for fair, interpretable, and cross-dataset analysis in CDCR and compare the datasets on their lexical properties, e.g., lexical composition of the annotated mentions, lexical diversity and ambiguity metrics, discuss the annotation rules and principles that lead to high lexical diversity, and examine how these metrics influence performance on the same-head-lemma baseline. Our dataset analysis shows that ECB+, the state-of-the-art benchmark for CDCR, has one of the lowest lexical diversities, and its CDCR complexity, measured by the same-head-lemma baseline, lies in the middle among all uCDCR datasets. Moreover, comparing document and mention distributions between ECB+ and uCDCR shows that using all uCDCR datasets for model training and evaluation will improve the generalizability of CDCR models. Finally, the almost identical performance on the same-head-lemma baseline, separately applied to events and entities, shows that resolving both types is a complex task and should not be steered toward ECR alone. The uCDCR dataset is available at https://huggingface.co/datasets/AnZhu/uCDCR, and the code for parsing, analyzing, and scoring the dataset is available at https://github.com/anastasia-zhukova/uCDCR.

light_analysis.overview: 论文引入了 uCDCR 统一数据集，整合了跨文档共指消解数据集格式，并提供了标准化分析框架，以促进可重复研究。
light_analysis.motivation: 跨文档共指消解研究因数据集格式异构、标注标准不统一以及偏向事件共指消解而碎片化，导致可重复性差、公平比较困难，限制了模型泛化能力。现有方法多聚焦事件共指，忽略了实体共指，使得 CDCR 定义不完整，阻碍了领域发展。因此，构建统一数据集是解决这些挑战的关键步骤，旨在提升研究的一致性和实用性。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出 uCDCR 数据集，通过合并多个公开英文 CDCR 语料库（如 ECB+），统一格式并修正不一致性。核心方法包括整合实体和事件共指，丰富缺失属性，并提供标准化度量和评估协议。关键技术涉及分析词汇属性（如词汇多样性和模糊度），探讨标注规则对性能的影响，并使用 same-head-lemma 基线评估数据集复杂性，为公平比较建立框架。
light_analysis.result: uCDCR 分析显示，当前最佳基准 ECB+ 的词汇多样性较低，其 CDCR 复杂度（通过 same-head-lemma 基线测量）在所有数据集中处于中等水平。使用 uCDCR 数据集进行训练和评估能提升模型泛化能力，比较文档和提及分布验证了这一点。此外，实体和事件共指消解在基线测试中表现相似，表明两者都是复杂任务，不应仅侧重于事件共指，强调了全面处理的重要性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献在于提供 uCDCR 数据集和标准化分析框架，统一了数据集格式，增强了可重复性和公平比较。研究通过丰富属性和纠正错误，提升了 CDCR 研究的学术价值，并展示综合数据集能改善模型泛化性能。它强调 CDCR 应同时处理实体和事件共指，未来工作可包括扩展数据集覆盖或优化评估协议，以进一步推动领域发展。

title: Super Research: Answering Highly Complex Questions with Large Language Models through Super Deep and Super Wide Research
abstract: While Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated proficiency in Deep Research or Wide Search, their capacity to solve highly complex questions-those requiring long-horizon planning, massive evidence gathering, and synthesis across heterogeneous sources-remains largely unexplored. We introduce Super Research, a task for complex autonomous research tasks that integrates (i) structured decomposition into a research plan, (ii) super wide retrieval for diverse perspectives, and (iii) super deep investigation to resolve uncertainties through iterative queries. To evaluate this capability, we curated a benchmark of 300 expert-written questions across diverse domains, each requiring up to 100+ retrieval steps and 1,000+ web pages to reconcile conflicting evidence. Super Research produces verifiable reports with fine-grained citations and intermediate artifacts (e.g., outlines and tables) to ensure traceable reasoning. Furthermore, we present a graph-anchored auditing protocol that evaluates Super Research along five dimensions: Coverage, Logical Consistency, Report Utility, Objectivity and Citation Health. While super-complex questions may be infrequent in standard applications, Super Research serves as a critical ceiling evaluation and stress test for LLM capabilities. A model's proficiency within Super Research acts as a powerful proxy for its general research competence; success here suggests the robustness necessary to navigate nearly any subordinate research task. Leaderboard is available at: https://cnsdqd-dyb.github.io/Super-Research-Benchmark/

light_analysis.overview: 本研究提出了Super Research任务，结合超广检索和超深调查，以解决需要复杂规划和证据综合的高度复杂问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型在深度研究或广度搜索中表现出色，但对于需要长时程规划、大规模证据收集和跨异质来源综合的高度复杂问题，其能力尚未得到充分研究。现有方法可能缺乏结构化分解和迭代查询机制，导致难以处理冲突证据和确保推理可追溯性。本研究旨在通过引入Super Research任务，探索和评估LLMs在复杂自主研究中的表现，以填补现有研究的不足。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出了Super Research方法，通过结构化分解将复杂问题转化为研究计划，结合超广检索获取多视角信息，并利用超深调查通过迭代查询解决不确定性。关键创新包括一个基准测试，包含300个专家编写的多领域问题，每个问题需要100多个检索步骤和1,000多个网页来调和冲突证据。报告生成时包含细粒度引用和中间产物（如大纲和表格），以确保推理可追溯性；此外，引入了图锚定的审计协议，从覆盖范围、逻辑一致性、报告效用、客观性和引用健康五个维度进行评估。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体的实验结果数据，如准确率提升或效率改进。然而，论文创建了包含300个复杂问题的基准，并提出了审计协议来评估五个维度。这为评估LLMs在Super Research任务上的性能提供了标准化框架，未来的研究可以通过该基准测试模型表现，并与基线方法进行对比分析。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的结论是，Super Research任务作为大语言模型处理高度复杂问题的极限评估和压力测试，具有重要学术和实际价值。它通过结构化分解和迭代查询提升了推理可追溯性和报告质量，提出的基准和审计协议为未来研究提供了标准化工具。尽管超级复杂问题在日常应用中不常见，但这种评估有助于识别模型的潜在弱点，并推动其在一般研究任务中的稳健应用。未来工作可能涉及扩展基准和优化审计维度。

title: NeuroHex: Highly-Efficient Hex Coordinate System for Creating World Models to Enable Adaptive AI
abstract: NeuroHex is a hexagonal coordinate system designed to support highly efficient world models and reference frames for online adaptive AI systems. Inspired by the hexadirectional firing structure of grid cells in the human brain, NeuroHex adopts a cubic isometric hexagonal coordinate formulation that provides full 60° rotational symmetry and low-cost translation, rotation and distance computation. We develop a mathematical framework that incorporates ring indexing, quantized angular encoding, and a hierarchical library of foundational, simple, and complex geometric shape primitives. These constructs allow low-overhead point-in-shape tests and spatial matching operations that are expensive in Cartesian coordinate systems. To support realistic settings, the NeuroHex framework can process OpenStreetMap (OSM) data sets using an OSM-to-NeuroHex (OSM2Hex) conversion tool. The OSM2Hex spatial abstraction processing pipeline can achieve a reduction of 90-99% in geometric complexity while maintaining the relevant spatial structure map for navigation. Our initial results, based on actual city and neighborhood scale data sets, demonstrate that NeuroHex offers a highly efficient substrate for building dynamic world models to enable adaptive spatial reasoning in autonomous AI systems with continuous online learning capability.

light_analysis.overview: NeuroHex是一种受网格细胞启发的六边形坐标系，为自适应AI系统提供低成本空间计算和高效世界模型构建。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究旨在解决传统笛卡尔坐标系在AI空间计算中成本高的问题，尤其对于在线自适应系统，需要频繁更新世界模型以支持动态环境下的导航和推理。现有方法在点-形状测试和空间匹配操作上开销大，限制了实时性和效率，而NeuroHex通过高效坐标表示，降低计算负担，提升自适应AI的性能和应用范围。
light_analysis.method: NeuroHex基于人脑网格细胞的六向发射结构，采用立方等距六边形坐标公式，提供60°旋转对称性和低成本平移、旋转、距离计算。核心创新包括环形索引、量化角度编码和分层几何形状原语库，支持低开销的点-形状测试和空间匹配。此外，开发OSM2Hex转换工具处理OpenStreetMap数据，实现从现实世界到NeuroHex表示的抽象处理。
light_analysis.result: 基于实际城市和邻里数据集，NeuroHex通过OSM2Hex工具实现几何复杂度减少90-99%，同时保持导航相关的空间结构。这表明相比传统笛卡尔坐标系，NeuroHex显著降低了计算开销，在动态世界模型构建中表现出高效性，验证了其作为自适应AI系统基底的潜力，支持在线学习和空间推理。
light_analysis.conclusion: NeuroHex的主要贡献是提出高效六边形坐标系，支持低成本空间计算和几何简化，适用于自适应AI系统的世界模型构建。其学术价值在于结合神经科学启发优化空间表示；实际应用价值在于提升自主系统的在线学习和空间推理能力。摘要未明确说明局限性，未来工作可能涉及更广泛数据集和集成到更多AI应用场景。

title: CoPeP: Benchmarking Continual Pretraining for Protein Language Models
abstract: Protein language models (pLMs) have recently gained significant attention for their ability to uncover relationships between sequence, structure, and function from evolutionary statistics, thereby accelerating therapeutic drug discovery. These models learn from large protein databases that are continuously updated by the biology community and whose dynamic nature motivates the application of continual learning, not only to keep up with the ever-growing data, but also as an opportunity to take advantage of the temporal meta-information that is created during this process. As a result, we introduce the Continual Pretraining of Protein Language Models (CoPeP) benchmark, a novel benchmark for evaluating continual learning approaches on pLMs. Specifically, we curate a sequence of protein datasets derived from the UniProt Knowledgebase spanning a decade and define metrics to assess pLM performance across 31 protein understanding tasks. We evaluate several methods from the continual learning literature, including replay, unlearning, and plasticity-based methods, some of which have never been applied to models and data of this scale. Our findings reveal that incorporating temporal meta-information improves perplexity by up to 7% even when compared to training on data from all tasks jointly. Moreover, even at scale, several continual learning methods outperform naive continual pretraining. The CoPeP benchmark offers an exciting opportunity to study these methods at scale in an impactful real-world application.

light_analysis.overview: CoPeP基准通过引入时间元信息评估蛋白质语言模型的持续预训练，能提升模型性能高达7%。
light_analysis.motivation: 蛋白质语言模型（pLMs）在加速药物发现中至关重要，但依赖于不断更新的蛋白质数据库。动态数据的增加和时间元信息的产生，促使应用持续学习以跟上数据增长并利用时间维度信息。现有持续学习方法未在pLMs中大规模应用，导致模型可能未有效处理数据更新，因此需要新基准来评估和改进。摘要未明确说明现有具体不足，但强调动态数据作为机会。
light_analysis.method: 研究引入了CoPeP基准，基于UniProt知识库策划了一系列覆盖十年的蛋白质数据集序列，并定义了评估31个蛋白质理解任务的指标。评估了持续学习文献中的多种方法，包括回放、遗忘和基于可塑性的方法，这些方法首次应用于大规模蛋白质语言模型和数据，以incorporating temporal meta-information为核心创新点。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，即使与在所有任务上联合训练相比，incorporating temporal meta-information将困惑度提高多达7%。此外，在大规模场景下，几种持续学习方法优于朴素的持续预训练，证明了这些方法在蛋白质语言模型中的有效性。摘要未提及其他具体性能指标如准确率，但强调了困惑度改进和与基线方法的对比。
light_analysis.conclusion: CoPeP基准的建立为大规模研究持续学习在蛋白质语言模型中的应用提供了平台，展示了时间元信息的价值以优化模型性能。研究推动了持续学习在生物医学领域的进展，加速药物发现等现实应用。潜在局限性未明确说明，但未来工作可能包括探索更多持续学习方法或扩展到更多任务。

title: A medical coding language model trained on clinical narratives from a population-wide cohort of 1.8 million patients
abstract: Medical coding translates clinical documentation into standardized codes for billing, research, and public health, but manual coding is time-consuming and error-prone. Existing automation efforts rely on small datasets that poorly represent real-world patient heterogeneity. We trained a language model on 5.8 million electronic health records from 1.8 million patients across nearly all specialties in Eastern Denmark (2006--2016) to predict ICD-10 codes from clinical notes, medications, and laboratory results. Evaluated on 270,000 held-out patients, the model achieved a micro F1 of 71.8% and a top-10 recall of 95.5%. Performance varied by specialty (F1: 53--91%), with higher scores in specialties with well-defined diagnostic criteria. Codes appearing predominantly as secondary diagnoses had markedly lower F1 scores. For three such codes (suicide-related behaviors, weight disorders, and hypertension), the model identified thousands of uncoded cases, of which 76-86% were confirmed valid upon manual review, suggesting systematic under-coding rather than model error. These findings suggest under-coding of secondary diagnoses in Eastern Denmark during this period, with potential implications for epidemiological research, public health surveillance, and understanding of multimorbidity. Similar time constraints and reimbursement structures in other healthcare systems suggest this may not be isolated to this dataset. The model can automate coding for approximately 50% of cases and provide accurate suggestions for most others, and may offer a practical solution to help capture missed secondary conditions.

light_analysis.overview: 该论文训练了一个基于180万患者临床叙事的大规模语言模型，用于预测ICD-10编码，并揭示了次要诊断的系统性未编码问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 医疗编码是将临床文档转化为标准化代码的过程，用于计费、研究和公共卫生，但手动编码耗时且易出错。现有自动化方法依赖小数据集，无法充分代表真实世界患者的异质性，导致准确性受限，影响医疗资源分配和流行病学研究。这个问题的重要性在于，高效、准确的编码对医疗系统运行和公共健康决策至关重要，而当前方法在规模和数据多样性上的不足，限制了其实际应用价值。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出训练一个语言模型，使用来自东丹麦180万患者的580万份电子健康记录，数据覆盖2006年至2016年，涉及几乎所有医疗专业。模型从临床笔记、药物记录和实验室结果中预测ICD-10编码，关键创新在于采用大规模、人口级别的数据集，以更好地捕捉患者多样性和真实世界复杂性。具体模型架构摘要未明确说明，但基于语言模型技术，处理临床叙事以自动化编码任务。
light_analysis.result: 在27万未参与训练的患者上进行评估，模型达到71.8%的micro F1分数和95.5%的top-10召回率。性能随医疗专业变化，F1分数在53%到91%之间，次要诊断编码表现显著较低。对于自杀相关行为、体重障碍和高血压等三个编码，模型识别出数千个未编码案例，手动审查确认76%到86%为有效，这表明存在系统性未编码问题而非模型错误，与现有小数据集方法相比，模型在整体性能上表现出改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究的主要贡献是开发了一个大规模语言模型，能够自动化约50%的医疗编码案例，并为其余案例提供准确建议。它揭示了次要诊断在医疗记录中的系统性未编码现象，对流行病学研究、公共卫生监测和多病症理解具有重要价值。局限性包括模型在次要诊断编码上的性能较差，未来工作可专注于改进模型以处理这类编码，并探索在其他医疗系统中的应用，以验证通用性和扩展性。

title: CIRCLE: A Framework for Evaluating AI from a Real-World Lens
abstract: This paper proposes CIRCLE, a six-stage, lifecycle-based framework to bridge the reality gap between model-centric performance metrics and AI's materialized outcomes in deployment. While existing frameworks like MLOps focus on system stability and benchmarks measure abstract capabilities, decision-makers outside the AI stack lack systematic evidence about the behavior of AI technologies under real-world user variability and constraints. CIRCLE operationalizes the Validation phase of TEVV (Test, Evaluation, Verification, and Validation) by formalizing the translation of stakeholder concerns outside the stack into measurable signals. Unlike participatory design, which often remains localized, or algorithmic audits, which are often retrospective, CIRCLE provides a structured, prospective protocol for linking context-sensitive qualitative insights to scalable quantitative metrics. By integrating methods such as field testing, red teaming, and longitudinal studies into a coordinated pipeline, CIRCLE produces systematic knowledge: evidence that is comparable across sites yet sensitive to local context. This can enable governance based on materialized downstream effects rather than theoretical capabilities.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出CIRCLE框架，通过六阶段生命周期方法弥合AI模型性能指标与实际部署结果之间的差距。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究旨在解决AI评估与实际应用脱节的问题，现有框架如MLOps关注系统稳定性，基准测试衡量抽象能力，但决策者缺乏AI在真实世界用户可变性和约束下行为的系统证据，导致评估不足。
light_analysis.method: CIRCLE框架采用六阶段、生命周期为基础的结构，将利益相关者的定性关注转化为可测量的定量信号，并整合现场测试、红队测试和纵向研究等方法，形成结构化、前瞻性的协议，强调连接上下文敏感见解与可扩展指标。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体性能指标或实验数据。框架旨在生成系统知识，提供可跨站点比较但敏感于本地上下文的证据，从而支持基于实际下游效应的治理，与现有方法相比强调了真实世界验证。
light_analysis.conclusion: CIRCLE框架的主要贡献是提供了评估AI实际效果的新方法，操作化TEVV的验证阶段，学术价值在于推进评估理论，实际应用价值在于促进基于证据的决策和治理，未来工作可能涉及框架优化和应用扩展。

title: APPO: Attention-guided Perception Policy Optimization for Video Reasoning
abstract: Complex video reasoning, actually, relies excessively on fine-grained perception rather than on expert (e.g., Ph.D, Science)-level reasoning. Through extensive empirical observation, we have recognized the critical impact of perception. In particular, when perception ability is almost fixed, enhancing reasoning from Qwen3-8B to OpenAI-o3 yields only 0.7% performance improvement. Conversely, even minimal change in perception model scale (from 7B to 32B) boosts performance by 1.4%, indicating enhancing perception, rather than reasoning, is more critical to improve performance. Therefore, exploring how to enhance perception ability through reasoning without the need for expensive fine-grained annotation information is worthwhile. To achieve this goal, we specially propose APPO, the Attention-guided Perception Policy Optimization algorithm that leverages token-level dense rewards to improve model's fine-grained perception. The core idea behind APPO is to optimize those tokens from different responses that primarily focus on the same crucial video frame (called intra-group perception tokens). Experimental results on diverse video benchmarks and models with different scales (3/7B) demonstrate APPO consistently outperforms GRPO and DAPO (0.5%~4%). We hope our work provides a promising approach to effectively enhance model's perception abilities through reasoning in a low-cost manner, serving diverse scenarios and demands.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了APPO（注意力引导的感知策略优化）算法，通过利用令牌级密集奖励优化组内感知令牌，增强视频推理中的细粒度感知能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 复杂视频推理任务过度依赖细粒度感知而非专家级推理。研究发现，当感知能力固定时，提升推理模型（如从Qwen3-8B到OpenAI-o3）仅带来0.7%的性能改进；相反，感知模型规模的微小变化（从7B到32B）能提升1.4%，表明增强感知能力比推理能力更关键。然而，传统方法需要昂贵的细粒度标注信息，因此本研究旨在探索如何通过推理低成本提升感知能力，解决现有方法在标注成本和效率上的不足。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出了APPO算法，即注意力引导的感知策略优化。该算法基于注意力机制识别不同响应中主要关注同一关键视频帧的令牌（称为组内感知令牌），并通过策略优化技术，使用令牌级密集奖励来优化这些令牌，从而提升模型的细粒度感知。方法的核心创新在于结合注意力指导和强化学习，在无需额外标注的情况下，通过推理过程自适应地改进感知能力，适用于不同规模的模型架构。
light_analysis.result: 实验在多种视频基准测试和不同规模模型（如3B和7B）上进行。结果显示，APPO consistently 优于基线方法GRPO和DAPO，性能提升范围在0.5%到4%之间。具体而言，APPO在视频推理任务中表现出稳定的优势，验证了其通过优化感知令牌有效增强模型性能的能力，与基线方法相比具有显著的改进效果。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文的主要贡献是提出了APPO算法，为低成本增强模型感知能力提供了一种新方法。研究强调了感知在视频推理中的核心作用，并通过注意力引导的策略优化展示了实际应用价值，可服务于自动驾驶、视频监控等多样化场景。学术上，该方法为感知-推理交互机制提供了新思路。未来工作可能包括扩展到其他模态任务或探索更大规模模型的适用性，以进一步验证方法的泛化能力。

title: 3D Modality-Aware Pre-training for Vision-Language Model in MRI Multi-organ Abnormality Detection
abstract: Vision-language models (VLMs) show strong potential for complex diagnostic tasks in medical imaging. However, applying VLMs to multi-organ medical imaging introduces two principal challenges: (1) modality-specific vision-language alignment and (2) cross-modal feature fusion. In this work, we propose MedMAP, a Medical Modality-Aware Pretraining framework that enhances vision-language representation learning in 3D MRI. MedMAP comprises a modality-aware vision-language alignment stage and a fine-tuning stage for multi-organ abnormality detection. During the pre-training stage, the modality-aware encoders implicitly capture the joint modality distribution and improve alignment between visual and textual representations. We then fine-tune the pre-trained vision encoders (while keeping the text encoder frozen) for downstream tasks. To this end, we curated MedMoM-MRI3D, comprising 7,392 3D MRI volume-report pairs spanning twelve MRI modalities and nine abnormalities tailored for various 3D medical analysis tasks. Extensive experiments on MedMoM-MRI3D demonstrate that MedMAP significantly outperforms existing VLMs in 3D MRI-based multi-organ abnormality detection. Our code is available at https://github.com/RomantiDr/MedMAP.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MedMAP框架，通过模态感知预训练增强3D MRI视觉-语言表示学习，显著提升多器官异常检测性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 视觉-语言模型在医疗成像中具有潜力，但应用于多器官医学成像面临两个关键挑战：模态特定的视觉-语言对齐和跨模态特征融合。这些问题导致现有方法在复杂诊断任务中表现不足，影响多器官异常检测的准确性和可靠性，因此需开发新框架以改进对齐与融合。摘要未明确说明具体不足细节，但强调了解决这些挑战对提高医疗成像应用的重要性。
light_analysis.method: 本研究提出MedMAP框架，包括模态感知预训练和微调两个阶段。在预训练阶段，通过模态感知编码器隐式捕获MRI模态的联合分布，以增强视觉与文本表示的对齐。微调阶段则冻结文本编码器，仅对视觉编码器进行优化以适应下游任务。此外，构建了MedMoM-MRI3D数据集，包含7,392对3D MRI体积报告对，覆盖12个MRI模态和9种异常，专门用于3D医疗分析。关键创新在于模态感知对齐机制，有效解决了多模态融合问题。
light_analysis.result: 在MedMoM-MRI3D数据集上的广泛实验表明，MedMAP在3D MRI多器官异常检测任务中显著优于现有视觉-语言模型。具体性能指标（如准确率或效率改进）摘要未明确说明，但论文强调了其在提升检测效果方面的优越性，并与基线方法进行了对比，证实了框架的有效性。结果突出了MedMAP在解决模态对齐和融合挑战方面的进步。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提出MedMAP框架，通过模态感知预训练改进3D MRI视觉-语言表示学习，有效解决了多器官异常检测中的模态对齐与融合问题。其学术价值在于推动了视觉-语言模型在医疗领域的应用，实际应用价值体现在提高诊断准确性和效率。未来工作方向（如扩展到其他成像模态或任务）摘要未明确说明，但暗示了潜在的应用扩展空间。

title: FlexGuard: Continuous Risk Scoring for Strictness-Adaptive LLM Content Moderation
abstract: Ensuring the safety of LLM-generated content is essential for real-world deployment. Most existing guardrail models formulate moderation as a fixed binary classification task, implicitly assuming a fixed definition of harmfulness. In practice, enforcement strictness - how conservatively harmfulness is defined and enforced - varies across platforms and evolves over time, making binary moderators brittle under shifting requirements. We first introduce FlexBench, a strictness-adaptive LLM moderation benchmark that enables controlled evaluation under multiple strictness regimes. Experiments on FlexBench reveal substantial cross-strictness inconsistency in existing moderators: models that perform well under one regime can degrade substantially under others, limiting their practical usability. To address this, we propose FlexGuard, an LLM-based moderator that outputs a calibrated continuous risk score reflecting risk severity and supports strictness-specific decisions via thresholding. We train FlexGuard via risk-alignment optimization to improve score-severity consistency and provide practical threshold selection strategies to adapt to target strictness at deployment. Experiments on FlexBench and public benchmarks demonstrate that FlexGuard achieves higher moderation accuracy and substantially improved robustness under varying strictness. We release the source code and data to support reproducibility.

light_analysis.overview: 该论文提出FlexGuard，一个基于大语言模型的审核系统，通过连续风险评分实现严格性自适应的内容审核。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM生成内容的安全性对实际部署至关重要。现有审核方法通常将内容审核视为固定二元分类任务，假设有害性定义固定不变。然而，在现实应用中，不同平台和不同时期对有害性的定义和执行严格性变化频繁，导致二元审核器在需求变化时表现脆弱、不稳健。这使得现有方法无法适应多样化严格性要求，限制了其在实际部署中的可用性和可靠性，因此需要一种能动态调整严格性的解决方案。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出了FlexGuard，一种基于大语言模型的审核器，输出校准的连续风险评分以反映风险严重程度。核心方法包括风险对齐优化训练，通过优化评分与严重性之间的一致性来提高模型性能，并提供阈值选择策略，使审核决策能根据目标严格性灵活调整。此外，引入了FlexBench基准，这是一个严格性自适应基准，支持在多种严格性制度下进行受控评估，为模型训练和测试提供了数据支持。
light_analysis.result: 实验在FlexBench和公共基准上进行，结果显示FlexGuard相比现有基线方法实现了更高的审核准确性，并在变化严格性下表现出显著改进的鲁棒性。具体而言，FlexGuard减少了跨严格性不一致性，使模型在不同严格性制度下的性能更稳定，而现有二元审核器则在严格性变化时性能大幅下降。摘要未明确说明具体性能指标数值，但强调了其综合性能的优越性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究的主要贡献在于开发了FlexGuard系统和FlexBench基准，提升了LLM内容审核的准确性和严格性自适应能力。学术上，它强调了连续风险评分在审核任务中的重要性；实际上，为不同平台提供了可配置的审核工具，支持灵活部署。潜在的局限性可能包括对计算资源的需求或泛化到未见过场景的挑战，未来工作可探索更高效的优化方法或扩展到其他内容安全应用。

title: A Novel Evolutionary Method for Automated Skull-Face Overlay in Computer-Aided Craniofacial Superimposition
abstract: Craniofacial Superimposition is a forensic technique for identifying skeletal remains by comparing a post-mortem skull with ante-mortem facial photographs. A critical step in this process is Skull-Face Overlay (SFO). This stage involves aligning a 3D skull model with a 2D facial image, typically guided by cranial and facial landmarks' correspondence. However, its accuracy is undermined by individual variability in soft-tissue thickness, introducing significant uncertainty into the overlay. This paper introduces Lilium, an automated evolutionary method to enhance the accuracy and robustness of SFO. Lilium explicitly models soft-tissue variability using a 3D cone-based representation whose parameters are optimized via a Differential Evolution algorithm. The method enforces anatomical, morphological, and photographic plausibility through a combination of constraints: landmark matching, camera parameter consistency, head pose alignment, skull containment within facial boundaries, and region parallelism. This emulation of the usual forensic practitioners' approach leads Lilium to outperform the state-of-the-art method in terms of both accuracy and robustness.

light_analysis.overview: Lilium 是一种自动化进化方法，通过使用 3D 锥体表示建模软组织变异性，提升颅面覆盖的准确性和鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 该研究旨在解决颅面叠加中颅面覆盖（SFO）的准确性问题。颅面叠加是法医学中通过比较死后颅骨和生前照片识别遗骸的关键技术，但其准确性受软组织厚度个体变异性的严重影响，引入不确定性。现有方法通常依赖于颅骨和面部地标对应，但软组织变化削弱了对齐精度，因此开发更可靠的方法至关重要。摘要未明确说明其他具体不足，但强调了传统方法易受变异性干扰。
light_analysis.method: Lilium 的核心是一种基于差分进化算法的自动化方法，用于优化颅面覆盖。它采用 3D 锥体表示来明确建模软组织变异性，参数通过差分进化算法优化。关键创新点包括结合多种约束以确保解剖学、形态学和摄影学合理性：地标匹配、相机参数一致性、头部姿态对齐、颅骨包含在面部边界内以及区域平行性。该方法模拟法医从业者的人工方法，无特定数据集或模型架构在摘要中提及，但侧重于算法优化和约束集成。
light_analysis.result: 论文实验显示 Lilium 在准确性和鲁棒性上优于当前最先进方法。摘要未提供具体性能指标（如准确率提升百分比），但强调该方法在多个评估标准中表现更优，通过约束集成减少了软组织变异性带来的不确定性。与基线方法对比，Lilium 实现了更好的对齐效果，但由于摘要信息有限，未详述实验设置或数据支撑。
light_analysis.conclusion: Lilium 的主要贡献是提出了一种自动化进化方法，通过建模软组织变异性显著提高颅面覆盖的准确性和鲁棒性。学术价值在于为计算机辅助法医技术提供了创新优化框架，实际应用可增强法医学中身份识别的可靠性。摘要未明确说明局限性或未来工作，但可推断可能需要进一步验证或扩展到更复杂场景。研究意义在于结合进化算法和3D建模，推动法医自动化发展。

title: A Penalty Approach for Differentiation Through Black-Box Quadratic Programming Solvers
abstract: Differentiating through the solution of a quadratic program (QP) is a central problem in differentiable optimization. Most existing approaches differentiate through the Karush--Kuhn--Tucker (KKT) system, but their computational cost and numerical robustness can degrade at scale. To address these limitations, we propose dXPP, a penalty-based differentiation framework that decouples QP solving from differentiation. In the solving step (forward pass), dXPP is solver-agnostic and can leverage any black-box QP solver. In the differentiation step (backward pass), we map the solution to a smooth approximate penalty problem and implicitly differentiate through it, requiring only the solution of a much smaller linear system in the primal variables. This approach bypasses the difficulties inherent in explicit KKT differentiation and significantly improves computational efficiency and robustness. We evaluate dXPP on various tasks, including randomly generated QPs, large-scale sparse projection problems, and a real-world multi-period portfolio optimization task. Empirical results demonstrate that dXPP is competitive with KKT-based differentiation methods and achieves substantial speedups on large-scale problems. Our implementation is open source and available at https://github.com/mmmmmmlinghu/dXPP.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出了dXPP框架，通过基于惩罚的方法对黑盒二次规划求解器的解进行高效和鲁棒的微分。
light_analysis.motivation: 该研究旨在解决在可微优化中通过二次规划（QP）解进行微分的核心问题。现有方法主要基于Karush-Kuhn-Tucker（KKT）条件的显式微分，但这种方法在大规模问题中面临高计算成本和数值鲁棒性下降的挑战。这些问题影响了微分QP解在各种应用中的实际效果和可扩展性，因此需要开发更高效、更稳定的微分方法，以促进可微优化在机器学习、控制等领域的大规模应用。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出的dXPP框架采用基于惩罚的微分方法。在前向传播阶段，框架与求解器无关，可以灵活使用任何黑盒QP求解器计算QP解。在后向传播阶段，通过将QP解映射到一个平滑近似惩罚问题，并进行隐式微分来计算梯度，这仅需要求解一个规模较小的线性系统，绕过了传统KKT显式微分的复杂性。关键创新在于解耦求解和微分步骤，提高了计算效率和数值鲁棒性，同时保持通用性。
light_analysis.result: 在多种任务上评估了dXPP框架，包括随机生成的QP问题、大规模稀疏投影问题和实际的多期投资组合优化任务。实验结果表明，dXPP与现有基于KKT的微分方法在性能上具有竞争力，并在大规模问题上实现了显著的加速效果。摘要未明确提供具体的准确率或效率提升数据，但强调了dXPP在计算效率和鲁棒性方面的优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是提出dXPP框架，通过惩罚方法实现了对QP解的高效和鲁棒微分。这解决了现有KKT方法在大规模应用中的局限性，提高了可微优化的可扩展性和实用性。研究具有重要的学术价值，为优化算法提供了新思路，并有实际应用潜力，如在投资组合优化等领域。未来工作可能包括将框架扩展到其他优化问题或进一步优化性能。实现已开源，便于推广和改进。

title: Out-of-Support Generalisation via Weight-Space Sequence Modelling
abstract: As breakthroughs in deep learning transform key industries, models are increasingly required to extrapolate on datapoints found outside the range of the training set, a challenge we coin as out-of-support (OoS) generalisation. However, neural networks frequently exhibit catastrophic failure on OoS samples, yielding unrealistic but overconfident predictions. We address this challenge by reformulating the OoS generalisation problem as a sequence modelling task in the weight space, wherein the training set is partitioned into concentric shells corresponding to discrete sequential steps. Our WeightCaster framework yields plausible, interpretable, and uncertainty-aware predictions without necessitating explicit inductive biases, all the while maintaining high computational efficiency. Emprical validation on a synthetic cosine dataset and real-world air quality sensor readings demonstrates performance competitive or superior to the state-of-the-art. By enhancing reliability beyond in-distribution scenarios, these results hold significant implications for the wider adoption of artificial intelligence in safety-critical applications.
comment: Published at the Catch, Adapt, and Operate (CAO): Monitoring ML Models Under Drift workshop at ICLR 2026. Contains 8 pages, 2 figures, 1 table, and 1 algorithm

light_analysis.overview: 提出 WeightCaster 框架，通过权重空间序列建模改进神经网络在训练集范围外的泛化能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着深度学习在关键行业如自动驾驶、医疗等的广泛应用，模型需要在训练集范围外进行泛化，即 out-of-support (OoS) 泛化。然而，神经网络在 OoS 样本上常出现灾难性失败，产生不切实际但过于自信的预测，这严重限制了人工智能在安全关键领域的可靠性。现有方法通常缺乏有效机制来处理 OoS 问题，导致模型泛化能力不足，因此亟需新的方法以提高预测的准确性和不确定性感知能力。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出 WeightCaster 框架，通过将 out-of-support 泛化问题重新表述为权重空间序列建模任务来解决这一挑战。核心方法是将训练集划分为同心壳层，对应离散序列步骤，以建模权重空间的动态变化。该框架无需显式归纳偏置，能够生成合理、可解释且不确定性感知的预测，同时保持了高计算效率。技术特色包括基于序列建模的权重空间外推和不确定性量化，从而在避免过拟合的同时提升泛化性能。
light_analysis.result: 通过实验验证，WeightCaster 框架在合成余弦数据集和真实世界的空气质量传感器读数上表现出与最先进方法相当或更优的性能。实验结果表明，该方法能有效提升模型在 out-of-support 样本上的泛化能力，产生更可靠的预测。虽然摘要未明确提供具体准确率数字，但强调了其性能具有竞争力，且在合成和真实数据集中均展现出显著的改进，有助于减少灾难性失败并增强预测的可信度。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究提出 WeightCaster 框架，通过权重空间序列建模成功应对了 out-of-support 泛化挑战，提高了神经网络的可靠性和不确定性感知能力。这一贡献在学术上为深度学习泛化问题提供了新的建模视角，有助于推动序列建模技术在权重空间的应用。在实际应用中，可促进人工智能在安全关键领域如医疗诊断和自动驾驶的更广泛部署。未来工作可探索在不同场景下的应用和优化，以增强方法的普适性和鲁棒性，摘要未明确说明具体局限性。

title: VideoTemp-o3: Harmonizing Temporal Grounding and Video Understanding in Agentic Thinking-with-Videos
abstract: In long-video understanding, conventional uniform frame sampling often fails to capture key visual evidence, leading to degraded performance and increased hallucinations. To address this, recent agentic thinking-with-videos paradigms have emerged, adopting a localize-clip-answer pipeline in which the model actively identifies relevant video segments, performs dense sampling within those clips, and then produces answers. However, existing methods remain inefficient, suffer from weak localization, and adhere to rigid workflows. To solve these issues, we propose VideoTemp-o3, a unified agentic thinking-with-videos framework that jointly models video grounding and question answering. VideoTemp-o3 exhibits strong localization capability, supports on-demand clipping, and can refine inaccurate localizations. Specifically, in the supervised fine-tuning stage, we design a unified masking mechanism that encourages exploration while preventing noise. For reinforcement learning, we introduce dedicated rewards to mitigate reward hacking. Besides, from the data perspective, we develop an effective pipeline to construct high-quality long video grounded QA data, along with a corresponding benchmark for systematic evaluation across various video durations. Experimental results demonstrate that our method achieves remarkable performance on both long video understanding and grounding.

light_analysis.overview: VideoTemp-o3框架通过联合建模视频时间定位和问题回答，提升长视频理解和定位性能，解决现有方法的效率低和定位弱问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 长视频理解中，传统均匀帧采样方法常无法捕捉关键视觉证据，导致性能下降和幻觉增加。现有代理思维视频范式采用定位-裁剪-回答流程，但效率低下、定位能力弱、工作流程僵化，限制了长视频分析的准确性。因此，本研究旨在开发一种更有效的方法来协调时间定位和视频理解，以应对这些挑战并改进实际应用中的视频处理任务。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出VideoTemp-o3，一个统一的代理思维视频框架，联合建模视频时间定位和问题回答。在监督微调阶段，设计统一掩码机制，鼓励模型探索相关视频段同时防止噪声干扰；在强化学习阶段，引入专用奖励以减轻奖励黑客问题。此外，开发了高质量长视频定位问答数据构建管道，并建立了一个基准进行系统评估，支持按需裁剪和定位细化功能，模型架构基于代理思维范式，但摘要未明确说明具体细节。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，VideoTemp-o3在长视频理解和时间定位任务上取得了显著的性能提升，优于现有基线方法。具体性能指标在论文中详细报告，但摘要未明确说明具体数值，如准确率或效率改进数据，仅表明在多种视频持续时间下展现出优异表现。
light_analysis.conclusion: VideoTemp-o3框架成功协调时间定位和视频理解，提高了长视频分析的准确性和效率。其学术价值在于推动了代理思维视频方法的发展，实际应用价值包括增强视频内容理解和自动化问答系统。局限性可能包括计算资源需求或特定场景适应性，未来工作可进一步优化框架并扩展到更多视频类型和任务。

title: Can LLMs Discern the Traits Influencing Your Preferences? Evaluating Personality-Driven Preference Alignment in LLMs
abstract: User preferences are increasingly used to personalize Large Language Model (LLM) responses, yet how to reliably leverage preference signals for answer generation remains under-explored. In practice, preferences can be noisy, incomplete, or even misleading, which can degrade answer quality when applied naively. Motivated by the observation that stable personality traits shape everyday preferences, we study personality as a principled ''latent'' signal behind preference statements. Through extensive experiments, we find that conditioning on personality-aligned preferences substantially improves personalized question answering: selecting preferences consistent with a user's inferred personality increases answer-choice accuracy from 29.25% to 76%, compared to using randomly selected preferences. Based on these findings, we introduce PACIFIC (Preference Alignment Choices Inference for Five-factor Identity Characterization), a personality-labeled preference dataset containing 1200 preference statements spanning diverse domains (e.g., travel, movies, education), annotated with Big-Five (OCEAN) trait directions. Finally, we propose a framework that enables an LLM model to automatically retrieve personality-aligned preferences and incorporate them during answer generation.

light_analysis.overview: 本研究提出了人格驱动偏好对齐方法，通过引入人格标注数据集和自动检索框架，显著提升了大型语言模型个性化问答的准确率。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着用户偏好被越来越多地用于个性化大型语言模型的响应，如何可靠地利用这些偏好信号进行答案生成仍是一个未充分探索的课题。在实践中，偏好可能因噪声、不完整甚至误导而降低答案质量。动机在于观察稳定的人格特质如何影响日常偏好，因此将人格作为偏好陈述背后的原则性潜在信号进行研究，以解决现有偏好处理方法中不可靠的问题，并提升个性化响应的准确性。
light_analysis.method: 本研究的方法基于人格特质作为偏好的潜在信号。首先，引入了一个名为PACIFIC的人格标注偏好数据集，该数据集包含1200条跨越不同领域（如旅行、电影、教育）的偏好陈述，并标注了Big-Five（OCEAN）特质方向。其次，提出了一个框架，使大型语言模型能够自动检索与用户推断人格一致的偏好，并在答案生成过程中加以整合。该方法的关键创新点在于利用人格驱动的偏好对齐来增强个性化响应，弥补了传统方法中偏好信号的不足。
light_analysis.result: 通过广泛的实验，本研究发现基于人格对齐偏好的条件化能大幅提升个性化问题回答的性能。具体而言，选择与用户推断人格一致的偏好时，答案选择准确率从使用随机选择偏好的29.25%提高到76%，显示出超过两倍的提升。这一结果验证了人格作为可靠信号的有效性，并提供了与基线方法对比的实证支持，表明人格驱动偏好对齐在解决偏好噪声和不完整性方面具有显著优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的结论在于，人格特质可以作为稳定、可靠的潜在信号来对齐用户偏好，从而显著提升大型语言模型的个性化问答性能。主要贡献包括引入了PACIFIC数据集和一个自动检索框架，为后续研究提供了资源和方法基础。学术价值在于探索人格驱动偏好对齐的新途径，实际应用价值在于增强LLM的个性化响应能力，提升用户体验。尽管摘要未明确说明局限性，但未来工作可扩展数据集或优化框架以进一步提升性能。

title: Curriculum Learning for Efficient Chain-of-Thought Distillation via Structure-Aware Masking and GRPO
abstract: Distilling Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning from large language models into compact student models presents a fundamental challenge: teacher rationales are often too verbose for smaller models to faithfully reproduce. Existing approaches either compress reasoning into single-step, losing the interpretability that makes CoT valuable. We present a three-stage curriculum learning framework that addresses this capacity mismatch through progressive skill acquisition. First, we establish structural understanding via masked shuffled reconstruction. Second, we apply Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) on masked completion tasks, enabling the model to discover its own balance between accuracy and brevity. Third, we identify persistent failure cases and guide the student to internalize teacher knowledge through targeted rewriting, again optimized with GRPO. Experiments on GSM8K demonstrate that our approach enables Qwen2.5-3B-Base to achieve an 11.29 percent accuracy improvement while reducing output length by 27.4 percent, surpassing both instruction-tuned variants and prior distillation methods.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出一个三阶段课程学习框架，通过结构感知掩码和GRPO技术，有效将大型语言模型的Chain-of-Thought推理提炼到紧凑学生模型中，显著提升准确性和减少输出长度。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究旨在解决将Chain-of-Thought推理从大型语言模型蒸馏到紧凑学生模型时的核心问题：教师理由通常过于冗长，导致学生模型难以忠实复制，这损害了CoT的可解释性和实用性。现有方法要么将推理压缩为单步，失去可解释性，要么无法有效处理容量不匹配，限制了小模型的推理能力。这一问题的重要性在于CoT推理对模型透明度和可靠性至关重要，尤其在资源受限的应用场景中，现有方法不足推动了对更高效蒸馏技术的需求。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出一个三阶段课程学习框架来解决容量不匹配。第一阶段通过掩码洗牌重建任务帮助学生模型建立对CoT结构的理解；第二阶段应用Group Relative Policy Optimization（GRPO）在掩码完成任务上，优化模型在准确性和简洁性之间的平衡；第三阶段识别持续失败案例，引导学生通过有针对性的改写内化教师知识，并再次用GRPO优化。关键创新点包括渐进式技能获取、结构感知掩码和强化学习的结合。实验使用GSM8K数据集和Qwen2.5-3B-Base模型，突出了方法的技术特色。
light_analysis.result: 在GSM8K数据集上的实验结果显示，该方法使Qwen2.5-3B-Base模型的准确率提高了11.29%，同时输出长度减少了27.4%。这些性能指标超越了指令调优的变体和先前的蒸馏方法，展示了方法在提升推理效率和保持可解释性方面的优势。具体数据支撑包括准确率提升和长度减少的量化对比，表明该方法能有效解决容量不匹配问题，并为小模型提供了更强的性能表现。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文的主要贡献是开发了一种高效的CoT蒸馏框架，成功解决了从大模型到小模型推理提炼中的容量不匹配问题，显著提升了准确性和效率。研究的学术价值在于推动了课程学习和强化学习在自然语言处理中的应用，实际价值在于为资源受限环境部署智能模型提供了可行方案。潜在的局限性或未来工作方向摘要未明确说明，但可推断可能包括扩展到其他数据集或任务，以及进一步优化方法以处理更复杂的推理场景。

title: MLV-Edit: Towards Consistent and Highly Efficient Editing for Minute-Level Videos
abstract: We propose MLV-Edit, a training-free, flow-based framework that address the unique challenges of minute-level video editing. While existing techniques excel in short-form video manipulation, scaling them to long-duration videos remains challenging due to prohibitive computational overhead and the difficulty of maintaining global temporal consistency across thousands of frames. To address this, MLV-Edit employs a divide-and-conquer strategy for segment-wise editing, facilitated by two core modules: Velocity Blend rectifies motion inconsistencies at segment boundaries by aligning the flow fields of adjacent chunks, eliminating flickering and boundary artifacts commonly observed in fragmented video processing; and Attention Sink anchors local segment features to global reference frames, effectively suppressing cumulative structural drift. Extensive quantitative and qualitative experiments demonstrate that MLV-Edit consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods in terms of temporal stability and semantic fidelity.

light_analysis.overview: MLV-Edit 是一个无训练的、基于流的框架，旨在高效编辑分钟级视频，解决长视频的全局一致性问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有视频编辑技术在短视频上表现良好，但扩展到分钟级长视频时面临重大挑战。主要问题包括计算开销过大，处理数千帧资源需求高，且难以维持全局时间一致性，导致闪烁和结构漂移。随着长视频内容需求的增长，开发高效且一致的编辑方法变得至关重要，而现有方法缺乏有效处理长视频的策略，因此迫切需要创新解决方案来克服这些不足。
light_analysis.method: MLV-Edit 采用分而治之的策略，将长视频分割成段进行编辑，以降低计算复杂度。核心模块包括 Velocity Blend 和 Attention Sink：Velocity Blend 通过对齐相邻视频段的流场来纠正运动不一致，有效消除边界闪烁和伪影；Attention Sink 则将局部段特征锚定到全局参考帧上，抑制累积结构漂移，保持整体一致性。该方法基于流技术，无需训练，直接应用于视频编辑，提高了处理效率。虽然摘要未明确说明具体数据集或模型架构，但框架设计侧重于流处理和注意力机制的集成。
light_analysis.result: 通过广泛的定量和定性实验，MLV-Edit 在时间稳定性和语义保真度方面一致优于当前最先进的方法。实验表明，该方法在编辑分钟级视频时能显著减少闪烁和边界伪影，同时保持编辑内容的语义一致性。虽然摘要未提供具体的性能指标数据，但强调其在时间一致性方面的优势，展示了与基线方法对比的改进效果，证明了其处理长视频的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: MLV-Edit 的主要贡献是提出一个无训练的、基于流的框架，有效解决了分钟级视频编辑中的全局一致性问题，推动了长视频处理技术的学术发展。实际应用价值在于提高了视频编辑的效率和质量，适用于影视制作和内容创作等领域。摘要未明确说明局限性或未来工作方向，但潜在方向可能包括扩展到更复杂编辑任务或进一步优化计算性能。

title: SwiftRepertoire: Few-Shot Immune-Signature Synthesis via Dynamic Kernel Codes
abstract: Repertoire-level analysis of T cell receptors offers a biologically grounded signal for disease detection and immune monitoring, yet practical deployment is impeded by label sparsity, cohort heterogeneity, and the computational burden of adapting large encoders to new tasks. We introduce a framework that synthesizes compact task-specific parameterizations from a learned dictionary of prototypes conditioned on lightweight task descriptors derived from repertoire probes and pooled embedding statistics. This synthesis produces small adapter modules applied to a frozen pretrained backbone, enabling immediate adaptation to novel tasks with only a handful of support examples and without full model fine-tuning. The architecture preserves interpretability through motif-aware probes and a calibrated motif discovery pipeline that links predictive decisions to sequence-level signals. Together, these components yield a practical, sample-efficient, and interpretable pathway for translating repertoire-informed models into diverse clinical and research settings where labeled data are scarce and computational resources are constrained.

light_analysis.overview: 提出了SwiftRepertoire框架，通过动态内核代码合成紧凑任务特定参数化，实现少样本T细胞受体库分析的快速适应和可解释性提升。
light_analysis.motivation: T细胞受体库水平分析为疾病检测和免疫监控提供了生物学基础信号，但实际部署面临标签稀疏性、群组异质性和计算负担等挑战。现有方法在适应新任务时通常需要大量标记数据和完整的模型微调，这在临床和研究环境中不可行，因为数据稀缺且计算资源有限，阻碍了模型的广泛落地。因此，本研究旨在开发一种样本高效、计算轻量的解决方案，以应对这些实际约束。
light_analysis.method: 论文引入一个框架，通过学习原型的字典来合成紧凑的任务特定参数化，这些参数化基于从库探针和池化嵌入统计派生的轻量级任务描述符。合成的参数化生成小型适配器模块，直接应用于冻结的预训练主干网络，无需完整微调即可快速适应新任务，仅需少数支持样本。关键创新包括动态内核代码合成、适配器模块设计以及通过模体感知探针和校准的模体发现流程保持可解释性，将预测决策链接到序列级信号。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体实验数据如准确率或效率改进。基于摘要推断，该方法在少样本设置下实现了高效适应，通过合成紧凑参数化减少计算负担，提高了样本利用率和模型可解释性。可能通过实验验证了框架的实用性和性能，但具体性能指标与基线方法的对比数据未在摘要中提及。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究的主要贡献是提供了一个实用、样本高效且可解释的途径，用于将T细胞受体库信息模型转化为临床和研究环境中的部署，解决了数据稀缺和计算资源约束下的挑战。学术价值在于推动了少样本学习和适配器技术在生物序列分析中的应用，实际应用价值体现在促进免疫签名分析的广泛落地。未来工作可能包括扩展到其他生物医学领域或进一步优化适配器模块以增强泛化能力。

title: On the Relationship Between Representation Geometry and Generalization in Deep Neural Networks
abstract: We investigate the relationship between representation geometry and neural network performance. Analyzing 52 pretrained ImageNet models across 13 architecture families, we show that effective dimension -- an unsupervised geometric metric -- strongly predicts accuracy. Output effective dimension achieves partial r=0.75 ($p < 10^(-10)$) after controlling for model capacity, while total compression achieves partial r=-0.72. These findings replicate across ImageNet and CIFAR-10, and generalize to NLP: effective dimension predicts performance for 8 encoder models on SST-2/MNLI and 15 decoder-only LLMs on AG News (r=0.69, p=0.004), while model size does not (r=0.07). We establish bidirectional causality: degrading geometry via noise causes accuracy loss (r=-0.94, $p < 10^(-9)$), while improving geometry via PCA maintains accuracy across architectures (-0.03pp at 95% variance). This relationship is noise-type agnostic -- Gaussian, Uniform, Dropout, and Salt-and-pepper noise all show $|r| > 0.90$. These results establish that effective dimension provides domain-agnostic predictive and causal information about neural network performance, computed entirely without labels.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出有效维度作为无监督几何度量，能强预测和因果解释深度神经网络的泛化性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 本研究旨在探究表示几何与神经网络泛化之间的关系。传统指标如模型大小在预测性能时效果有限（模型大小与准确性相关系数仅为0.07），因此需要寻找更有效的无监督度量来理解网络如何泛化。通过分析几何特性，如有效维度，可以揭示性能背后的内在机制，并为模型评估和设计提供新见解，弥补现有方法在预测准确性方面的不足。
light_analysis.method: 研究采用大规模模型分析，包括52个预训练的ImageNet模型（覆盖13种架构族），计算有效维度和总压缩等无监督几何度量。使用统计相关分析（如相关系数）评估这些度量与准确性的关系，并进行因果关系实验，通过噪声注入（如高斯、均匀、Dropout、盐和胡椒噪声）和PCA（主成分分析）验证几何变化对性能的影响。关键创新在于跨领域验证（CV和NLP）和建立双向因果联系。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，输出有效维度与准确性在控制模型容量后达到部分相关系数r=0.75（p<10^(-10)），总压缩为r=-0.72。这些发现在ImageNet和CIFAR-10上一致，并泛化到NLP任务（如SST-2/MNLI和AG News），相关系数r=0.69（p=0.004）。因果关系实验表明，噪声降解几何导致准确性损失（r=-0.94, p<10^(-9)），而PCA改善几何能在95%方差下保持准确性（仅下降0.03个百分点）。噪声类型无关性显示所有测试噪声类型|r| > 0.90。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是确立有效维度为领域无关的预测和因果度量，可用于评估神经网络性能而无须标签。这项研究增强了理解泛化机制，具有学术价值，并可能应用于模型选择、压缩和鲁棒性分析。未来工作可探索更多几何度量或扩展到其他任务，局限性方面摘要未明确说明，但可能包括度量的计算复杂度。

title: Quantization-Aware Distillation for NVFP4 Inference Accuracy Recovery
abstract: This technical report presents quantization-aware distillation (QAD) and our best practices for recovering accuracy of NVFP4-quantized large language models (LLMs) and vision-language models (VLMs). QAD distills a full-precision teacher model into a quantized student model using a KL divergence loss. While applying distillation to quantized models is not a new idea, we observe key advantages of QAD for today's LLMs: 1. It shows remarkable effectiveness and stability for models trained through multi-stage post-training pipelines, including supervised fine-tuning (SFT), reinforcement learning (RL), and model merging, where traditional quantization-aware training (QAT) suffers from engineering complexity and training instability; 2. It is robust to data quality and coverage, enabling accuracy recovery without full training data. We evaluate QAD across multiple post-trained models including AceReason Nemotron, Nemotron 3 Nano, Nemotron Nano V2, Nemotron Nano V2 VL (VLM), and Llama Nemotron Super v1, showing consistent recovery to near-BF16 accuracy.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出量化感知蒸馏方法，有效恢复NVFP4量化大型语言模型和视觉语言模型的推理精度，尤其适用于多阶段后训练场景。
light_analysis.motivation: 量化技术如NVFP4能提升模型推理效率，但常导致精度损失。现有量化感知训练在处理多阶段后训练模型（如监督微调、强化学习和模型合并）时，存在工程复杂性和训练不稳定性问题，且依赖高质量完整数据。因此，需要一种更稳定、对数据要求低的方法来有效恢复量化模型的精度，以支持高效模型部署。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出量化感知蒸馏方法，通过KL散度损失将全精度教师模型的知识蒸馏到NVFP4量化的学生模型中。该方法针对大型语言模型和视觉语言模型设计，特别适用于经过多阶段后训练流程的模型，避免了传统量化感知训练的复杂工程和不稳定训练过程。关键创新在于结合蒸馏技术处理量化模型的精度恢复问题。
light_analysis.result: 实验评估了多个后训练模型，包括AceReason Nemotron、Nemotron 3 Nano等。结果表明，量化感知蒸馏能一致地恢复NVFP4量化模型的精度至接近BF16全精度水平，相比传统量化感知训练，在工程复杂性和训练稳定性方面表现更优，且无需完整训练数据即可实现精度恢复。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究提出的量化感知蒸馏方法显著改进了量化模型的精度恢复，特别适用于复杂后训练场景，具有较高的学术价值和实际应用潜力，有助于部署高效语言模型。未来工作可探索该方法在其他量化格式或模型类型上的扩展应用，摘要未明确说明具体局限性。

title: Data-Driven Conditional Flexibility Index
abstract: With the increasing flexibilization of processes, determining robust scheduling decisions has become an important goal. Traditionally, the flexibility index has been used to identify safe operating schedules by approximating the admissible uncertainty region using simple admissible uncertainty sets, such as hypercubes. Presently, available contextual information, such as forecasts, has not been considered to define the admissible uncertainty set when determining the flexibility index. We propose the conditional flexibility index (CFI), which extends the traditional flexibility index in two ways: by learning the parametrized admissible uncertainty set from historical data and by using contextual information to make the admissible uncertainty set conditional. This is achieved using a normalizing flow that learns a bijective mapping from a Gaussian base distribution to the data distribution. The admissible latent uncertainty set is constructed as a hypersphere in the latent space and mapped to the data space. By incorporating contextual information, the CFI provides a more informative estimate of flexibility by defining admissible uncertainty sets in regions that are more likely to be relevant under given conditions. Using an illustrative example, we show that no general statement can be made about data-driven admissible uncertainty sets outperforming simple sets, or conditional sets outperforming unconditional ones. However, both data-driven and conditional admissible uncertainty sets ensure that only regions of the uncertain parameter space containing realizations are considered. We apply the CFI to a security-constrained unit commitment example and demonstrate that the CFI can improve scheduling quality by incorporating temporal information.
comment: manuscript (49 pages, 17 figures), supplementary material (8 pages, 1 figure, 2 tables)

light_analysis.overview: 本论文提出条件灵活性指数（CFI），通过数据驱动和上下文条件化扩展传统灵活性指数，以改进不确定性下的调度决策。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着工业过程灵活性的增加，确定鲁棒的调度决策变得日益重要。传统灵活性指数使用简单可接受不确定性集（如超立方体）来近似不确定性区域，但未考虑上下文信息（如预测）来定义条件化集合，导致灵活性估计可能不够精确，无法有效应对实际中更可能发生的不确定性场景，从而限制了调度决策的优化潜力。
light_analysis.method: 本研究提出条件灵活性指数（CFI），通过从历史数据学习参数化的可接受不确定性集，并结合上下文信息使其条件化。关键创新在于使用归一化流（normalizing flow）学习从高斯基础分布到数据分布的双射映射，在潜在空间中构建超球体作为可接受不确定性集，然后映射到数据空间。这种方法允许生成更符合实际数据分布的条件化不确定性集，从而提高灵活性估计的信息含量。
light_analysis.result: 通过一个说明性例子，论文表明不能一般性地断言数据驱动可接受不确定性集优于简单集，或条件集优于无条件集。然而，数据驱动和条件化方法均确保只考虑参数空间中包含实际实现的相关区域，从而提高了适用性。在安全约束的单元承诺应用中，CFI 整合时间信息，有效提升了调度质量，展示了其在现实场景中的改进效果。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本论文的主要贡献是提出了条件灵活性指数（CFI），它通过数据驱动和上下文条件化，提供了更信息化的灵活性估计。这有助于在不确定性下做出更鲁棒的调度决策，具有显著的学术和实际应用价值，例如改善能源调度系统的性能。局限性在于不能保证在所有情况下数据驱动集都优于传统方法，未来工作可扩展该方法到更复杂或不均匀的数据分布场景。

title: Graph Recognition via Subgraph Prediction
abstract: Despite tremendous improvements in tasks such as image classification, object detection, and segmentation, the recognition of visual relationships, commonly modeled as the extraction of a graph from an image, remains a challenging task. We believe that this mainly stems from the fact that there is no canonical way to approach the visual graph recognition task. Most existing solutions are specific to a problem and cannot be transferred between different contexts out-of-the box, even though the conceptual problem remains the same. With broad applicability and simplicity in mind, in this paper we develop a method, \textbf{Gra}ph Recognition via \textbf{S}ubgraph \textbf{P}rediction (\textbf{GraSP}), for recognizing graphs in images. We show across several synthetic benchmarks and one real-world application that our method works with a set of diverse types of graphs and their drawings, and can be transferred between tasks without task-specific modifications, paving the way to a more unified framework for visual graph recognition.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出了基于子图预测的图识别方法GraSP，旨在提供广泛适用且可转移的视觉图识别统一框架。
light_analysis.motivation: 视觉关系识别是计算机视觉中的关键任务，通常通过从图像中提取图结构来建模。然而，现有方法大多针对特定问题设计，缺乏标准方法，导致无法在不同上下文之间直接转移，即使概念问题相同。这限制了框架的统一性和实际应用的灵活性，论文旨在解决这一不足，开发一个更通用的方法以提升可转移性和广泛适用性。
light_analysis.method: 论文开发了GraSP（Graph Recognition via Subgraph Prediction）方法，通过预测子图来识别图像中的图结构。该方法将图识别任务分解为子图预测问题，允许模型适应不同类型的图及其绘制方式，无需任务特定修改。关键创新点在于提供一种简洁的框架，将复杂任务简化以提高可扩展性和跨领域应用能力。摘要未明确说明具体数据集或模型架构细节。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，GraSP方法在多个合成基准测试和一个真实世界应用中有效工作。它能够处理多样化的图类型及其绘制，并且在任务间转移时无需调整，展示了良好的泛化性能。摘要未提供具体性能数据如准确率提升，但强调了与基线方法相比的可转移性优势，表明该方法为视觉图识别提供了更统一的解决方案。
light_analysis.conclusion: GraSP方法的主要贡献在于为视觉图识别提供了一个广泛适用且可转移的框架，促进了该领域的标准化。其学术价值在于简化了复杂任务的处理，实际应用价值体现在跨任务的无缝集成。摘要未明确提及局限性，但未来工作可能包括进一步扩展图类型适应能力或探索更广泛的实验验证，以增强框架的鲁棒性。

title: Hot-Start from Pixels: Low-Resolution Visual Tokens for Chinese Language Modeling
abstract: Large language models typically represent Chinese characters as discrete index-based tokens, largely ignoring their visual form. For logographic scripts, visual structure carries semantic and phonetic information, which may aid prediction. We investigate whether low-resolution visual inputs can serve as an alternative for character-level modeling. Instead of token IDs, our decoder receives grayscale images of individual characters, with resolutions as low as 8 x 8 pixels. Remarkably, these inputs achieve 39.2% accuracy, comparable to the index-based baseline of 39.1%. Such low-resource settings also exhibit a pronounced hot-start effect: by 0.4% of total training, accuracy reaches above 12%, while index-based models lag at below 6%. Overall, our results demonstrate that minimal visual structure can provide a robust and efficient signal for Chinese language modeling, offering an alternative perspective on character representation that complements traditional index-based approaches.

light_analysis.overview: 本研究提出使用低分辨率像素图像作为中文字符的视觉标记，在语言建模中实现与索引方法相当的准确率，并展现出显著的热启动优势。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型通常依赖离散索引标记表示中文字符，完全忽略了其视觉形态。然而，中文字符作为象形文字，视觉结构承载了丰富的语义和语音信息，这可能为预测任务提供额外线索，提升模型效果。现有方法因忽视视觉信息而限制了表达能力和效率，本研究旨在探索低分辨率视觉输入作为替代表示，以解决这一问题并补充传统方法的不足。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出一种新方法，将中文字符表示为低分辨率灰度图像，如8x8像素，作为语言模型的输入替代传统的索引标记。核心创新在于用视觉像素直接捕获字符的视觉结构，以解码器模型接收这些图像进行字符级建模。技术特色在于最小化视觉信息的利用，仅通过低分辨率图像提取关键特征，但摘要未明确说明具体的数据集和模型架构细节。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，使用8x8像素灰度图像作为输入，在中文语言建模任务中达到39.2%的准确率，与传统索引方法的39.1%相当，证明了视觉输入的有效性。此外，在低资源训练设置下，视觉方法展现出显著的热启动效应：仅用总训练的0.4%，准确率就超过12%，而索引方法此时仅为6%以下，表明视觉结构在早期训练阶段提供了更强的信号，提升了学习效率。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献在于证明最小化的视觉结构可以作为中文语言建模的鲁棒且高效信号，为字符表示提供了与索引方法互补的新视角。其学术价值在于拓展了语言模型的输入形式，实际应用价值在于可能提升模型在低资源环境下的训练效率。未来工作可以探索更高分辨率视觉输入或扩展到其他语言，但摘要未明确说明具体局限性和进一步方向。

title: Discrete Solution Operator Learning for Geometry-Dependent PDEs
abstract: Neural operator learning accelerates PDE solution by approximating operators as mappings between continuous function spaces. Yet in many engineering settings, varying geometry induces discrete structural changes, including topological changes, abrupt changes in boundary conditions or boundary types, and changes in the computational domain, which break the smooth-variation premise. Here we introduce Discrete Solution Operator Learning (DiSOL), a complementary paradigm that learns discrete solution procedures rather than continuous function-space operators. DiSOL factorizes the solver into learnable stages that mirror classical discretizations: local contribution encoding, multiscale assembly, and implicit solution reconstruction on an embedded grid, thereby preserving procedure-level consistency while adapting to geometry-dependent discrete structures. Across geometry-dependent Poisson, advection-diffusion, linear elasticity, as well as spatiotemporal heat conduction problems, DiSOL produces stable and accurate predictions under both in-distribution and strongly out-of-distribution geometries, including discontinuous boundaries and topological changes. These results highlight the need for procedural operator representations in geometry-dominated problems and position discrete solution operator learning as a distinct, complementary direction in scientific machine learning.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出离散解操作符学习（DiSOL），通过学习离散解过程而非连续函数空间操作符，有效处理几何依赖的偏微分方程。
light_analysis.motivation: 神经操作符学习通过近似连续函数空间间的映射来加速偏微分方程求解，但实际工程中几何变化会引发离散结构变化，如拓扑变化、边界条件突变或计算域调整，这打破了平滑变化的假设。现有方法在处理这类几何依赖问题时存在不足，因为忽略了离散结构的不连续性，导致在复杂几何设置下性能下降，影响仿真准确性和稳定性。
light_analysis.method: DiSOL 方法分解求解器为可学习阶段，模仿经典离散化过程：首先进行局部贡献编码以捕捉几何信息，然后通过多尺度装配整合不同尺度结构，最后在嵌入式网格上重构隐式解。核心创新在于学习离散解过程而非连续操作符，确保过程级一致性，并适应几何依赖的离散结构变化，如不连续边界和拓扑变化，从而提升泛化能力。
light_analysis.result: 在多种几何依赖的偏微分方程问题中测试，包括 Poisson、对流扩散、线性弹性以及时空热传导问题，DiSOL 显示出稳定和准确的预测性能。无论是在分布内还是强烈分布外的几何设置，如涉及不连续边界或拓扑变化的情况，模型均能保持高精度，有效补充了传统神经操作符方法在几何变化下的局限性，验证了其鲁棒性和适用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究的主要贡献是提出了离散解操作符学习（DiSOL），强调在几何主导问题中过程表示的重要性，为科学机器学习提供了一个独特且互补的方向。其学术价值在于推动操作符学习向离散化方向发展，实际应用则能改进工程仿真中的稳定性和准确性，未来可扩展到更复杂的几何和多物理场问题，以进一步验证方法的通用性。

title: Entropy Sentinel: Continuous LLM Accuracy Monitoring from Decoding Entropy Traces in STEM
abstract: Deploying LLMs raises two coupled challenges: (1) monitoring--estimating where a model underperforms as traffic and domains drift--and (2) improvement--prioritizing data acquisition to close the largest performance gaps. We test whether an inference-time signal can estimate slice-level accuracy under domain shift. For each response, we compute an output-entropy profile from final-layer next-token probabilities (from top-$k$ logprobs) and summarize it with different statistics. A lightweight classifier predicts instance correctness, and averaging predicted probabilities yields a domain-level accuracy estimate. We evaluate on ten STEM reasoning benchmarks with exhaustive train/test compositions ($k\in\{1,2,3,4\}$; all $\binom{10}{k}$ combinations), on different classifier models and features across nine LLMs from six families (3B--20B). Estimates often track held-out benchmark accuracy, and several models show near-monotonic ordering of domains, providing evidence for output-entropy profiles being an accessible signal for scalable monitoring and for targeted data acquisition.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于解码熵迹的连续LLM准确率监控方法，用于STEM领域的领域漂移监控和数据获取优化。
light_analysis.motivation: 部署LLMs面临监控模型在流量和领域漂移下性能不佳的挑战，需要实时评估准确率以优先改进数据获取。现有方法可能缺乏有效的推理时监控手段，该研究旨在测试输出熵信号是否能估计领域漂移下的切片级准确率，提供可扩展的解决方案以缩小性能差距。摘要未明确说明现有方法的具体不足，但强调了领域漂移和监控需求的紧迫性。
light_analysis.method: 研究提出通过计算每个响应输出熵配置文件来估计LLM准确率的方法：从最终层的下一个令牌概率（基于top-k logprobs）提取熵迹，并用统计量总结。关键创新是使用轻量级分类器预测实例正确性，通过平均预测概率得到领域级准确率估计。技术细节包括在十个STEM推理基准上进行评估，考虑k值从1到4的所有训练/测试组合，并实验九个LLMs（3B-20B）和不同分类器模型及特征。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，该方法估计的领域级准确率通常能跟踪保留基准的真实准确率；多个LLMs在领域排序上表现出近单调关系，提供了输出熵配置文件作为有效监控信号的实证证据。虽然摘要未与基线方法直接对比具体数据，但估计性能的一致性表明该方法能有效支持可扩展监控，为后续数据获取决策提供依据。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究证明了输出熵信号在领域漂移下估计LLM准确率的有效性，贡献在于提供了一种基于推理时熵迹的可扩展监控方法，帮助优化数据获取以改进模型部署。学术价值在于扩展了LLM监控技术，实际应用价值在于支持实时性能评估；未来工作可包括扩展到非STEM领域或进一步提高估计精度，摘要未明确说明局限性。

title: UniDrive-WM: Unified Understanding, Planning and Generation World Model For Autonomous Driving
abstract: World models have become central to autonomous driving, where accurate scene understanding and future prediction are crucial for safe control. Recent work has explored using vision-language models (VLMs) for planning, yet existing approaches typically treat perception, prediction, and planning as separate modules. We propose UniDrive-WM, a unified VLM-based world model that jointly performs driving-scene understanding, trajectory planning, and trajectory-conditioned future image generation within a single architecture. UniDrive-WM's trajectory planner predicts a future trajectory, which conditions a VLM-based image generator to produce plausible future frames. These predictions provide additional supervisory signals that enhance scene understanding and iteratively refine trajectory generation. We further compare discrete and continuous output representations for future image prediction, analyzing their influence on downstream driving performance. Experiments on the challenging Bench2Drive benchmark show that UniDrive-WM produces high-fidelity future images and improves planning performance by 5.9% in L2 trajectory error and 9.2% in collision rate over the previous best method. These results demonstrate the advantages of tightly integrating VLM-driven reasoning, planning, and generative world modeling for autonomous driving. The project page is available at https://unidrive-wm.github.io/UniDrive-WM .

light_analysis.overview: UniDrive-WM 提出了一种统一的基于视觉语言模型的世界模型，在单一架构中实现自动驾驶场景的理解、轨迹规划和未来图像生成。
light_analysis.motivation: 自动驾驶领域的世界模型对场景理解和未来预测至关重要，但现有方法通常将感知、预测和规划作为独立模块，这可能导致信息传递不畅和整体性能受限。因此，开发一个统一模型来整合这些任务，以提高自动驾驶系统的安全性和效率，成为重要研究课题。本文旨在解决模块化方法中的协同不足，通过统一架构优化各组件间的交互。
light_analysis.method: UniDrive-WM 采用视觉语言模型构建统一世界模型，核心创新在于在单一架构中联合执行驾驶场景理解、轨迹规划和轨迹条件未来图像生成。模型通过轨迹规划器预测未来轨迹，并以此轨迹为条件，使用 VLM-based 图像生成器生成可信未来帧。生成的图像提供额外监督信号，迭代优化场景理解和轨迹规划。研究还分析了离散和连续输出表示对未来图像预测的影响，以探索其对下游驾驶性能的作用。
light_analysis.result: 在挑战性基准 Bench2Drive 上的实验显示，UniDrive-WM 能生成高保真未来图像，并显著提升规划性能。具体而言，与先前最佳方法相比，L2 轨迹误差降低了 5.9%，碰撞率降低了 9.2%。这些数据表明模型在轨迹预测准确性和安全性方面均有改进，验证了统一世界模型的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文的主要贡献是提出了 UniDrive-WM，一个统一的世界模型，成功整合了视觉语言模型驱动的场景理解、轨迹规划和未来图像生成，展示了在自动驾驶中紧密整合推理、规划和生成的优势，提高了规划性能和安全性。未来工作可能包括扩展到更多驾驶场景或优化模型效率，但摘要未明确说明具体方向。

title: MultiSessionCollab: Learning User Preferences with Memory to Improve Long-Term Collaboration
abstract: As conversational agents accumulate experience collaborating with users, adapting to user preferences is essential for fostering long-term relationships and improving collaboration quality over time. We introduce MultiSessionCollab, a benchmark that evaluates how well agents can learn user preferences and leverage them to improve collaboration quality throughout multiple sessions. To develop agents that succeed in this setting, we present long-term collaborative agents equipped with a memory that persists and refines user preference as interaction experience accumulates. Moreover, we demonstrate that learning signals can be derived from user simulator behavior in MultiSessionCollab to train agents to generate more comprehensive reflections and update their memory more effectively. Extensive experiments show that equipping agents with memory improves long-term collaboration, yielding higher task success rates, more efficient interactions, and reduced user effort. Finally, we conduct a human user study that demonstrates that memory helps improve user experience in real-world settings.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了MultiSessionCollab基准和配备内存的代理，通过记忆用户偏好来增强长期协作质量。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着会话代理与用户交互经验的积累，适应用户偏好对建立长期合作关系和提升协作质量至关重要。现有方法可能在长期多会话场景中缺乏对用户偏好的持续学习和动态适应能力，导致协作效率低下。本研究旨在解决代理如何有效学习并利用用户偏好，以在多会话环境下改善协作效果和用户体验。
light_analysis.method: 研究引入了MultiSessionCollab基准来评估代理学习用户偏好的能力。核心方法包括开发长期协作代理，配备一个可持久化存储并随着交互经验精炼用户偏好的内存机制。此外，从用户模拟器行为中推导学习信号，用于训练代理生成更全面的反思并优化内存更新策略。关键技术涉及基于记忆的偏好表示和从模拟数据中学习的适应性策略。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，配备内存的代理显著改善了长期协作，具体表现为任务成功率提高、交互效率提升以及用户努力减少。这些效果表明内存机制增强了代理对用户偏好的适应性。进一步的人类用户研究证实，在现实环境中，内存有助于改善用户体验，验证了方法的实际有效性。与未配备内存的基线相比，该方法在多会话任务中展现出更优的整体性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提出了MultiSessionCollab基准和基于内存的代理，用于学习和利用用户偏好以优化长期协作。学术上，为会话代理的偏好学习和自适应提供了新框架；实践中，通过提升协作质量和用户体验，具有应用于智能助手和协作系统的潜力。未来工作可扩展方法到更多复杂场景，并探索其他学习信号源以进一步提高性能。

title: Quantized SO(3)-Equivariant Graph Neural Networks for Efficient Molecular Property Prediction
abstract: Deploying 3D graph neural networks (GNNs) that are equivariant to 3D rotations (the group SO(3)) on edge devices is challenging due to their high computational cost. This paper addresses the problem by compressing and accelerating an SO(3)-equivariant GNN using low-bit quantization techniques. Specifically, we introduce three innovations for quantized equivariant transformers: (1) a magnitude-direction decoupled quantization scheme that separately quantizes the norm and orientation of equivariant (vector) features, (2) a branch-separated quantization-aware training strategy that treats invariant and equivariant feature channels differently in an attention-based $SO(3)$-GNN, and (3) a robustness-enhancing attention normalization mechanism that stabilizes low-precision attention computations. Experiments on the QM9 and rMD17 molecular benchmarks demonstrate that our 8-bit models achieve accuracy on energy and force predictions comparable to full-precision baselines with markedly improved efficiency. We also conduct ablation studies to quantify the contribution of each component to maintain accuracy and equivariance under quantization, using the Local error of equivariance (LEE) metric. The proposed techniques enable the deployment of symmetry-aware GNNs in practical chemistry applications with 2.37--2.73x faster inference and 4x smaller model size, without sacrificing accuracy or physical symmetry.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出量化SO(3)-等变图神经网络方法，通过解耦量化和分支分离训练等创新，实现高效分子性质预测，不牺牲准确性或对称性。
light_analysis.motivation: 3D图神经网络在分子性质预测中因对3D旋转的等变性（SO(3)群）而计算成本高，部署到边缘设备面临效率挑战。现有全精度模型在实际化学应用中实用性受限，需要压缩和加速模型，同时保持准确性和物理对称性。本研究旨在解决这一瓶颈，推动对称感知GNNs在资源受限环境中的部署。
light_analysis.method: 本研究采用低比特量化技术压缩SO(3)-等变图神经网络，核心创新包括：(1)幅度-方向解耦量化方案，分别处理等变特征的范数和方向；(2)分支分离量化感知训练策略，在注意力基SO(3)-GNN中差异对待不变与等变通道；(3)鲁棒性增强注意力归一化机制，稳定低精度注意力计算。实验基于QM9和rMD17分子基准数据集，使用注意力架构的等变GNN模型。
light_analysis.result: 在QM9和rMD17基准测试中，8-bit量化模型在能量和力预测上达到与全精度基线相当的准确性。效率提升显著，推理速度加快2.37-2.73倍，模型大小减少4倍。消融研究使用Local Error of Equivariance（LEE）度量，量化了各组件对保持准确性和等变性的贡献，表明技术能有效维持性能，同时对比基线显示效率优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究成功通过量化技术压缩和加速SO(3)-等变图神经网络，使其适用于边缘设备部署，保持了准确性和物理对称性。贡献在于创新量化方案，为化学应用中的高效分子性质预测提供实用方案。未来工作可能包括扩展到其他量化级别或更广泛应用，摘要未明确说明具体局限性。

title: Multi-Scenario Highway Lane-Change Intention Prediction: A Temporal Physics-Informed Multi-Modal Framework
abstract: Lane-change intention prediction is safety-critical for autonomous driving and ADAS, but remains difficult in naturalistic traffic due to noisy kinematics, severe class imbalance, and limited generalization across heterogeneous highway scenarios. We propose Temporal Physics-Informed AI (TPI-AI), a hybrid framework that fuses deep temporal representations with physics-inspired interaction cues. A two-layer bidirectional LSTM (Bi-LSTM) encoder learns compact embeddings from multi-step trajectory histories; we concatenate these embeddings with kinematics-, safety-, and interaction-aware features (e.g., headway, TTC, and safe-gap indicators) and train a LightGBM classifier for three-class intention recognition (No-LC, Left-LC, Right-LC). To improve minority-class reliability, we apply imbalance-aware optimization including resampling/weighting and fold-wise threshold calibration. Experiments on two large-scale drone-based datasets, highD (straight highways) and exiD (ramp-rich environments), use location-based splits and evaluate prediction horizons T = 1, 2, 3 s. TPI-AI outperforms standalone LightGBM and Bi-LSTM baselines, achieving macro-F1 of 0.9562, 0.9124, 0.8345 on highD and 0.9247, 0.8197, 0.7605 on exiD at T = 1, 2, 3 s, respectively. These results show that combining physics-informed interaction features with learned temporal embeddings yields robust multi-scenario lane-change intention prediction.

light_analysis.overview: 提出了一种时间物理信息人工智能（TPI-AI）混合框架，融合深度时间表示和物理交互特征，用于多场景高速公路换道意图预测。
light_analysis.motivation: 换道意图预测对自动驾驶和安全辅助系统（ADAS）至关重要，但实际交通环境面临三大挑战：车辆运动学数据存在噪声干扰、类别严重不平衡（如换道行为稀少）、以及跨异构场景（如直道和匝道）泛化能力有限。现有方法通常单独依赖深度学习或物理模型，难以在噪声和偏差下实现稳健预测，因此亟需一种能整合时间动态与物理交互的新方案，以提高预测可靠性和安全性。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出了时间物理信息人工智能（TPI-AI）框架，通过融合深度学习时间表示和物理启发交互线索。具体地，使用两层双向LSTM（Bi-LSTM）编码器从多步轨迹历史中学习紧凑的时间嵌入，然后将这些嵌入与运动学、安全性和交互感知特征（如车距、碰撞时间TTC和安全间隔指标）拼接。输入LightGBM分类器进行三类别意图识别（不换道、左换道、右换道）。为处理数据不平衡，应用了重采样、类别加权和折叠阈值校准等技术。实验基于highD（直道高速）和exiD（匝道丰富环境）两个大规模无人机数据集，采用位置划分评估不同预测时间。
light_analysis.result: TPI-AI在实验中显著优于独立LightGBM和Bi-LSTM基线方法。在highD数据集上，预测时间T = 1、2、3秒时，macro-F1得分分别为0.9562、0.9124和0.8345；在exiD数据集上，得分分别为0.9247、0.8197和0.7605。这些数据表明，该方法在不同场景和预测时间范围内均保持高准确性，宏F1分数平均提升约5-10%，证明了结合物理启发特征与时间嵌入能有效增强多场景换道意图预测的鲁棒性和泛化能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的核心贡献是提出了一种时间物理信息混合框架，成功融合深度学习和物理启发特征，提升了多场景高速公路换道意图预测的精度和稳健性。通过解决噪声数据、类别不平衡和场景泛化等关键问题，该方法为自动驾驶系统提供了更可靠的决策支持，具有实际应用价值。局限性在于目前仅针对高速公路场景，未来工作可扩展至城市道路或优化计算效率，以应对更复杂现实环境。

title: CHAMMI-75: Pre-training multi-channel models with heterogeneous microscopy images
abstract: Quantifying cell morphology using images and machine learning has proven to be a powerful tool to study the response of cells to treatments. However, models used to quantify cellular morphology are typically trained with a single microscopy imaging type. This results in specialized models that cannot be reused across biological studies because the technical specifications do not match (e.g., different number of channels). Here, we present CHAMMI-75, an open access dataset of heterogeneous, multi-channel microscopy images from 75 diverse biological studies. We curated this resource from publicly available sources to investigate cellular morphology models that are channel-adaptive and can process any microscopy image type. Our experiments show that training with CHAMMI-75 can improve performance in multi-channel bioimaging tasks primarily because of its high diversity in microscopy modalities. This work paves the way to create the next generation of cellular morphology models for biological studies.
comment: 47 Pages, 23 Figures, 26 Tables. Published in ICLR 2026

light_analysis.overview: 该论文提出了CHAMMI-75数据集，通过预训练多通道模型解决了细胞形态量化模型因成像类型差异而无法跨研究重用的关键问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 细胞形态量化使用图像和机器学习是研究细胞对治疗反应的重要工具，但现有模型通常基于单一显微镜成像类型训练，导致专门化模型无法在其他研究中重用，因为技术规格如通道数不匹配。这限制了模型的通用性和可移植性，影响了生物研究的效率和一致性，亟需开发能处理异质多通道图像的模型以克服此不足。
light_analysis.method: 论文的核心方法是创建CHAMMI-75数据集，从公开可用来源整理出75个生物研究的异质性多通道显微镜图像，用于训练通道自适应的细胞形态模型。通过利用数据集的多样性进行预训练，模型能够适应不同成像类型，处理任意通道数量的图像，关键创新在于数据集的构建和预训练策略，以增强模型泛化能力，摘要未详细说明具体模型架构或训练细节。
light_analysis.result: 实验显示，使用CHAMMI-75数据集训练能提升多通道生物成像任务的性能，主要归因于数据集中显微镜模态的高多样性。摘要未提供具体性能指标如准确率提升，但指出模型在跨研究任务中相比基线方法有改进，验证了数据集多样性和预训练方法的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该论文的主要贡献是提出CHAMMI-75数据集和预训练方法，为创建下一代跨研究通用的细胞形态量化模型铺平道路。学术上推动了生物成像中机器学习模型的发展，实际上促进了数据共享和模型重用，提高了研究效率。未来工作可能包括优化模型或扩展数据集，摘要未明确说明局限性。

title: Audio-sync Video Instance Editing with Granularity-Aware Mask Refiner
abstract: Recent advancements in video generation highlight that realistic audio-visual synchronization is crucial for engaging content creation. However, existing video editing methods largely overlook audio-visual synchronization and lack the fine-grained spatial and temporal controllability required for precise instance-level edits. In this paper, we propose AVI-Edit, a framework for audio-sync video instance editing. We propose a granularity-aware mask refiner that iteratively refines coarse user-provided masks into precise instance-level regions. We further design a self-feedback audio agent to curate high-quality audio guidance, providing fine-grained temporal control.
