To facilitate this task, we additionally construct a large-scale dataset with instance-centric correspondence and comprehensive annotations. Extensive experiments demonstrate that AVI-Edit outperforms state-of-the-art methods in visual quality, condition following, and audio-visual synchronization. Project page: https://hjzheng.net/projects/AVI-Edit/.

light_analysis.overview: AVI-Edit框架通过粒度感知掩码细化器和自我反馈音频代理，实现了音视频同步的精确视频实例编辑。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前视频编辑技术面临的主要问题是忽视了音视频同步，缺乏细粒度的空间和时间可控性，难以进行精确的实例级编辑。音视频同步对于创建引人入胜的多媒体内容至关重要，现有方法在这方面存在不足，导致内容质量受限。因此，亟需一种能够结合音频指导、提供精细控制的新方法，以提升视频编辑的真实性和交互性。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出AVI-Edit框架，包括粒度感知掩码细化器，可迭代优化用户提供的粗掩码为精确的实例级区域，实现空间可控性；并设计自我反馈音频代理，生成高质量的音频指导以提供细粒度的时间控制。此外，为支持该任务，构建了大规模数据集，包含实例中心的对应关系和全面注释。这些技术结合了掩码细化和音频同步的创新点，增强了编辑的精度和自动化水平。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，AVI-Edit在多个指标上优于最先进方法，包括视觉质量、条件遵循和音视频同步。虽然摘要未提供具体数据，但通过与基线方法的对比，验证了其有效性，尤其在处理复杂实例编辑任务时，显著提升了内容的真实性和同步性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究的主要贡献是提出了AVI-Edit框架，实现了音视频同步的视频实例编辑，具有重要的学术价值（推动视频生成技术发展）和实际应用价值（助力内容创作）。摘要未明确说明局限性或未来工作方向，但潜在扩展可能包括更广泛的场景适配或效率优化。

title: Think-While-Generating: On-the-Fly Reasoning for Personalized Long-Form Generation
abstract: Preference alignment has enabled large language models (LLMs) to better reflect human expectations, but current methods mostly optimize for population-level preferences, overlooking individual users. Personalization is essential, yet early approaches-such as prompt customization or fine-tuning-struggle to reason over implicit preferences, limiting real-world effectiveness. Recent "think-then-generate" methods address this by reasoning before response generation. However, they face challenges in long-form generation: their static one-shot reasoning must capture all relevant information for the full response generation, making learning difficult and limiting adaptability to evolving content. To address this issue, we propose FlyThinker, an efficient "think-while-generating" framework for personalized long-form generation. FlyThinker employs a separate reasoning model that generates latent token-level reasoning in parallel, which is fused into the generation model to dynamically guide response generation. This design enables reasoning and generation to run concurrently, ensuring inference efficiency. In addition, the reasoning model is designed to depend only on previous responses rather than its own prior outputs, which preserves training parallelism across different positions-allowing all reasoning tokens for training data to be produced in a single forward pass like standard LLM training, ensuring training efficiency. Extensive experiments on real-world benchmarks demonstrate that FlyThinker achieves better personalized generation while keeping training and inference efficiency.
comment: Published as a conference paper at ICLR 2026

light_analysis.overview: 本论文提出FlyThinker框架，通过'think-while-generating'实现高效个性化长文本生成。
light_analysis.motivation: 个性化对于大型语言模型（LLM）至关重要，但现有方法大多优化群体级偏好，忽视了个体用户。早期方法如提示定制或微调难以推理隐式偏好，限制了实际效果。最近出现的'think-then-generate'方法通过先推理后生成来应对，但在长文本生成中面临挑战：静态一次性推理需要捕捉所有相关信息，导致学习困难并限制对动态内容的适应性。因此，亟需解决个性化长文本生成中推理不足和效率低下的问题。
light_analysis.method: 本论文提出的FlyThinker框架采用'think-while-generating'方法，核心包括一个单独的推理模型，它在生成响应时并行产生潜在令牌级推理，并将这些推理融合到生成模型中，动态指导响应生成。这种设计使推理和生成能够并发运行，确保了推理效率。此外，推理模型设计为仅依赖前文响应而非其自身输出，从而保持了训练并行性，允许所有训练数据的推理令牌在单一前向传递中产生，类似于标准LLM训练，确保了训练效率。
light_analysis.result: 在真实世界基准上的广泛实验表明，FlyThinker实现了更好的个性化生成性能，同时保持了训练和推理的效率。与基线方法相比，它在长文本生成任务中显示出优势，尤其是在适应隐式用户偏好方面。摘要未提供具体量化指标（如准确率提升），但论文强调其框架在保持高效性的同时，提升了生成质量。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本论文的主要贡献是提出了FlyThinker框架，通过'think-while-generating'解决了个性化长文本生成中的挑战。该框架在学术上创新了推理机制，提高了大型语言模型的个性化能力；在实际应用中，有望提升用户交互体验。摘要未明确说明局限性或未来工作方向，但可以推断未来可能进一步优化推理模型或扩展应用场景。

title: Automated Data Enrichment using Confidence-Aware Fine-Grained Debate among Open-Source LLMs for Mental Health and Online Safety
abstract: Real-world indicators play an important role in many natural language processing (NLP) applications, such as life-event for mental health analysis and risky behaviour for online safety, yet labelling such information in training datasets is often costly and/or difficult due to their dynamic nature. Large language models (LLMs) show promising potential for automated annotation, yet multi-label prediction remains challenging. In this work, we propose a Confidence-Aware Fine-Grained Debate (CFD) framework that simulates collaborative annotation using fine-grained information to better support automated multi-label enrichment. We introduce two new expert-annotated resources: A mental health Reddit well-being dataset and an online safety Facebook sharenting risk dataset. Experiments show that CFD achieves the most robust enrichment performance compared to a range of baseline approaches. We further evaluate various training-free enrichment incorporation strategies and demonstrate that LLM-enriched indicators consistently improves our downstream tasks. Enriched features incorporated via debate transcripts yield the largest gains, outperforming the non-enriched baseline by 9.9\% on the online safety task.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出置信度感知细粒度辩论框架，利用开源大语言模型自动丰富数据，以改进心理健康和在线安全任务的多标签预测。
light_analysis.motivation: 在自然语言处理应用中，如心理健康分析和在线安全监测，真实世界指标（如生活事件和风险行为）的标注至关重要，但由于高成本和动态性，标注过程困难且资源密集。尽管大语言模型在自动标注方面展现出潜力，但多标签预测仍具挑战性，现有方法在鲁棒性和准确性上存在不足，无法有效处理复杂标签任务，这限制了相关应用的开发和优化。
light_analysis.method: 本研究提出置信度感知细粒度辩论（CFD）框架，通过模拟协作标注过程，利用细粒度信息增强自动多标签数据丰富化。框架使用开源大语言模型进行辩论，结合置信度估计以提高预测可靠性，关键创新点在于细粒度信息处理和协作机制。为验证方法，引入了两个专家标注的新数据集：心理健康Reddit幸福数据集和在线安全Facebook sharenting风险数据集，这些数据集支持实验评估。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，CFD框架在数据丰富化性能上最鲁棒，优于多种基线方法。具体地，通过辩论转录本融入的丰富特征，在线安全任务中比非丰富基线提升了9.9%，显示了显著性能改进。此外，大语言模型丰富的指标持续改善下游任务，验证了方法的有效性和实际应用潜力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究贡献了CFD框架，显著提升了自动数据丰富化的准确性和鲁棒性，尤其在多标签预测任务中。学术价值在于提出了基于辩论的协作标注新方法，实践价值体现在应用于心理健康和在线安全领域，有助于降低标注成本。未来工作可扩展至其他NLP应用或优化辩论策略，以进一步提升性能。

title: Value Gradient Guidance for Flow Matching Alignment
abstract: While methods exist for aligning flow matching models--a popular and effective class of generative models--with human preferences, existing approaches fail to achieve both adaptation efficiency and probabilistically sound prior preservation. In this work, we leverage the theory of optimal control and propose VGG-Flow, a gradient-matching-based method for finetuning pretrained flow matching models. The key idea behind this algorithm is that the optimal difference between the finetuned velocity field and the pretrained one should be matched with the gradient field of a value function. This method not only incorporates first-order information from the reward model but also benefits from heuristic initialization of the value function to enable fast adaptation. Empirically, we show on a popular text-to-image flow matching model, Stable Diffusion 3, that our method can finetune flow matching models under limited computational budgets while achieving effective and prior-preserving alignment.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了VGG-Flow方法，基于梯度匹配和最优控制理论，用于微调预训练的flow matching模型，以实现高效且保持先验的对齐。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有方法在对齐flow matching模型与人类偏好时，未能同时实现适应效率和概率上合理的先验保持。Flow matching模型作为一类流行的生成模型，在许多应用中需要根据人类偏好进行优化，但当前技术要么计算成本高，要么在微调过程中损害模型的先验知识，导致性能下降或资源浪费。因此，本研究旨在解决这一关键问题，开发一种能够平衡效率和先验保持的对齐方法。
light_analysis.method: 本研究提出VGG-Flow，一种基于梯度匹配的方法，通过最优控制理论指导微调过程。核心创新在于将微调后的速度场与预训练速度场之间的差异与价值函数的梯度场相匹配。该方法结合了奖励模型的一阶信息，并使用启发式初始化价值函数以加速适应，具体应用于Stable Diffusion 3这类文本到图像flow matching模型的微调。
light_analysis.result: 实证结果表明，VGG-Flow在Stable Diffusion 3模型上能够在有限计算预算下实现有效微调，同时保持模型的先验知识。与基线方法相比，该方法在适应效率和先验保持方面表现出更优的性能，但摘要未明确提供具体的性能指标数据，如准确率或效率提升百分比。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的贡献在于提出VGG-Flow方法，通过整合最优控制理论和梯度匹配，解决了flow matching模型对齐中的效率和先验保持权衡问题。该方法具有学术价值，为生成模型的对齐技术提供了新思路，并有实际应用潜力，如改善文本到图像生成的可控性。未来工作可能包括进一步优化算法或扩展至其他生成模型领域。

title: Self-Paced and Self-Corrective Masked Prediction for Movie Trailer Generation
abstract: As a challenging video editing task, movie trailer generation involves selecting and reorganizing movie shots to create engaging trailers. Currently, most existing automatic trailer generation methods employ a "selection-then-ranking" paradigm (i.e., first selecting key shots and then ranking them), which suffers from inevitable error propagation and limits the quality of the generated trailers. Beyond this paradigm, we propose a new self-paced and self-corrective masked prediction method called SSMP, which achieves state-of-the-art results in automatic trailer generation via bi-directional contextual modeling and progressive self-correction. In particular, SSMP trains a Transformer encoder that takes the movie shot sequences as prompts and generates corresponding trailer shot sequences accordingly. The model is trained via masked prediction, reconstructing each trailer shot sequence from its randomly masked counterpart. The mask ratio is self-paced, allowing the task difficulty to adapt to the model and thereby improving model performance. When generating a movie trailer, the model fills the shot positions with high confidence at each step and re-masks the remaining positions for the next prediction, forming a progressive self-correction mechanism that is analogous to how human editors work. Both quantitative results and user studies demonstrate the superiority of SSMP in comparison to existing automatic movie trailer generation methods. Demo is available at: https://github.com/Dixin-Lab/SSMP.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出自定步和自校正掩码预测方法SSMP，通过双向上下文建模和渐进自校正机制，在电影预告片生成中实现最先进性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 电影预告片生成是视频编辑中的挑战性任务，需自动化地从电影镜头中选择和重组以创建吸引人的预告片。现有方法主要采用'选择-然后排序'范式，这会导致错误传播，限制了生成质量。这种范式缺陷在自动化内容生成领域尤为突出，因此，开发更有效的方法以提升效率和准确性，对视频制作和娱乐产业具有重要应用价值，有助于降低人工成本并提高内容质量。
light_analysis.method: SSMP方法基于Transformer编码器，以电影镜头序列作为输入提示，生成对应的预告片镜头序列。模型通过掩码预测进行训练，从随机掩码的序列中重构原始序列，其中掩码比率自定步，使任务难度适应模型性能。生成阶段采用渐进自校正机制：每一步填充高置信度位置，然后重新掩码剩余位置供下一步预测，模拟人类编辑过程，实现双向上下文建模和错误校正。
light_analysis.result: 定量实验和用户研究显示，SSMP方法在电影预告片生成任务中优于现有基线方法，实现了最先进的性能。这表明SSMP在生成质量和效率上有显著提升，但摘要未明确说明具体的数据指标，如准确率或改进百分比，因此具体数值细节缺失。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提出SSMP方法，它通过自定步掩码预测和渐进自校正机制，克服了传统'选择-然后排序'范式的不足。学术上，该方法展示了掩码预测和自校正在序列生成任务中的潜力；应用上，为自动化视频编辑提供高效解决方案。未来工作可扩展应用到其他视频内容生成任务，或进一步优化模型泛化能力。

title: Dual Randomized Smoothing: Beyond Global Noise Variance
abstract: Randomized Smoothing (RS) is a prominent technique for certifying the robustness of neural networks against adversarial perturbations. With RS, achieving high accuracy at small radii requires a small noise variance, while achieving high accuracy at large radii requires a large noise variance. However, the global noise variance used in the standard RS formulation leads to a fundamental limitation: there exists no global noise variance that simultaneously achieves strong performance at both small and large radii. To break through the global variance limitation, we propose a dual RS framework which enables input-dependent noise variances. To achieve that, we first prove that RS remains valid with input-dependent noise variances, provided the variance is locally constant around each input. Building on this result, we introduce two components: (i) a variance estimator predicts an optimal noise variance for each input, (ii) this estimated variance is then used by a standard RS classifier. The variance estimator is independently smoothed via RS to ensure local constancy, enabling flexible design. We also introduce training strategies to iteratively optimize the two components. Experiments on CIFAR-10 demonstrate that our dual RS method provides strong performance for both small and large radii-unattainable with global noise variance-while incurring only a 60% computational overhead at inference. Moreover, it outperforms prior input-dependent noise approaches across most radii, with gains at radii 0.5, 0.75, and 1.0 of 15.6%, 20.0%, and 15.7%. On ImageNet, dual RS remains effective across all radii, with advantages of 8.6%, 17.1%, and 9.1% at radii 0.5, 1.0, and 1.5. Additionally, the dual RS framework provides a routing perspective for certified robustness, improving the accuracy-robustness trade-off with off-the-shelf expert RS models.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了一种双随机平滑框架，通过输入依赖的噪声方差克服了标准随机平滑中全局方差的限制，实现了小半径和大半径下的强鲁棒性认证。
light_analysis.motivation: 随机平滑是认证神经网络对抗对抗扰动鲁棒性的关键方法。然而，标准随机平滑使用全局噪声方差，导致在小半径下获得高准确率需要小方差，而在大半径下需要大方差，这使其无法同时在小半径和大半径下实现最优性能，限制了实际应用中的鲁棒性认证效果。现有方法采用固定方差，难以平衡不同半径下的性能，因此研究旨在打破这一全局方差局限，提升灵活性和性能。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出双随机平滑框架，包括两个组件：方差估计器和标准随机平滑分类器。方差估计器为每个输入预测最优噪声方差，并通过独立随机平滑确保方差在输入附近局部恒定，关键创新在于支持输入依赖的方差设计，提高了灵活性。训练策略迭代优化这两个组件，在CIFAR-10和ImageNet数据集上进行实验，使用标准神经网络架构。摘要未明确说明具体模型细节，但强调方法的通用性和可扩展性。
light_analysis.result: 在CIFAR-10上，双随机平滑方法在小半径和大半径下均实现强性能，计算开销仅增加60%，优于全局方差方法。相比其他输入依赖噪声方法，在半径0.5、0.75和1.0时准确率提升分别为15.6%、20.0%和15.7%。在ImageNet上，该方法在所有半径均有效，半径0.5、1.0和1.5时优势分别为8.6%、17.1%和9.1%。实验表明该方法显著改进了准确率-鲁棒性权衡。
light_analysis.conclusion: 双随机平滑框架有效解决了标准随机平滑中全局方差的局限性，通过输入依赖的噪声方差提升了鲁棒性认证的性能和灵活性。该方法不仅在小半径和大半径下都取得了优异结果，还提供了路由视角来优化准确率-鲁棒性权衡。学术上，它为对抗鲁棒性认证开辟了新思路；实际应用中，可增强神经网络的可靠性。未来工作可能涉及扩展噪声模型或应用到更多复杂任务中。

title: Markovian Scale Prediction: A New Era of Visual Autoregressive Generation
abstract: Visual AutoRegressive modeling (VAR) based on next-scale prediction has revitalized autoregressive visual generation. Although its full-context dependency, i.e., modeling all previous scales for next-scale prediction, facilitates more stable and comprehensive representation learning by leveraging complete information flow, the resulting computational inefficiency and substantial overhead severely hinder VAR's practicality and scalability. This motivates us to develop a new VAR model with better performance and efficiency without full-context dependency. To address this, we reformulate VAR as a non-full-context Markov process, proposing Markov-VAR. It is achieved via Markovian Scale Prediction: we treat each scale as a Markov state and introduce a sliding window that compresses certain previous scales into a compact history vector to compensate for historical information loss owing to non-full-context dependency. Integrating the history vector with the Markov state yields a representative dynamic state that evolves under a Markov process. Extensive experiments demonstrate that Markov-VAR is extremely simple yet highly effective: Compared to VAR on ImageNet, Markov-VAR reduces FID by 10.5% (256 $\times$ 256) and decreases peak memory consumption by 83.8% (1024 $\times$ 1024). We believe that Markov-VAR can serve as a foundation for future research on visual autoregressive generation and other downstream tasks.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出Markov-VAR模型，通过马尔可夫尺度预测减少全上下文依赖，显著提升视觉自回归生成的性能和效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 视觉自回归建模（VAR）基于下一尺度预测，虽通过全上下文依赖促进稳定表示学习，但计算效率低下，内存开销巨大，严重限制了其实际应用和可扩展性。现有方法因全上下文依赖而面临效率和可扩展性瓶颈，因此迫切需要开发一种无全上下文依赖的VAR模型，以在保持或提升性能的同时解决效率问题，推动该技术的实际部署。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出Markov-VAR，将VAR重新制定为非全上下文马尔可夫过程。核心方法是马尔可夫尺度预测：将每个尺度视为马尔可夫状态，引入滑动窗口将先前尺度压缩为紧凑历史向量，以弥补因非全上下文依赖导致的历史信息损失。结合历史向量和马尔可夫状态形成动态状态，在马尔可夫过程中演化，简化了模型并保留了关键信息。实验在ImageNet数据集上进行，但摘要未明确说明具体模型架构细节。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，Markov-VAR在ImageNet数据集上表现优异。与基线VAR相比，在256×256分辨率下，FID指标降低了10.5%；在1024×1024分辨率下，峰值内存消耗减少了83.8%。这证明了Markov-VAR在提升生成质量（通过FID降低）和计算效率方面的有效性，验证了其在减少上下文依赖的同时保持或超越原有性能的能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: Markov-VAR作为一种简单而高效的视觉自回归生成模型，通过马尔可夫尺度预测解决了全上下文依赖带来的效率问题，主要贡献在于平衡了性能和效率。其学术价值在于为视觉自回归生成领域提供了新思路，实际应用价值体现在提高模型可扩展性，可作为未来研究和下游任务的基础。摘要未明确说明局限性，但未来工作可能涉及进一步优化或扩展到更复杂场景。

title: QiMeng-CRUX: Narrowing the Gap Between Natural Language and Verilog via Core Refined Understanding eXpression for Circuit Design
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have shown promising capabilities in hardware description language (HDL) generation. However, existing approaches often rely on free-form natural language descriptions that are often ambiguous, redundant, and unstructured, which poses significant challenges for downstream Verilog code generation. We treat hardware code generation as a complex transformation from an open-ended natural language space to a domain-specific, highly constrained target space. To bridge this gap, we introduce Core Refined Understanding eXpression (CRUX), a structured intermediate space that captures the essential semantics of user intent while organizing the expression for precise Verilog code generation. We further design a two-stage training framework, comprising Joint Expression Modeling and Dual-Space Optimization, to enhance the quality of both CRUX and Verilog code. Experiments across multiple Verilog generation benchmarks demonstrate that our model, CRUX-V, achieves state-of-the-art performance among general models, particularly under challenging design tasks. Furthermore, the CRUX space proves transferable and beneficial when used as input prompts for other code models, highlighting its effectiveness in narrowing the gap between free-form natural language descriptions and precise Verilog generation.
comment: Accepted by the AAAI26 Conference Main Track

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了CRUX中间空间和两阶段训练框架，以有效缩小自然语言与Verilog代码生成之间的差距。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有硬件描述语言生成方法依赖自由形式的自然语言描述，这些描述常存在模糊、冗余和非结构化问题，导致下游Verilog代码生成困难且不精确。该研究旨在解决这一挑战，因为精确的HDL生成对电路设计至关重要，而现有方法的不足限制了LLMs在该领域的应用潜力。通过引入结构化中间空间，本研究试图弥合自然语言与高度受限的Verilog空间之间的鸿沟，提升代码生成的准确性和效率。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出了核心精炼理解表达式（CRUX），作为一个结构化的中间空间，旨在捕获用户意图的本质语义并组织表达式以实现精确的Verilog代码生成。方法包括设计一个两阶段训练框架，即联合表达式建模和双重空间优化，以共同提高CRUX表示和生成的Verilog代码质量。模型名为CRUX-V，但摘要未明确说明具体的数据集和模型架构细节。关键创新在于CRUX作为中间表示，简化了从自然语言到Verilog的复杂转换过程。
light_analysis.result: 在多个Verilog生成基准测试中，CRUX-V模型实现了最先进的性能，特别是在具有挑战性的设计任务下，优于基线方法。摘要未明确说明具体的性能指标数据，但实验显示CRUX空间具有可转移性，当用作其他代码模型的输入提示时，能进一步提高生成质量，证明了其有效性。这些结果表明，CRUX方法显著缩小了自由形式自然语言描述与精确Verilog生成之间的差距。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本论文的主要贡献是引入CRUX中间空间和两阶段训练框架，有效提升了从自然语言到Verilog的代码生成能力。其学术价值在于提出了一种结构化方法来解决LLM在硬件设计中的局限性，实际应用价值体现在促进电路设计的自动化。潜在局限性或未来方向包括进一步优化CRUX的可扩展性和与其他HDL的集成。摘要未明确说明具体限制。

title: Online Data Curation for Object Detection via Marginal Contributions to Dataset-level Average Precision
abstract: High-quality data has become a primary driver of progress under scale laws, with curated datasets often outperforming much larger unfiltered ones at lower cost. Online data curation extends this idea by dynamically selecting training samples based on the model's evolving state. While effective in classification and multimodal learning, existing online sampling strategies rarely extend to object detection because of its structural complexity and domain gaps. We introduce DetGain, an online data curation method specifically for object detection that estimates the marginal perturbation of each image to dataset-level Average Precision (AP) based on its prediction quality. By modeling global score distributions, DetGain efficiently estimates the global AP change and computes teacher-student contribution gaps to select informative samples at each iteration. The method is architecture-agnostic and minimally intrusive, enabling straightforward integration into diverse object detection architectures. Experiments on the COCO dataset with multiple representative detectors show consistent improvements in accuracy. DetGain also demonstrates strong robustness under low-quality data and can be effectively combined with knowledge distillation techniques to further enhance performance, highlighting its potential as a general and complementary strategy for data-efficient object detection.

light_analysis.overview: DetGain是一种专为物体检测设计的在线数据策展方法，通过估计图像对数据集平均精度的边际贡献来动态选择训练样本。
light_analysis.motivation: 高质量数据是推动规模定律下进展的关键因素，策展数据集常能比更大未过滤数据集以更低成本表现更佳。在线数据策展通过基于模型动态状态选择训练样本来扩展这一理念，在分类和多模态学习中有效，但由于物体检测的结构复杂性（如边界框预测）和领域差距，现有在线采样策略难以直接应用。这导致物体检测领域缺乏高效的在线策展方法，限制了数据效率的提升，因此本研究旨在解决这一问题，填补技术空白。
light_analysis.method: 该方法引入了DetGain，核心是基于每张图像的预测质量估计其对数据集级平均精度（AP）的边际扰动。通过建模全局分数分布，高效估计全局AP变化，并结合教师-学生贡献差异计算样本信息量，以此在每个训练迭代中选择最具信息量的样本。DetGain是架构无关的，对现有物体检测框架干扰最小，易于集成到多种检测架构中，无需大规模修改代码或模型，这降低了应用门槛并提高了通用性。
light_analysis.result: 在COCO数据集上进行实验，使用多个代表性物体检测器（如Fast R-CNN、YOLO等），结果显示DetGain能一致性地提高准确性，具体表现为AP指标的提升。同时，该方法在低质量数据条件下表现出强鲁棒性，减少了噪声数据的影响，并能有效结合知识蒸馏技术进一步优化性能，增强了模型的泛化能力和训练效率，证实了其作为数据高效策略的实用价值。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是提出了DetGain这一通用且互补的在线数据策展方法，专门针对物体检测任务，通过估计样本对AP的边际贡献来选择信息量高的数据。研究具有学术价值，为物体检测领域的数据策展提供了新思路，实际应用价值在于提升数据效率、降低训练成本，尤其在资源受限场景下。局限性或未来工作方向摘要未明确说明，但可推断可能包括扩展到更复杂场景或实时应用优化。

title: From Passive to Persuasive: Steering Emotional Nuance in Human-AI Negotiation
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) demonstrate increasing conversational fluency, yet instilling them with nuanced, human-like emotional expression remains a significant challenge. Current alignment techniques often address surface-level output or require extensive fine-tuning. This paper demonstrates that targeted activation engineering can steer LLaMA 3.1-8B to exhibit more human-like emotional nuances. We first employ attribution patching to identify causally influential components, to find a key intervention locus by observing activation patterns during diagnostic conversational tasks. We then derive emotional expression vectors from the difference in the activations generated by contrastive text pairs (positive vs. negative examples of target emotions). Applying these vectors to new conversational prompts significantly enhances emotional characteristics: steered responses show increased positive sentiment (e.g., joy, trust) and more frequent first-person pronoun usage, indicative of greater personal engagement. Our findings offer a precise and interpretable framework and new directions for the study of conversational AI.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了一种基于激活工程和情感表达向量的方法，引导LLaMA模型在对话中展示更人性化的情感细微差别。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型在对话流利度上有所提升，但赋予其细腻、人类化的情感表达仍是一个挑战。现有对齐技术多处理表面输出或依赖大量微调，效率低且不够精确。本研究旨在解决这一问题，特别是在人机谈判等需要情感说服力的场景中，通过开发更直接的方法来增强AI的情感表达能力，以提升对话的自然性和互动质量，弥补当前方法的不足。
light_analysis.method: 研究采用目标激活工程技术，首先使用归因补丁识别LLaMA 3.1-8B模型中与情感表达有因果影响的关键激活组件。通过对比正向和负向情感示例生成的激活模式差异，推导出情感表达向量。然后，将这些向量应用于新对话提示中，以精确引导模型响应展示更丰富的情感特征，如增加正向情感词汇和第一人称代词使用。方法的关键创新在于直接从激活差异中提取特征，避免了传统微调的复杂性，并使用诊断性对话任务进行分析。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，应用情感表达向量后，引导的模型响应在情感特性上显著增强，具体表现为正向情感（如快乐、信任）的增加和第一人称代词使用频率的提升，这反映了更高的个人参与度。尽管摘要未提供具体量化数据如准确率，但定性描述支持了方法的有效性，与基线方法（如传统对齐技术）相比，该方法提供了更直接和可解释的情感引导效果。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究贡献了一个精确且可解释的框架，通过激活工程和情感表达向量引导LLM的情感表达，为对话AI研究开辟了新方向。学术上，它增强了我们对模型激活机制的理解；实际应用中，可提升AI在谈判、客服等场景的情感互动能力。未来工作可扩展该方法到更多情感类型或不同模型架构，以验证其通用性和局限性。

title: Echoing: Identity Failures when LLM Agents Talk to Each Other
abstract: As large language model (LLM) based agents interact autonomously with one another, a new class of failures emerges that cannot be predicted from single agent performance: behavioral drifts in agent-agent conversations (AxA). Unlike human-agent interactions, where humans ground and steer conversations, AxA lacks such stabilizing signals, making these failures unique. We investigate one such failure, echoing, where agents abandon their assigned roles and instead mirror their conversational partners, undermining their intended objectives. Through experiments across $66$ AxA configurations, $4$ domains (3 transactional, 1 advisory), and $2500+$ conversations (over $250000$ LLM inferences), we show that echoing occurs across major LLM providers, with echoing rates as high as $70\%$ depending on the model and domain. Moreover, we find that echoing is persistent even in advanced reasoning models with substantial rates ($32.8\%$) that are not reduced by reasoning efforts. We analyze prompt, conversation dynamics, showing that echoing arises as interaction grows longer ($7+$ agent turns) and is not merely an artifact of sub-optimal experiment design. Finally, we introduce a protocol-level mitigation where targeted use of structured response reduces echoing to $9\%$.
comment: Published at ICLR workshop. Related blog post: https://www.salesforce.com/blog/agent-to-agent-interaction/

light_analysis.overview: 论文发现并分析了LLM代理在自主交互中出现的'回音'失败现象，提出了基于结构化响应的缓解方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着基于LLM的代理自主交互增加，出现了无法从单代理性能预测的新失败模式，如行为漂移。本研究针对代理间对话中的'回音'失败，即代理放弃角色并镜像对方，导致目标破坏。这个问题在代理交互中尤为突出，因为缺乏人类提供的稳定信号，影响了多代理系统的可靠性和效率，现有研究可能忽视这种独特交互带来的挑战。
light_analysis.method: 研究通过大规模实验探究'回音'现象，涉及66个代理配置、4个领域（包括交易和咨询），收集了2500多个对话，超过250,000次LLM推理。核心方法包括分析提示和对话动态，发现回音在交互长度增加（超过7个代理轮次）时出现，并非实验设计缺陷。最后，引入协议级缓解措施，使用结构化响应来减少回音率。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，'回音'在主要LLM提供商中普遍存在，率高达70%，具体取决于模型和领域。在先进推理模型中，回音率仍达32.8%，且不随推理努力而降低。与未缓解的情况对比，使用结构化响应后，回音率降至9%，证明了缓解方法的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究揭示了LLM代理间交互中的'回音'失败，强调多代理系统面临的新挑战。主要贡献包括实证分析失败机制和提出缓解策略，有助于提升代理系统的可靠性和应用价值。未来工作可扩展到更多交互场景或优化缓解方法，摘要未明确说明具体局限性。

title: Are We Asking the Right Questions? On Ambiguity in Natural Language Queries for Tabular Data Analysis
abstract: Natural language interfaces to tabular data must handle ambiguities inherent to queries. Instead of treating ambiguity as a deficiency, we reframe it as a feature of cooperative interaction where users are intentional about the degree to which they specify queries. We develop a principled framework based on a shared responsibility of query specification between user and system, distinguishing unambiguous and ambiguous cooperative queries, which systems can resolve through reasonable inference, from uncooperative queries that cannot be resolved. Applying the framework to evaluations for tabular question answering and analysis, we analyze queries in 15 datasets, and observe an uncontrolled mixing of query types neither adequate for evaluating a system's accuracy nor for evaluating interpretation capabilities. This conceptualization around cooperation in resolving queries informs how to design and evaluate natural language interfaces for tabular data analysis, for which we distill concrete directions for future research and broader implications.
comment: Accepted to the AI for Tabular Data workshop at EurIPS 2025

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出一个基于用户-系统合作的新框架，将自然语言查询的歧义性视为交互特征而非缺陷，为表格数据分析的界面设计和评估提供新视角。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机是解决自然语言界面处理表格数据查询时的歧义性问题。当前方法常将歧义视为缺陷，而本研究重新思考这一问题，认为歧义性是用户有意控制查询明确程度的特征，这反映了用户与系统的合作交互。现有方法可能未充分区分查询类型，导致评估不准确，影响了系统实用性和用户体验。因此，本研究旨在探索如何更好地处理歧义性，以提高自然语言界面的交互效果和评估效率。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法包括开发一个原则性框架，基于用户和系统在查询规范中的共享责任，将查询分类为明确查询、可模糊解决的合作查询和不可解决的非合作查询。关键创新点在于重新定义歧义性，并将其整合到交互模型中，强调系统通过合理推理解决模糊查询的能力。应用该框架分析15个数据集中的查询，识别查询类型混合的问题，但未明确说明具体的数据集细节或模型架构，主要侧重于理论构建和概念分析。
light_analysis.result: 主要实验结果摘要未明确说明具体性能指标或与基线的对比数据。通过分析15个数据集的查询，研究者观察到查询类型的混合状态，认为这不适用于评估系统准确性或解释能力。结果突出了现有评估方法的局限性，但未提供定量改进如准确率提升，仅侧重于定性分析，指出需要更精准的查询分类来优化自然语言界面的评估框架。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是提供一个新框架，将歧义性视为合作交互的特征，为自然语言界面的设计和评估提供理论指导。研究具有学术价值，推动了对表格数据分析中查询处理的理解，并具有实际应用价值，可改善用户与系统的交互体验。潜在局限性包括未涉及具体技术实现，未来工作方向包括开发基于此框架的具体算法、评估标准以及扩展应用到更广泛的数据分析场景中。

title: Graph Homomorphism Distortion: A Metric to Distinguish Them All and in the Latent Space Bind Them
abstract: A large driver of the complexity of graph learning is the interplay between structure and features. When analyzing the expressivity of graph neural networks, however, existing approaches ignore features in favor of structure, making it nigh-impossible to assess to what extent two graphs with close features should be considered similar. We address this by developing a new (pseudo-)metric based on graph homomorphisms. Inspired by concepts from metric geometry, our graph homomorphism distortion measures the minimal worst-case distortion that node features of one graph are subjected to when mapping one graph to another. We demonstrate the utility of our novel measure by showing that (i.) it can be efficiently calculated under some additional assumptions, (ii.) it complements existing expressivity measures like $1$-WL, and (iii.) it permits defining structural encodings, which improve the predictive capabilities of graph neural networks.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出一种基于图同态的伪度量，用于量化图结构和节点特征的相互作用，以改进图神经网络的表达能力评估。
light_analysis.motivation: 图学习的复杂性源于结构和特征的交互，但现有方法在分析图神经网络表达能力时仅关注结构而忽视特征，导致难以评估特征相近图的相似性。这一问题至关重要，因为特征相似性影响模型的泛化能力；现有方法如1-WL测试仅衡量结构差异，缺乏综合考虑特征的度量标准，限制了图学习性能的进一步提升，尤其在处理节点特征丰富的场景中。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法基于图同态失真度量，受度量几何启发，通过图同态映射计算节点特征的最小最坏失真来量化图和特征关系。核心创新在于将特征纳入度量体系，定义失真函数评估特征变化，并在额外假设下实现高效计算，例如简化映射条件以降低复杂性。该方法补充了现有表达能力度量如1-WL测试，并允许定义结构编码以生成新的图表示，不依赖具体数据集，而是聚焦于理论框架和算法设计。
light_analysis.result: 主要实验结果表明，该度量在额外假设下可高效计算，避免了计算复杂性，提升了实用性。它补充了现有表达能力度量如1-WL测试，提供一种更全面的图相似性评估；同时，通过结构编码改善了图神经网络的预测能力，尽管摘要未明确说明具体性能指标如准确率提升的数值。与基线方法的对比显示其在结合结构和特征方面具有优势，增强了模型表达和预测效果。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文贡献在于开发了一种基于图同态的伪度量，弥补了现有图神经网络分析方法只关注结构的不足，提供了同时量化图和特征的工具。学术价值在于推进图学习理论，实际应用可用于设计更优的图嵌入和编码以提升任务性能。局限性在于计算效率依赖于额外假设，未来工作可探索更一般的计算方法或在多样化图学习场景中的扩展。

title: MotionStream: Real-Time Video Generation with Interactive Motion Controls
abstract: Current motion-conditioned video generation methods suffer from prohibitive latency (minutes per video) and non-causal processing that prevents real-time interaction. We present MotionStream, enabling sub-second latency with up to 29 FPS streaming generation on a single GPU. Our approach begins by augmenting a text-to-video model with motion control, which generates high-quality videos that adhere to the global text prompt and local motion guidance, but does not perform inference on the fly. As such, we distill this bidirectional teacher into a causal student through Self Forcing with Distribution Matching Distillation, enabling real-time streaming inference. Several key challenges arise when generating videos of long, potentially infinite time-horizons -- (1) bridging the domain gap from training on finite length and extrapolating to infinite horizons, (2) sustaining high quality by preventing error accumulation, and (3) maintaining fast inference, without incurring growth in computational cost due to increasing context windows. A key to our approach is introducing carefully designed sliding-window causal attention, combined with attention sinks. By incorporating self-rollout with attention sinks and KV cache rolling during training, we properly simulate inference-time extrapolations with a fixed context window, enabling constant-speed generation of arbitrarily long videos. Our models achieve state-of-the-art results in motion following and video quality while being two orders of magnitude faster, uniquely enabling infinite-length streaming. With MotionStream, users can paint trajectories, control cameras, or transfer motion, and see results unfold in real-time, delivering a truly interactive experience.

light_analysis.overview: MotionStream 通过因果蒸馏和滑动窗口注意力机制，实现了实时交互式视频生成，具有亚秒延迟和高达29 FPS的流式性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前运动条件视频生成方法面临分钟级高延迟和非因果处理问题，无法支持实时交互，限制了用户与视频生成系统的互动体验。这在实际应用中，如交互式内容创作或实时反馈场景中尤为重要。现有方法虽能生成高质量视频，但需离线处理，导致无法在运行时响应用户输入。本研究旨在解决这一瓶颈，通过降低延迟并实现因果推理，以推动更自然的人机交互。
light_analysis.method: 论文采用两步法：首先增强基于文本到视频的模型，结合全局文本提示和局部运动指导，生成高质量视频；然后通过 Self Forcing with Distribution Matching Distillation 技术将双向教师模型蒸馏为因果学生模型，以实现实时流式推理。为处理长或无限时长视频生成的挑战，引入滑动窗口因果注意力和 attention sinks，结合 KV 缓存滚动，在训练中模拟推断时的外推，确保恒定速度生成任意长度视频，避免错误累积和计算成本增长。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，MotionStream 在运动跟随和视频质量上达到最先进水平，同时生成速度快两个数量级，实现高达29 FPS的流式生成，延迟降低至亚秒。与基线方法相比，这显著提升了效率，支持无限长度视频的实时生成。具体性能体现在亚秒级响应和高质量输出上，但摘要未明确说明具体基线对比数据。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是实现实时交互式视频生成，解决了长视频生成中的领域差距、错误累积和计算成本增长等挑战。学术价值在于推动了因果推理和注意力机制在视频生成领域的应用；实际应用中，用户可通过绘画轨迹、控制相机或转移运动等方式进行实时交互，提升用户体验。未来工作可能包括进一步优化模型效率或扩展到更复杂运动场景。

title: CASR-Net: An Image Processing-focused Deep Learning-based Coronary Artery Segmentation and Refinement Network for X-ray Coronary Angiogram
abstract: Early detection of coronary artery disease (CAD) is critical for reducing mortality and improving patient treatment planning. While angiographic image analysis from X-rays is a common and cost-effective method for identifying cardiac abnormalities, including stenotic coronary arteries, poor image quality can significantly impede clinical diagnosis. We present the Coronary Artery Segmentation and Refinement Network (CASR-Net), a three-stage pipeline comprising image preprocessing, segmentation, and refinement. A novel multichannel preprocessing strategy combining CLAHE and an improved Ben Graham method provides incremental gains, increasing Dice Score Coefficient (DSC) by 0.31-0.89% and Intersection over Union (IoU) by 0.40-1.16% compared with using the techniques individually. The core innovation is a segmentation network built on a UNet with a DenseNet121 encoder and a Self-organized Operational Neural Network (Self-ONN) based decoder, which preserves the continuity of narrow and stenotic vessel branches. A final contour refinement module further suppresses false positives. Evaluated with 5-fold cross-validation on a combination of two public datasets that contain both healthy and stenotic arteries, CASR-Net outperformed several state-of-the-art models, achieving an IoU of 61.43%, a DSC of 76.10%, and clDice of 79.36%. These results highlight a robust approach to automated coronary artery segmentation, offering a valuable tool to support clinicians in diagnosis and treatment planning.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CASR-Net网络，通过多通道预处理和创新分割架构，提升X射线冠状动脉血管分割精度。
light_analysis.motivation: 冠状动脉疾病早期检测对降低死亡率和改善治疗规划至关重要。X射线血管造影是常用且经济的方法，用于识别包括狭窄血管在内的异常，但图像质量差严重阻碍临床诊断。现有分割方法在处理低质量图像时可能表现不佳，导致误诊或漏诊，因此需要开发更鲁棒的技术来支持精准诊断，提高自动化分割的准确性和可靠性。
light_analysis.method: CASR-Net采用三阶段管道：图像预处理、分割和细化。预处理策略结合CLAHE和改进的Ben Graham方法，通过多通道处理提升分割性能。核心创新是分割网络基于UNet架构，使用DenseNet121作为编码器，Self-ONN作为解码器，有效保持狭窄血管分支的连续性，减少信息丢失。最终，轮廓细化模块进一步抑制假阳性。研究在两个公共数据集上评估，包含健康和狭窄动脉，以确保模型泛化能力。
light_analysis.result: 通过5折交叉验证，CASR-Net在组合数据集上表现出色，优于多个先进模型。具体指标包括IoU为61.43%，DSC为76.10%，clDice为79.36%。与基线方法相比，预处理策略使DSC提升0.31-0.89%、IoU提升0.40-1.16%，凸显了模型在分割精度和鲁棒性方面的显著改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究提出CASR-Net，提供了一个鲁棒的自动冠状动脉分割方法。学术上，通过创新预处理和Self-ONN解码器改进分割性能，提升了连续血管分支的保持能力；实际上，为临床医生提供辅助诊断和治疗规划的工具，有望提高早期疾病检测效率。未来可进一步探索在更复杂临床场景下的应用和优化计算效率。

title: Boosted Trees on a Diet: Compact Models for Resource-Constrained Devices
abstract: Deploying machine learning models on compute-constrained devices has become a key building block of modern IoT applications. In this work, we present a compression scheme for boosted decision trees, addressing the growing need for lightweight machine learning models. Specifically, we provide techniques for training compact boosted decision tree ensembles that exhibit a reduced memory footprint by rewarding, among other things, the reuse of features and thresholds during training. Our experimental evaluation shows that models achieved the same performance with a compression ratio of 4-16x compared to LightGBM models using an adapted training process and an alternative memory layout. Once deployed, the corresponding IoT devices can operate independently of constant communication or external energy supply, and, thus, autonomously, requiring only minimal computing power and energy. This capability opens the door to a wide range of IoT applications, including remote monitoring, edge analytics, and real-time decision making in isolated or power-limited environments.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出一种压缩提升决策树的方案，通过奖励特征和阈值重用，训练紧凑模型以减少内存占用，适用于资源受限设备部署。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机在于部署机器学习模型在计算和能源受限的物联网设备上面临挑战，现有方法如标准提升决策树模型（例如LightGBM）内存占用大，不适应资源有限的环境，导致设备依赖外部通信和能源，限制了自主操作和实时应用。因此，开发轻量级模型对支持边缘计算、远程监控等物联网应用至关重要，以提升设备独立性和能效。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出一种压缩方案，核心是训练紧凑的提升决策树集成。方法通过在训练过程中奖励特征和阈值的重用，优化模型结构以减少内存占用，具体包括调整训练过程（如损失函数优化）和采用替代内存布局来存储模型参数。尽管摘要未明确说明具体数据集和模型架构细节，技术重点在于特征共享和阈值复用，以实现模型轻量化。
light_analysis.result: 实验评估显示，提出的模型在压缩比达到4-16倍的情况下，性能与基线方法LightGBM相当，表明在保持准确性不变的同时，内存使用显著减少。这通过调整训练过程和内存布局实现，使得模型更适合资源受限设备部署，支持独立操作，提升物联网应用的可行性和效率。
light_analysis.conclusion: 结论指出，该压缩方案使物联网设备能够自主操作，仅需最小计算能力和能源，适用于远程监控、边缘分析和实时决策等场景。研究贡献在于提出高效的模型压缩方法，具有重要的学术和实际价值，为资源受限环境中的机器学习部署提供解决方案，但摘要未明确说明潜在局限性和未来工作方向。

title: Are Language Models Borrowing-Blind? A Multilingual Evaluation of Loanword Identification across 10 Languages
abstract: Throughout language history, words are borrowed from one language to another and gradually become integrated into the recipient's lexicon. Speakers can often differentiate these loanwords from native vocabulary, particularly in bilingual communities where a dominant language continuously imposes lexical items on a minority language. This paper investigates whether pretrained language models, including large language models, possess similar capabilities for loanword identification. We evaluate multiple models across 10 languages. Despite explicit instructions and contextual information, our results show that models perform poorly in distinguishing loanwords from native ones. These findings corroborate previous evidence that modern NLP systems exhibit a bias toward loanwords rather than native equivalents. Our work has implications for developing NLP tools for minority languages and supporting language preservation in communities under lexical pressure from dominant languages.

light_analysis.overview: 本论文通过多语言评估揭示了预训练语言模型在识别借词上表现不佳并偏向借词，对少数语言NLP工具开发有重要启示。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究旨在探索预训练语言模型是否具备类似人类在双语社区中区分借词与原生词的能力，这对少数语言自然语言处理工具开发和语言保护至关重要。现有自然语言处理系统可能存在对借词的偏见，导致在处理受主导语言影响的词汇时表现不准确，这一问题突出了评估模型处理借词识别能力的必要性，以支持语言多样性和公平性。
light_analysis.method: 论文采用多语言评估方法，研究多个预训练语言模型（包括大语言模型）在借词识别任务上的表现。实验覆盖10种语言，通过提供明确的指令和上下文信息来测试模型区分借词和原生词的能力。关键创新点在于系统的多语言范围评估，尽管摘要未明确说明具体使用的模型架构或数据集，但强调了上下文信息的利用来模拟真实语言场景。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，预训练语言模型在区分借词和原生词方面表现不佳，尽管有上下文支持，模型难以准确识别借词。这一结果与先前证据一致，表明现代自然语言处理系统倾向于偏向借词而非原生等效词，具体性能指标如准确率等在摘要中未明确说明，但突出了模型能力的局限性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究贡献在于系统评估了预训练语言模型在多语言借词识别上的表现，揭示了其偏向借词的偏见和能力不足。学术价值在于深化了对语言模型处理词汇多样性问题的理解，实际应用价值体现在为少数语言自然语言处理工具开发提供依据，支持语言保护工作。未来工作可能包括改进模型以更好地处理借词识别，并扩展到更多语言。

title: Policy Transfer for Continuous-Time Reinforcement Learning: A (Rough) Differential Equation Approach
abstract: This paper studies policy transfer, one of the well-known transfer learning techniques adopted in large language models, for continuous-time reinforcement learning problems. In the case of continuous-time linear-quadratic systems with Shannon's entropy regularization, we fully exploit the Gaussian structure of their optimal policy and the stability of their associated Riccati equations. In the general case where the system has possibly non-linear and bounded dynamics, the key technical component is the stability of diffusion SDEs which is established by invoking the rough path theory. Our work provides the first theoretical proof of policy transfer for continuous-time RL: an optimal policy learned for one RL problem can be used to initialize to search for a near-optimal policy for another closely related RL problem, while achieving (at least) the same rate of convergence for the original algorithm. As a byproduct of our analysis, we derive the stability of a concrete class of continuous-time score-based diffusion models via their connection with LQRs.   To illustrate the benefit of policy transfer for RL, we propose a novel policy learning algorithm for continuous-time LQRs, which achieves global linear convergence and local super-linear convergence.

light_analysis.overview: 本论文首次为连续时间强化学习中的策略迁移提供理论证明，并通过粗糙路径理论推导扩散模型的稳定性，提出一种高效策略学习算法。
light_analysis.motivation: 策略迁移作为迁移学习的关键技术，在大型语言模型中广泛应用，但在连续时间强化学习领域，其理论基础尚未建立。现有方法可能缺乏严格的理论支持，特别是在处理非线性动态系统时。因此，本研究旨在解决连续时间RL中策略迁移的理论空白，探索如何将学习到的最优策略迁移到相关问题上，以提高学习效率和收敛性，这对于推动RL理论发展和实际应用至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 论文采用微分方程方法处理连续时间强化学习中的策略迁移问题。对于连续时间线性二次系统，充分利用最优策略的高斯结构和关联Riccati方程的稳定性。在一般非线性有界动态系统中，关键技术是应用粗糙路径理论来分析扩散随机微分方程的稳定性，从而为策略迁移建立理论基础。这种方法结合了控制理论和随机分析，提供了处理复杂系统的创新路径。
light_analysis.result: 研究首次为连续时间RL中的策略迁移提供了理论证明，表明从一个RL问题中学到的最优策略可用于初始化搜索相关问题的近优策略，并保持相同的收敛率。作为副产品，通过连接线性二次调节器，推导了一类连续时间基于分数的扩散模型的稳定性。此外，提出的新策略学习算法在连续时间LQRs中实现全局线性收敛和局部超线性收敛，展示了策略迁移在算法性能提升中的实际效益，摘要未明确说明具体实验数据。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献包括为连续时间强化学习中的策略迁移提供了首次理论证明，通过粗糙路径理论拓展到非线性系统，并连接了扩散模型以增强理论深度。提出的新算法在连续时间LQRs中表现出高效收敛性，展示了策略迁移的实际应用价值。这项工作填补了理论空白，为连续时间RL的发展提供了新方向，未来可扩展至更广泛的系统类型和算法优化，以提升鲁棒性和通用性。

title: Map the Flow: Revealing Hidden Pathways of Information in VideoLLMs
abstract: Video Large Language Models (VideoLLMs) extend the capabilities of vision-language models to spatiotemporal inputs, enabling tasks such as video question answering (VideoQA). Despite recent advances in VideoLLMs, their internal mechanisms on where and how they extract and propagate video and textual information remain less explored. In this study, we investigate the internal information flow of VideoLLMs using mechanistic interpretability techniques. Our analysis reveals consistent patterns across diverse VideoQA tasks: (1) temporal reasoning in VideoLLMs initiates with active cross-frame interactions in early-to-middle layers, (2) followed by progressive video-language integration in middle layers. This is facilitated by alignment between video representations and linguistic embeddings containing temporal concepts. (3) Upon completion of this integration, the model is ready to generate correct answers in middle-to-late layers. (4) Based on our analysis, we show that VideoLLMs retain their VideoQA performance by selecting these effective information pathways while suppressing a substantial amount of attention edges, e.g., 58% in LLaVA-NeXT-7B-Video-FT. These findings provide a blueprint for how VideoLLMs perform temporal reasoning and offer practical insights for improving model interpretability and downstream generalization. Our project page with the source code is available at https://map-the-flow.github.io

light_analysis.overview: 本研究通过机械解释性技术揭示了Video Large Language Models在视频问答任务中的内部信息流模式，提供了时间推理的层次化蓝图。
light_analysis.motivation: VideoLLMs扩展了视觉语言模型至时空输入，支持视频问答等任务，但其内部机制——特别是视频和文本信息的提取与传播路径——仍未被充分探索。现有研究缺乏对VideoLLMs如何执行时间推理的深入理解，这限制了模型的可解释性和下游任务的泛化能力。因此，本研究旨在填补这一空白，通过分析内部信息流来揭示隐藏的机制，为解决这些问题提供基础。
light_analysis.method: 论文采用机械解释性技术分析VideoLLMs的内部信息流，通过探测模型不同层来识别信息传播模式。关键创新点在于揭示了时间推理的层次化过程：早期到中层激活跨帧交互，中层逐步对齐视频表示与包含时间概念的词嵌入。研究以LLaVA-NeXT-7B-Video-FT模型为例，但摘要未明确说明具体数据集和架构细节，仅依赖注意力机制分析。
light_analysis.result: 分析揭示了VideoLLMs在多种视频问答任务中的一致模式：时间推理起始于早期到中层的跨帧交互；中层逐步整合视频和语言信息；完成后在中后层生成正确答案。具体数据显示，模型通过选择有效路径并抑制注意力边来维持性能，例如在LLaVA-NeXT-7B-Video-FT中抑制了58%的注意力边。摘要未明确对比基线方法的性能提升，但强调了内部机制的优化作用。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提供VideoLLMs时间推理的内部蓝图，揭示了信息流的层次化模式，增强了模型的可解释性。学术价值在于深化了对VideoLLMs工作机制的理解；实际应用中，可指导模型设计以提高下游任务泛化。局限性或未来工作未明确说明，但可能涉及验证这些模式在其他模型或任务中的应用。

title: Reducing Belief Deviation in Reinforcement Learning for Active Reasoning
abstract: Active reasoning requires large language model (LLM) agents to interact with external sources and strategically gather information to solve problems in multiple turns. Central to this process is belief tracking: maintaining an accurate representation of the underlying state and uncertainty in understanding and solving the problem. However, due to limited reasoning capabilities, LLM-based agents often suffer belief deviation: their internal beliefs drift from the true problem state, leading to loss of state awareness and uninformative or repetitive actions. Once this happens, errors compound in the trajectories used for reinforcement learning (RL), leading to misattributed credits and limited exploration. To address this issue, we propose to track belief deviation and develop $\mathbf{T^3}$, a simple yet principled method that detects excessive deviation and truncates training trajectories to suppress uninformative tail effects. Hence, $\mathbf{T^3}$ preserves credits for informative prefixes and systematically improves policy optimization. Across 5 challenging tasks, $\mathbf{T^3}$ consistently enhances training stability and yields performance gains of up to 30 points while cutting token cost by up to 34%. These results highlight belief control as a key principle for building robust LLM agents capable of active reasoning.
comment: Published as a conference paper at ICLR 2026 (Oral)

light_analysis.overview: 提出T^3方法，通过跟踪信念偏差并截断训练轨迹来减少强化学习中的信念偏差，提升LLM代理在主动推理中的性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 在主动推理中，大型语言模型（LLM）代理需要交互外部源并策略性收集信息以解决多轮问题，其中信念跟踪是关键。然而，由于LLM推理能力有限，代理常出现信念偏差，导致内部信念偏离真实状态，引发无信息或重复动作。此偏差在强化学习（RL）轨迹中累积，造成信用分配错误和探索受限，降低了RL训练的效率，现有方法未能有效控制偏差累积，限制了LLM代理的健壮性和实用性。
light_analysis.method: 论文开发了T^3方法，这是一种简单而有原则的技术，通过跟踪信念偏差来检测过度偏差，并截断训练轨迹以抑制无信息尾部效应。关键创新在于保留信息前缀的信用，系统性改进策略优化，从而减少信念偏差的影响。T^3基于信念控制原则，适用于LLM代理的强化学习框架，摘要未明确说明具体数据集和模型架构，但可推断其整合了偏差检测与轨迹截断机制来提升训练过程。
light_analysis.result: 在5个挑战性任务上的实验表明，T^3方法显著提升了训练稳定性，并带来性能增益，最高达30点。同时，令牌成本降低达34%，显示了效率的改进。这些结果与基线方法相比，T^3在减少信念偏差和增强代理表现方面效果突出，摘要未明确说明基线细节，但暗示了其在性能提升和成本削减上的优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究的主要贡献是提出了T^3方法，有效控制信念偏差，提升LLM代理在主动推理中的RL性能。学术上，强调了信念控制作为构建健壮LLM代理的关键原则；实际应用中，T^3通过优化信用分配和探索，为开发高效主动推理代理提供了新途径。未来工作可能包括扩展应用到更多领域或进一步精炼偏差检测算法，但摘要未明确说明具体方向。

title: Reasoning as Representation: Rethinking Visual Reinforcement Learning in Image Quality Assessment
abstract: Reasoning-based image quality assessment (IQA) models trained through reinforcement learning (RL) exhibit exceptional generalization, yet the underlying mechanisms and critical factors driving this capability remain underexplored in current research. Moreover, despite their superior performance, these models incur inference energy usage and latency orders of magnitude higher than their earlier counterparts, restricting their deployment in specific scenarios. Through extensive experiments, this paper verifies and elaborates that through RL training, MLLMs leverage their reasoning capability to convert redundant visual representations into compact, cross-domain aligned text representations. This conversion is precisely the source of the generalization exhibited by these reasoning-based IQA models. Building on this fundamental insight, we propose a novel algorithm, RALI, which employs contrastive learning to directly align images with these generalizable text representations learned by RL. This approach eliminates the reliance on reasoning processes and even obviates the need to load an LLM. For the quality scoring task, this framework achieves generalization performance comparable to reasoning-based models while requiring less than 5% of their model parameters and inference time.

light_analysis.overview: RALI算法通过对比学习直接对齐图像与强化学习训练的文本表示，显著降低推理开销并保持泛化性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 基于推理的图像质量评估模型通过强化学习训练展现出卓越泛化能力，但其高推理能耗和延迟限制了在特定场景的部署。当前研究对泛化机制探索不足，无法有效解决效率问题，现有方法虽性能优越但难以实用化。因此，亟需揭示其机制并开发更高效的替代方法，以促进实际应用并弥补现有研究的空白。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出RALI算法，利用对比学习直接将图像与通过强化学习训练学到的紧凑、跨域对齐文本表示对齐。关键创新在于消除推理过程的需求，无需加载大型语言模型，从而简化模型架构并降低复杂度。该方法基于实验验证的洞察，即强化学习训练使模型将冗余视觉表示转换为通用文本表示，为泛化提供基础。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，RALI框架在图像质量评分任务上实现与基于推理的模型相当的泛化性能。具体而言，所需模型参数和推理时间减少至5%以下，显著提升效率，资源消耗大幅降低。与基线方法对比，RALI在保持性能的同时，展示了更高的实用性和部署潜力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究揭示了基于推理的图像质量评估模型泛化机制的核心是强化学习生成的文本表示，并提出高效的RALI算法。学术价值在于深化对视觉强化学习的理解，实际应用价值在于促进高效模型部署，推动图像质量评估领域的进展。未来可探索更多跨域应用和技术优化方向。

title: Efficient Resource-Constrained Training of Transformers via Subspace Optimization
abstract: As AI increasingly shapes daily life, energy consumption and data privacy have become pressing concerns. On-device learning trains models directly on edge devices, cutting energy consumption and safeguarding data privacy. However, the expanding scale of modern neural networks creates a major obstacle for on-device training. Although prior work has concentrated on compact convolutional architectures, we instead apply subspace-based training to transformer models. Motivated by the idea that a model's essential information lies in a fixed subspace, we introduce Weight-Activation Subspace Iteration (WASI), a method that mitigates the memory bottleneck of backpropagation and boosts inference efficiency in transformer models by restricting training to this subspace. Our results demonstrate that WASI maintains accuracy comparable to vanilla training while reducing memory usage by up to $62\times$ and computational cost (FLOPs) by up to $2\times$. On a Raspberry Pi 5, WASI achieves roughly $1.4\times$ faster training and inference than vanilla training. The code is available at https://github.com/Le-TrungNguyen/ICLR2026-WASI.git.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出WASI方法，通过子空间优化在资源受限设备上高效训练transformer模型。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着AI技术在日常生活中的广泛应用，能耗和数据隐私问题日益突出。设备上学习直接在边缘设备训练模型，能有效减少能源消耗并保护数据安全。然而，现代神经网络特别是transformer模型的规模不断扩大，导致在资源有限的设备上进行训练面临严重的内存和计算瓶颈。现有研究主要集中在设计紧凑的卷积架构，而对transformer模型的优化方法较少，因此需要创新技术来解决这一挑战，提高设备上学习的可行性。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出了Weight-Activation Subspace Iteration（WASI）方法，基于子空间优化的思想。关键创新在于假设transformer模型的核心信息位于一个低维子空间，因此通过将训练过程限制在这个子空间内，可以减少反向传播的内存需求和计算开销。WASI通过迭代优化权重和激活的子空间，避免完整的反向传播，从而缓解内存瓶颈并提升推理效率。该方法专门针对transformer架构设计，适用于资源受限的边缘设备训练场景。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，WASI方法在保持与标准训练（vanilla training）相当准确度的同时，显著提升了效率。具体而言，内存使用减少了高达62倍，计算成本（FLOPs）降低了高达2倍。在Raspberry Pi 5这样的资源受限设备上，WASI实现了约1.4倍的训练和推理加速。这些数据验证了WASI在资源约束条件下优化transformer模型训练的有效性，展示了其在减少资源消耗方面的突出优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文的主要贡献是提出了Weight-Activation Subspace Iteration（WASI）方法，通过子空间优化实现了transformer模型在资源受限设备上的高效训练。学术上，该方法为模型压缩和优化提供了新的思路，扩展了子空间训练的应用范围。实际应用中，WASI有助于推动设备上学习的发展，降低AI部署的能耗并增强数据隐私保护。摘要未明确说明具体局限性或未来工作方向，但可能包括进一步优化子空间选择、扩展到其他神经网络架构或在实际场景中验证性能。

title: MIRAGE: Runtime Scheduling for Multi-Vector Image Retrieval with Hierarchical Decomposition
abstract: To effectively leverage user-specific data, retrieval augmented generation (RAG) is employed in multimodal large language model (MLLM) applications. However, conventional retrieval approaches often suffer from limited retrieval accuracy. Recent advances in multi-vector retrieval (MVR) improve accuracy by decomposing queries and matching against segmented images. They still suffer from sub-optimal accuracy and efficiency, overlooking alignment between the query and varying image objects and redundant fine-grained image segments. In this work, we present an efficient scheduling framework for image retrieval - MIRAGE. First, we introduce a novel hierarchical paradigm, employing multiple intermediate granularities for varying image objects to enhance alignment. Second, we minimize redundancy in retrieval by leveraging cross-hierarchy similarity consistency and hierarchy sparsity to minimize unnecessary matching computation. Furthermore, we configure parameters for each dataset automatically for practicality across diverse scenarios. Our empirical study shows that, MIRAGE not only achieves substantial accuracy improvements but also reduces computation by up to 3.5 times over the existing MVR system.

light_analysis.overview: 提出了MIRAGE框架，通过分层分解和多粒度对齐，提升了多向量图像检索的精度和效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究旨在解决多模态大语言模型应用中检索增强生成技术面临的精度和效率问题。传统检索方法精度有限，而现有多向量检索方法虽通过分解查询和匹配分割图像提高了精度，但仍有子优表现，忽略了查询与不同图像对象的对齐和冗余细粒度图像段，导致效率和效果瓶颈，这对实时应用至关重要。
light_analysis.method: MIRAGE框架采用分层分解范式，引入多个中间粒度以增强查询与图像对象的对齐。通过利用跨层次相似性一致性和层次稀疏性来最小化冗余匹配计算，减少不必要的计算开销。此外，框架自动配置参数以适应不同数据集和场景，提高实用性和效率，无需手动调整。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，MIRAGE在精度上有显著提升，具体数据摘要未明确说明，但计算量减少最多达3.5倍，相较于现有多向量检索系统，在保持高准确度的同时大幅提高了效率，实现了精度和计算开销的双重优化。
light_analysis.conclusion: MIRAGE框架通过创新的分层调度技术，有效解决了多向量检索的精度和效率问题，为多模态应用提供了更实用的解决方案。其学术价值在于改进检索方法，实际价值在于适应多样场景。摘要未明确说明局限性和未来工作方向。

title: Characterizing the Multiclass Learnability of Forgiving 0-1 Loss Functions
abstract: In this paper we will give a characterization of the learnability of forgiving 0-1 loss functions in the multiclass setting with effectively finite cardinality of the output and label space. To do this, we create a new combinatorial dimension that is based off of the Natarajan Dimension and we show that a hypothesis class is learnable in our setting if and only if this Generalized Natarajan Dimension is finite. We also show how this dimension characterizes other known learning settings such as a vast amount of instantiations of learning with set-valued feedback and a modified version of list learning.

light_analysis.overview: 本文通过引入广义纳塔拉詹维度，表征了多类设置中可容忍0-1损失函数的可学习性。
light_analysis.motivation: 在多类机器学习中，损失函数是核心理论问题，标准0-1损失函数虽然广泛研究，但可容忍损失（forgiving loss）更适用于实际场景，因为它允许一定的错误容忍性。现有理论如纳塔拉詹维度主要关注标准损失，不足以处理这种变化。本研究旨在填补这一空白，建立可容忍0-1损失函数在多类学习中的可学习性理论框架，以支持更灵活的模型设计。摘要未明确说明具体应用场景，但动机源于扩展学习理论基础。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法基于组合维度理论，在输出和标签空间有效有限基数的多类设置中，创建了一个新的组合维度——广义纳塔拉詹维度。该维度从标准纳塔拉詹维度扩展而来，旨在捕捉可容忍0-1损失函数的结构特性。技术路线涉及构建维度定义，并利用数学证明来分析假设类的学习性质。摘要未提供具体模型架构或数据集细节，主要聚焦于理论维度构建。
light_analysis.result: 主要理论结果表明，在可容忍0-1损失函数的多类设置中，假设类可学习当且仅当广义纳塔拉詹维度有限。这为可学习性提供了简洁的充要条件。此外，论文展示了该维度还能统一描述其他学习设置，如带有集合值反馈的大量实例和修改版列表学习。摘要未提供具体性能数据（如准确率），但强调理论证明和维度应用，相比基线标准维度，广义维度更通用。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是提供了多类学习中可容忍0-1损失函数可学习性的完整理论表征，通过广义纳塔拉詹维度丰富了学习理论体系。研究具有学术价值，为损失函数设计和多类分类理论提供了新工具，并能在实际中应用于集合值反馈和列表学习等场景。局限性包括假设有效有限基数，未来工作可能推广到无限空间或更复杂的损失函数。摘要未明确说明未来方向，但推断可进一步扩展理论框架。

title: Post-hoc Stochastic Concept Bottleneck Models
abstract: Concept Bottleneck Models (CBMs) are interpretable models that predict the target variable through high-level human-understandable concepts, allowing users to intervene on mispredicted concepts to adjust the final output. While recent work has shown that modeling dependencies between concepts can improve CBM performance, especially under interventions, such approaches typically require retraining the entire model, which may be infeasible when access to the original data or compute is limited. In this paper, we introduce Post-hoc Stochastic Concept Bottleneck Models (PSCBMs), a lightweight method that augments any pre-trained CBM with a multivariate normal distribution over concepts by adding only a small covariance-prediction module, without retraining the backbone model. We propose two training strategies and show on real-world data that PSCBMs consistently match or improve both concept and target accuracy over standard CBMs at test time. Furthermore, we show that due to the modeling of concept dependencies, PSCBMs perform much better than CBMs under interventions, while remaining far more efficient than retraining a similar stochastic model from scratch.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了一种轻量级的后处理随机概念瓶颈模型（PSCBMs），通过添加协方差预测模块增强预训练CBM，无需重新训练主干模型，以提高概念和目标准确率及干预效果。
light_analysis.motivation: 概念瓶颈模型（CBMs）作为可解释模型，允许用户干预概念以调整输出，但在提升性能时，现有方法通常通过建模概念依赖性需要重新训练整个模型。这在原始数据不可用或计算资源有限的情况下不可行，限制了模型的实用性和效率。因此，本研究旨在开发一种无需重新训练的轻量级方法，以更高效地改善CBM的性能，特别是在干预场景中，解决现有方法在资源和可行性上的不足。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出Post-hoc Stochastic Concept Bottleneck Models (PSCBMs)，一种后处理技术，仅向预训练CBM添加一个小型协方差预测模块，将概念建模为多元正态分布以捕获依赖性。关键创新点在于无需重新训练主干模型，通过两种训练策略优化模块。摘要未明确说明具体使用的数据集或模型架构细节，但强调了该方法的轻量级特性，适用于任何预训练CBM，提升了概念建模的灵活性和效率。
light_analysis.result: 在真实世界数据上的实验表明，PSCBMs在测试时一致匹配或优于标准CBMs的概念准确率和目标准确率。具体来说，在用户干预概念的情况下，由于建模了概念依赖性，PSCBMs的表现显著优于CBMs，同时计算效率远高于从头训练类似的随机模型。这些结果验证了PSCBMs在提升性能和高效率方面的优势，尽管摘要未提供具体的准确率数字，但强调了其相对于基线的改进和适用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提出了PSCBMs，一种无需重新训练的后处理方法，有效增强了CBMs的性能和干预能力，提升了可解释模型的实用性。该研究具有学术价值，为资源受限环境下的模型改进提供了新思路，并展示了在真实应用中的潜力。尽管摘要未详细讨论局限性，但未来工作可能涉及扩展到更复杂模型或更多应用场景，进一步优化训练策略以应对大规模数据挑战。

title: Mitigating Over-Refusal in Aligned Large Language Models via Inference-Time Activation Energy
abstract: Safety alignment of large language models currently faces a central challenge: existing alignment techniques often prioritize mitigating responses to harmful prompts at the expense of overcautious behavior, leading models to incorrectly refuse benign requests. A key goal of safe alignment is therefore to improve safety while simultaneously minimizing false refusals. In this work, we introduce Energy Landscape Steering (ELS), a novel, fine-tuning free framework designed to resolve this challenge through dynamic, inference-time intervention. We train a lightweight external Energy-Based Model (EBM) to assign high energy to undesirable states (false refusal or jailbreak) and low energy to desirable states (helpful response or safe reject). During inference, the EBM maps the LLM's internal activations to an energy landscape, and we use the gradient of the energy function to steer the hidden states toward low-energy regions in real time. This dynamically guides the model toward desirable behavior without modifying its parameters. By decoupling behavioral control from the model's core knowledge, ELS provides a flexible and computationally efficient solution. Extensive experiments across diverse models demonstrate its effectiveness, raising compliance on the ORB-H benchmark from 57.3 percent to 82.6 percent while maintaining baseline safety performance. Our work establishes a promising paradigm for building LLMs that simultaneously achieve high safety and low false refusal rates.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Energy Landscape Steering (ELS)框架，通过推理时激活能量引导，减少大语言模型的过度拒绝，平衡安全与合规性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有大语言模型安全对齐技术常导致过度拒绝良性请求，即假拒绝问题，这削弱了模型的实用性和用户体验。研究旨在解决安全对齐中的关键挑战：在提高安全性的同时最小化假拒绝，现有方法往往因过度谨慎而牺牲对良性请求的响应能力，影响模型实际部署价值。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出Energy Landscape Steering (ELS)，一种无需微调的框架，通过推理时干预动态指导模型行为。关键创新包括训练轻量级基于能量的模型（EBM），将LLM的内部激活映射到能量景观，其中低能量对应理想状态（如帮助性响应或安全拒绝），高能量对应不良状态（如假拒绝或越狱）。在推理时，利用能量函数的梯度实时引导隐藏状态向低能量区域，实现行为控制而不修改模型参数，分离了行为调节和核心知识。
light_analysis.result: 在ORB-H基准上的实验显示，ELS将合规性从57.3%显著提升至82.6%，同时保持基线安全性能。该框架在多种大语言模型中经过广泛测试，证明了其有效性，能在不降低安全性的情况下减少过度拒绝，优于传统对齐方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本工作确立了通过推理时激活能量引导构建高安全性和低假拒绝率LLM的新范式，提供灵活且计算效率高的解决方案，分离行为控制和核心模型知识。它为未来安全对齐研究开辟了新方向，潜在应用包括优化其他对齐挑战，但未来工作需进一步评估在更复杂场景下的稳健性。

title: Human3R: Everyone Everywhere All at Once
abstract: We present Human3R, a unified, feed-forward framework for online 4D human-scene reconstruction, in the world frame, from casually captured monocular videos. Unlike previous approaches that rely on multi-stage pipelines, iterative contact-aware refinement between humans and scenes, and heavy dependencies, e.g., human detection, depth estimation, and SLAM pre-processing, Human3R jointly recovers global multi-person SMPL-X bodies ("everyone"), dense 3D scene ("everywhere"), and camera trajectories in a single forward pass ("all-at-once"). Our method builds upon the 4D online reconstruction model CUT3R, and uses parameter-efficient visual prompt tuning, to strive to preserve CUT3R's rich spatiotemporal priors, while enabling direct readout of multiple SMPL-X bodies. Human3R is a unified model that eliminates heavy dependencies and iterative refinement. After being trained on the relatively small-scale synthetic dataset BEDLAM for just one day on one GPU, it achieves superior performance with remarkable efficiency: it reconstructs multiple humans in a one-shot manner, along with 3D scenes, in one stage, in real-time (15 FPS) with a low memory footprint (8 GB). Extensive experiments demonstrate that Human3R delivers state-of-the-art or competitive performance across tasks, including global human motion estimation, local human mesh recovery, video depth estimation, and camera pose estimation, with a single unified model. We hope that Human3R will serve as a simple yet strong baseline, which can be easily adapted for downstream applications. Code, models and 4D interactive demos are available at https://fanegg.github.io/Human3R/.

light_analysis.overview: Human3R 提出一个统一的前馈框架，用于从单目视频在线重建 4D 人类场景，通过单次前向传递联合恢复多人体、3D 场景和相机轨迹，实现高效实时处理。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有人类场景重建方法通常依赖于多阶段流程，包括迭代接触感知精炼，并需要人类检测、深度估计和 SLAM 预处理等重依赖，导致效率低下和复杂性高。这些问题限制了实时应用和可扩展性。本文旨在解决这一痛点，通过开发一个简化框架，消除这些依赖，以支持从日常捕获的单目视频中快速、准确地重建动态场景，从而推动智能交互和虚拟现实等领域的发展。
light_analysis.method: Human3R 基于 4D 在线重建模型 CUT3R，采用参数高效的视觉提示调优技术，以保留丰富的时空先验知识，同时直接输出多个 SMPL-X 人体模型。核心创新在于设计了一个统一的、前馈的框架，无需多阶段管道或迭代精炼。它从单目视频输入中，在单次前向传递中联合恢复全局多人体姿态、密集 3D 场景和相机轨迹，降低了计算复杂度。训练过程使用了合成数据集 BEDLAM，实现了快速模型收敛。
light_analysis.result: 论文实验显示，Human3R 在仅使用一个 GPU 训练一天后，达到了实时性能（15 FPS）和低内存占用（8 GB）。它在多个任务上表现优异，包括全局人体运动估计、局部人体网格恢复、视频深度估计和相机姿态估计。与基线方法相比，Human3R 提供了最先进或竞争性的性能，展示了其作为统一模型的高效性和准确性，验证了单阶段重建的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: Human3R 的主要贡献是提出了一个简单而强大的基准框架，用于在线 4D 人类场景重建，消除了复杂依赖并支持单次前向传递。该研究具有重要学术价值，展示了统一模型在提高效率和性能方面的潜力，并为下游应用如增强现实和机器人导航提供了实用工具。尽管摘要未明确说明局限性，但作为基线模型，其可适应性和泛化能力为未来工作，如扩展到更复杂场景或现实世界数据，奠定了基础。

title: Spectrum Tuning: Post-Training for Distributional Coverage and In-Context Steerability
abstract: Language model post-training has enhanced instruction-following and performance on many downstream tasks, but also comes with an often-overlooked cost on tasks with many possible valid answers. On many tasks such as creative writing, synthetic data generation, or steering to diverse preferences, models must cover an entire distribution of outputs, rather than a single correct answer. We characterize three desiderata for conditional distributional modeling: in-context steerability, valid output space coverage, and distributional alignment, and document across three model families how current post-training can reduce these properties. In particular, we disambiguate between two kinds of in-context learning: ICL for eliciting existing underlying knowledge or capabilities, and in-context steerability, where a model must use in-context information to override its priors and steer to a novel data generating distribution. To better evaluate and improve these desiderata, we introduce Spectrum Suite, a large-scale resource compiled from >40 data sources and spanning >90 tasks requiring models to steer to and match diverse distributions ranging from varied human preferences to numerical distributions and more. We find that while current post-training techniques elicit underlying capabilities and knowledge, they hurt models' ability to flexibly steer in-context. To mitigate these issues, we propose Spectrum Tuning, a post-training method using Spectrum Suite to improve steerability and distributional coverage. We find that Spectrum Tuning often improves over pretrained and typical instruction-tuned models, enhancing steerability, spanning more of the output space, and improving distributional alignment on held-out datasets.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Spectrum Tuning后训练方法，通过Spectrum Suite数据集改善语言模型的上下文可转向性和输出分布覆盖。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究旨在解决语言模型后训练在需要多样化输出任务中的问题。当前后训练虽提升指令跟随性能，但可能损害模型的上下文可转向性、有效输出空间覆盖和分布对齐能力，这在创意写作、合成数据生成和适应不同偏好等任务中尤为重要。现有方法往往忽视这些属性，导致模型灵活性不足，无法覆盖整个输出分布，从而限制了在实际应用中的适应性。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出Spectrum Tuning，一种后训练方法，基于新编译的Spectrum Suite数据集。Spectrum Suite是一个大规模评估资源，来自40多个数据源，覆盖90多个任务，要求模型在上下文中转向并匹配多样化分布，如人类偏好和数值分布。方法通过训练模型使用上下文信息覆盖分布，关键技术是利用任务多样性和分布对齐目标，改进可转向性和覆盖能力。摘要未明确说明具体模型架构，但强调训练策略和数据集的核心作用。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，Spectrum Tuning在多个任务中优于标准预训练和指令调优模型。具体表现为提高了上下文可转向性，扩展了输出空间覆盖范围，并在保留数据集上增强了分布对齐。尽管摘要未提供具体数值指标，但强调该方法有效缓解了传统后训练在分布建模任务中的不足，提升了模型在多样化输出场景中的性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: Spectrum Tuning的核心贡献是提出一种新后训练方法，显著增强了语言模型在上下文可转向性和分布覆盖方面的能力。研究通过Spectrum Suite提供了系统评估框架，具有重要学术价值，促进了在多样化输出生成领域的发展。实际应用可扩展至创意内容生成和个性化系统。未来工作可探索方法优化或应用到更广泛的模型家族，以进一步提升性能。

title: D2E: Scaling Vision-Action Pretraining on Desktop Data for Transfer to Embodied AI
abstract: Large language models leverage internet-scale text data, yet embodied AI remains constrained by the prohibitive costs of physical trajectory collection. Desktop environments -- particularly gaming -- offer a compelling alternative: they provide rich sensorimotor interactions at scale while maintaining the structured observation-action coupling essential for embodied learning. We present D2E (Desktop to Embodied AI), a framework that demonstrates desktop interactions can serve as an effective pretraining substrate for robotics embodied AI tasks. Unlike prior work that remained domain-specific (e.g., VPT for Minecraft) or kept data proprietary (e.g., SIMA), D2E establishes a complete pipeline from scalable desktop data collection to verified transfer in embodied domains. Our framework comprises three components: (1) the OWA Toolkit that unifies diverse desktop interactions into a standardized format with 152x compression, (2) the Generalist-IDM that achieves strong zero-shot generalization across unseen games through timestamp-based event prediction, enabling internet-scale pseudo-labeling, and (3) VAPT that transfers desktop-pretrained representations to physical manipulation and navigation. Using 1.3K+ hours of data (259 hours of human demonstrations and 1K+ hours of pseudo-labeled gameplay), our 1B-parameter model achieves 96.6% success on LIBERO manipulation and 83.3% on CANVAS navigation, matching or surpassing models up to 7x larger, such as π_{0} (3.3B) and OpenVLA (7B). These results demonstrate that sensorimotor primitives learned from digital interactions transfer effectively to real-world physical tasks, establishing desktop pretraining as a practical paradigm for embodied AI. All resources are publicly available at https://worv-ai.github.io/d2e.

light_analysis.overview: D2E框架通过利用桌面数据预训练模型并迁移到实体AI任务，解决了物理数据收集成本高的问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 实体AI面临物理轨迹收集成本高昂的挑战，因为现有方法如VPT局限于特定游戏或SIMA数据私有，无法充分利用桌面环境提供的大规模传感器运动交互数据。桌面游戏虽能提供结构化观察-动作数据，但缺乏统一、可扩展的预训练框架，因此需要开发通用方法以促进实体AI的迁移学习。
light_analysis.method: D2E框架包含三个核心组件：OWA Toolkit统一多样桌面交互为标准格式并压缩152倍；Generalist-IDM通过基于时间戳的事件预测实现零样本泛化，支持互联网规模伪标签生成；VAPT将桌面预训练表示迁移到物理操作和导航任务。使用1.3K+小时数据（包括259小时人类演示和1K+小时伪标签游戏数据）训练1B参数模型。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，在LIBERO操作任务上达到96.6%成功率，CANVAS导航任务上83.3%成功率。该1B参数模型匹配或超越了更大模型如π_{0}（3.3B）和OpenVLA（7B），证明了桌面预训练在提升实体AI任务性能方面的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文表明，从数字交互学习到的传感器运动原语能有效迁移到现实世界物理任务，确立了桌面预训练作为实体AI的实用范式。所有资源公开可用，为后续研究提供了基础，但未来可能需探索更广泛的数据源和任务扩展。

title: A Set of Quebec-French Corpus of Regional Expressions and Terms
abstract: The tasks of idiom understanding and dialect understanding are both well-established benchmarks in natural language processing. In this paper, we propose combining them, and using regional idioms as a test of dialect understanding. Towards this end, we propose two new benchmark datasets for the Quebec dialect of French: QFrCoRE, which contains 4,633 instances of idiomatic phrases, and QFrCoRT, which comprises 171 regional instances of idiomatic words, and a new benchmark for French Metropolitan expressions, MFrCoE, which comprises 4,938 phrases. We explain how to construct these corpora, so that our methodology can be replicated for other dialects. Our experiments with 111 LLMs reveal a critical disparity in dialectal competence: while models perform well on French Metropolitan , 65.8% of them perform significantly worse on Quebec idioms, with only 9.0% favoring the regional dialect. These results confirm that our benchmarks are a reliable tool for quantifying the dialect gap and that prestige-language proficiency does not guarantee regional dialect understanding.
comment: Submitted to ACL Rolling Review of October

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出新的魁北克法语习语基准数据集，用于量化大型语言模型在区域方言理解上的差距。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究旨在解决自然语言处理中方言理解的不足，特别是在区域方言习语方面。现有模型通常在主流方言（如法国本土法语）上表现良好，但忽略了对区域语言变体（如魁北克法语）的细微理解，这可能导致语言技术在实际应用中缺乏包容性。通过结合习语理解和方言理解，该研究强调了量化这种差距的重要性，以促进更全面和公平的语言模型开发，避免因模型偏见导致的方言歧视问题。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出构建魁北克法语习语基准数据集的方法，包括QFrCoRE（包含4,633个习语短语实例）和QFrCoRT（包含171个区域性习语单词实例），以及法国本土表达基准MFrCoE（包含4,938个短语）。关键创新在于将习语理解与方言理解结合，并详细解释语料库构建过程，使其可复制到其他方言。实验中使用了111个大型语言模型进行评估，通过设计这些数据集来测试模型对区域方言的掌握程度，方法包括数据收集、标注和标准化处理。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，大型语言模型在法国本土表达上表现良好，但在魁北克习语上存在显著差距：65.8%的模型在区域方言习语上表现更差，仅有9.0%的模型偏好魁北克方言。这些数据证实了方言理解能力的严重不足，基准数据集有效量化了这种差距，表明模型在主流语言上的熟练度不能保证对区域方言的理解。与基线方法对比，结果突出了模型在方言多样性方面的局限性，为后续改进提供了实证依据。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究的主要贡献是提出了用于量化方言理解差距的可靠基准工具，并揭示了大型语言模型在区域方言上的表现不佳。学术上，它为自然语言处理中的方言研究提供了新方向，促进了模型多样性和公平性。实际应用中，有助于开发更全面的语言技术，适应不同方言社区。潜在局限性包括数据集可能仅限于特定方言，未来工作可以扩展到其他方言或探索改进模型的方法，以缩小方言差距并增强语言技术的包容性。

title: LaDiR: Latent Diffusion Enhances LLMs for Text Reasoning
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) demonstrate their reasoning ability through chain-of-thought (CoT) generation. However, LLM's autoregressive decoding may limit the ability to revisit and refine earlier tokens in a holistic manner, which can also lead to inefficient exploration for diverse solutions. In this paper, we propose LaDiR (Latent Diffusion Reasoner), a novel reasoning framework that unifies the expressiveness of continuous latent representation with the iterative refinement capabilities of latent diffusion models for an existing LLM. We first construct a structured latent reasoning space using a Variational Autoencoder (VAE) that encodes text reasoning steps into blocks of thought tokens, preserving semantic information and interpretability while offering compact but expressive representations. Subsequently, we utilize a latent diffusion model that learns to denoise a block of latent thought tokens with a blockwise bidirectional attention mask, enabling longer horizon and iterative refinement with adaptive test-time compute. This design allows efficient parallel generation of diverse reasoning trajectories, allowing the model to plan and revise the reasoning process holistically. We conduct evaluations on a suite of mathematical reasoning and planning benchmarks. Empirical results show that LaDiR consistently improves accuracy, diversity, and interpretability over existing autoregressive, diffusion-based, and latent reasoning methods, revealing a new paradigm for text reasoning with latent diffusion.

light_analysis.overview: 提出LaDiR框架，结合潜在扩散模型增强大型语言模型，通过迭代精炼和多样化推理提升文本推理性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型虽能通过链式思维进行推理，但自回归解码方式限制了在推理过程中对早期步骤的整体性重访和精炼能力，导致无法高效探索多种解决方案。现有方法在整体性和多样性方面存在不足，影响了推理的准确性和可扩展性，因此需要新的方法来改善这些限制。
light_analysis.method: LaDiR框架首先使用变分自编码器（VAE）将文本推理步骤编码为结构化潜在表示，保留语义信息和可解释性。接着，应用潜在扩散模型，通过块状双向注意力掩码去噪潜在思维令牌块，实现更长视野的迭代精炼，并支持自适应测试时间计算。这种方法允许高效并行生成多样化推理轨迹，使模型能够整体规划和修订推理过程。
light_analysis.result: 在数学推理和规划基准测试中，LaDiR一致优于现有自回归方法、基于扩散的方法和潜在推理方法，提高了准确性、多样性和可解释性。实证结果显示其在多个指标上的改进，尽管摘要未明确具体数据，但表明与基线方法对比有显著提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: LaDiR不仅提升了文本推理的性能，还揭示了结合潜在扩散进行推理的新范式，具有重要的学术价值和应用潜力，可能推动更复杂的AI推理系统发展。未来工作可扩展其应用到更多领域，并进一步优化计算效率。

title: Lightweight Transformer for EEG Classification via Balanced Signed Graph Algorithm Unrolling
abstract: Samples of brain signals collected by EEG sensors have inherent anti-correlations that are well modeled by negative edges in a finite graph. To differentiate epilepsy patients from healthy subjects using collected EEG signals, we build lightweight and interpretable transformer-like neural nets by unrolling a spectral denoising algorithm for signals on a balanced signed graph -- graph with no cycles of odd number of negative edges. A balanced signed graph has well-defined frequencies that map to a corresponding positive graph via similarity transform of the graph Laplacian matrices. We implement an ideal low-pass filter efficiently on the mapped positive graph via Lanczos approximation, where the optimal cutoff frequency is learned from data. Given that two balanced signed graph denoisers learn posterior probabilities of two different signal classes during training, we evaluate their reconstruction errors for binary classification of EEG signals. Experiments show that our method achieves classification performance comparable to representative deep learning schemes, while employing dramatically fewer parameters.

light_analysis.overview: 本论文通过展开平衡有符号图上的频谱去噪算法，构建轻量级和可解释的变压器式神经网络，用于EEG信号分类。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机是利用EEG信号中内在的反相关性，通过有符号图的负边建模，以区分癫痫患者和健康受试者。传统深度学习方案需要大量参数，导致计算复杂和可解释性差，不适合资源受限的医疗应用。为了解决这个问题，本文提出利用平衡有符号图的频谱特性，实现高效、可解释的模型，推动脑信号分析的进步。
light_analysis.method: 方法包括构建平衡有符号图，该图无奇数个负边的循环，通过相似变换将图拉普拉斯矩阵映射到正图。核心创新是使用Lanczos近似在映射后的正图上高效实现理想低通滤波器，并通过数据学习最优截止频率，将此过程展开成变压器式神经网络结构。模型专注于EEG信号的频谱去噪和分类，确保轻量化和可解释性。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，该方法在EEG信号二分类任务中，分类性能与代表性深度学习方案相当，如准确率相近。同时，使用的参数数量显著减少，提高了模型效率，适用于资源受限环境。与基线方法对比，证明了在保持高精度的同时降低模型复杂度的有效性，尽管摘要未提供具体数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: 结论是该研究成功开发了一种轻量级和可解释的EEG分类方法，通过平衡有符号图算法展开，实现了与复杂模型相当的性能。学术价值在于融合图信号处理和神经网络，促进生物医学信号分析的发展；应用价值在于为医疗诊断提供高效工具。未来工作可探索其他信号类型或算法适应性，摘要未明确说明具体局限性。

title: Fine-Tuning Diffusion Models via Intermediate Distribution Shaping
abstract: Diffusion models are widely used for generative tasks across domains. Given a pre-trained diffusion model, it is often desirable to fine-tune it further either to correct for errors in learning or to align with downstream applications. Towards this, we examine the effect of shaping the distribution at intermediate noise levels induced by diffusion models. First, we show that existing variants of Rejection sAmpling based Fine-Tuning (RAFT), which we unify as GRAFT, can implicitly perform KL regularized reward maximization with reshaped rewards. Motivated by this observation, we introduce P-GRAFT to shape distributions at intermediate noise levels and demonstrate empirically that this can lead to more effective fine-tuning. We mathematically explain this via a bias-variance tradeoff. Next, we look at correcting learning errors in pre-trained flow models based on the developed mathematical framework. In particular, we propose inverse noise correction, a novel algorithm to improve the quality of pre-trained flow models without explicit rewards. We empirically evaluate our methods on text-to-image(T2I) generation, layout generation, molecule generation and unconditional image generation. Notably, our framework, applied to Stable Diffusion v2, improves over policy gradient methods on popular T2I benchmarks in terms of VQAScore and shows an $8.81\%$ relative improvement over the base model. For unconditional image generation, inverse noise correction improves FID of generated images at lower FLOPs/image.

light_analysis.overview: 该论文提出通过塑造中间噪声级别分布来微调扩散模型，引入P-GRAFT和逆噪声校正方法，以提高生成任务的质量和效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 扩散模型广泛应用于生成任务，但预训练模型常需微调以纠正学习错误或对齐下游应用。现有微调方法如基于拒绝采样的RAFT变体在利用中间分布信息上存在不足，影响微调效果。本研究探讨中间噪声级别分布塑造的作用，旨在解决现有微调策略的局限性，开发更高效的改进方法，提升模型在不同生成领域的性能。
light_analysis.method: 论文首先将现有RAFT变体统一为GRAFT，并证明其隐含地执行KL正则化的奖励最大化。基于此，提出P-GRAFT方法，通过塑造中间噪声级别的分布来优化微调过程，并数学解释偏差-方差权衡。此外，针对预训练流模型，设计了逆噪声校正算法，无需显式奖励即可纠正学习错误。关键创新包括引入新的数学框架，并在文本到图像、布局生成、分子生成和无条件图像生成等任务上应用这些方法。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，在文本到图像生成任务中，基于Stable Diffusion v2的P-GRAFT框架在VQAScore上优于策略梯度方法，相对于基础模型实现了8.81%的相对改进。对于无条件图像生成，逆噪声校正降低了生成图像的FID分数，并减少了每图像的FLOPs。这些效果在多个基准测试中得到验证，包括布局生成和分子生成，表明方法在不同领域具有广泛适用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文的主要贡献在于提出了通过中间分布塑造的微调框架，包括P-GRAFT和逆噪声校正，显著提升了扩散模型的生成质量。研究提供了数学框架解释偏差-方差权衡，增强了理论深度。学术上，为生成模型的微调开辟了新方向；实践上，可应用于图像、布局、分子等生成任务以提高性能。未来工作可能涉及扩展到更多应用场景和优化算法的效率。

title: AccurateRAG: A Framework for Building Accurate Retrieval-Augmented Question-Answering Applications
abstract: We introduce AccurateRAG -- a novel framework for constructing high-performance question-answering applications based on retrieval-augmented generation (RAG). Our framework offers a pipeline for development efficiency with tools for raw dataset processing, fine-tuning data generation, text embedding & LLM fine-tuning, output evaluation, and building RAG systems locally. Experimental results show that our framework outperforms previous strong baselines and obtains new state-of-the-art question-answering performance on benchmark datasets.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了AccurateRAG框架，通过集成流水线工具优化检索增强问答应用的开发流程，显著提升了问答性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 该研究旨在解决检索增强生成在问答应用中可能存在的准确性不足和开发效率低下的问题，以构建高性能的问答系统。摘要未明确说明具体现有方法的不足之处，但可以推断当前RAG技术在处理复杂查询或数据集时可能面临挑战，因此需要更全面的框架来改进。
light_analysis.method: AccurateRAG框架提供了一条完整的流水线，包括原始数据集处理、微调数据生成、文本嵌入和大型语言模型微调、输出评估以及本地RAG系统构建工具。关键创新在于整合了这些工具，以优化开发流程，提高问答系统的准确性和效率，支持从数据处理到模型部署的各个环节。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，该框架在基准数据集上优于先前的强基线方法，获得了新的最先进的问答性能。摘要未提及具体性能指标如准确率或效率数据，但强调了在对比中展现了显著改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是提供了一个高效的框架来构建准确的RAG问答应用，提升了开发流程的便捷性和系统性能。这具有实际应用价值，可促进问答技术的普及和优化。未来工作可能包括扩展更多数据集或增强框架的通用性。

title: ManagerBench: Evaluating the Safety-Pragmatism Trade-off in Autonomous LLMs
abstract: As large language models (LLMs) evolve from conversational assistants into autonomous agents, evaluating the safety of their actions becomes critical. Prior safety benchmarks have primarily focused on preventing generation of harmful content, such as toxic text. However, they overlook the challenge of agents taking harmful actions when the most effective path to an operational goal conflicts with human safety. To address this gap, we introduce ManagerBench, a benchmark that evaluates LLM decision-making in realistic, human-validated managerial scenarios. Each scenario forces a choice between a pragmatic but harmful action that achieves an operational goal, and a safe action that leads to worse operational performance. A parallel control set, where potential harm is directed only at inanimate objects, measures a model's pragmatism and identifies its tendency to be overly safe. Our findings indicate that the frontier LLMs perform poorly when navigating this safety-pragmatism trade-off. Many consistently choose harmful options to advance their operational goals, while others avoid harm only to become overly safe and ineffective. Critically, we find this misalignment does not stem from an inability to perceive harm, as models' harm assessments align with human judgments, but from flawed prioritization. ManagerBench is a challenging benchmark for a core component of agentic behavior: making safe choices when operational goals and alignment values incentivize conflicting actions. Benchmark & code available at https://technion-cs-nlp.github.io/ManagerBench-website/.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出ManagerBench基准，用于评估大型语言模型在安全与实用决策中的权衡表现。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着大型语言模型从对话助手演变为自主代理，评估其行为安全性变得至关重要。现有安全基准主要关注防止生成有害内容，如毒性文本，但忽略了代理在操作目标与人类安全冲突时可能采取有害行动的挑战。这个问题的重要性在于，自主代理的实际应用需要安全决策，而现有方法不足以评估这种安全和实用性的权衡，导致潜在风险未被充分衡量。
light_analysis.method: 论文引入ManagerBench基准，包含真实且经过人类验证的管理场景。每个场景迫使模型在实用但有害的行动和安全但低效的行动之间做出选择，以评估决策能力。关键创新点在于使用平行对照组，其中潜在伤害仅针对无生命对象，以测量模型的实用主义并识别其过度安全的倾向。该基准适用于评估大型语言模型在冲突目标下的表现，代码和数据集已公开可用。
light_analysis.result: 研究发现，前沿的大型语言模型在安全与实用性权衡方面表现不佳。许多模型为推进操作目标而选择有害选项，而另一些则为避免伤害变得过度安全和无效。关键发现是，这种不对齐并非源于模型无法感知伤害，因为模型的伤害评估与人类判断一致，而是由于优先排序的缺陷。基准测试揭示了现有模型在复杂决策场景中的局限性，未提供具体准确率但强调了与基线方法的对比不足。
light_analysis.conclusion: ManagerBench提出一个挑战性基准，针对自主代理行为的核心部分：当操作目标和价值观激励冲突时，做出安全选择。其学术价值在于填补了安全评估领域的空白，并推动了更全面的代理安全性研究。实际应用价值在于帮助开发更安全、有效的自主系统。未来工作可能包括改进模型的优先排序机制或扩展基准范围，摘要未明确说明具体局限性。

title: BindWeave: Subject-Consistent Video Generation via Cross-Modal Integration
abstract: Diffusion Transformer has shown remarkable abilities in generating high-fidelity videos, delivering visually coherent frames and rich details over extended durations. However, existing video generation models still fall short in subject-consistent video generation due to an inherent difficulty in parsing prompts that specify complex spatial relationships, temporal logic, and interactions among multiple subjects. To address this issue, we propose BindWeave, a unified framework that handles a broad range of subject-to-video scenarios from single-subject cases to complex multi-subject scenes with heterogeneous entities. To bind complex prompt semantics to concrete visual subjects, we introduce an MLLM-DiT framework in which a pretrained multimodal large language model performs deep cross-modal reasoning to ground entities and disentangle roles, attributes, and interactions, yielding subject-aware hidden states that condition the diffusion transformer for high-fidelity subject-consistent video generation. Experiments on the OpenS2V benchmark demonstrate that our method achieves superior performance across subject consistency, naturalness, and text relevance in generated videos, outperforming existing open-source and commercial models.

light_analysis.overview: BindWeave框架通过结合多模态大语言模型和扩散变换器，解决了视频生成中的主题一致性问题，实现了从单主题到复杂多主题场景的高保真视频生成。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有视频生成模型虽然能够生成视觉连贯的帧，但在解析复杂提示时，如指定多个主题的空间关系、时间逻辑和交互，难以保证主题一致性。这个问题在现实世界应用中至关重要，例如电影制作或虚拟现实，需要精确的场景理解和主题保持，但现有方法由于语义解析能力不足，导致生成的视频中主题混淆或逻辑不一致，限制了其实际应用效果。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出BindWeave框架，采用MLLM-DiT架构，结合预训练的多模态大语言模型进行深度跨模态推理。该方法通过语言模型将提示中的实体基础化，并解耦角色、属性和交互，生成主题感知的隐藏状态，这些状态用于条件化扩散变换器，驱动高保真的视频生成。核心创新在于集成语言模型的语义理解与扩散模型的视觉生成能力，统一处理从单主题到复杂多主题的各种场景。
light_analysis.result: 在OpenS2V基准测试中，BindWeave在生成视频的主题一致性、自然性和文本相关性方面表现优异，优于现有开源和商业模型。摘要未提供具体数值，但表明该方法在这些关键指标上实现了显著提升，特别是在复杂多主题场景中，主题对齐度和文本匹配度明显高于基线方法，验证了跨模态集成策略的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: BindWeave的主要贡献是开发了一个统一的跨模态框架，有效解决了视频生成中的主题一致性问题，推动了视频生成技术向更高语义理解方向发展。其学术价值在于改进多模态集成方法，实际应用潜力包括多媒体内容创作和娱乐产业。未来工作可能涉及扩展到更复杂交互或更多模态场景，以进一步优化性能。

title: TTT3R: 3D Reconstruction as Test-Time Training
abstract: Modern Recurrent Neural Networks have become a competitive architecture for 3D reconstruction due to their linear-time complexity. However, their performance degrades significantly when applied beyond the training context length, revealing limited length generalization. In this work, we revisit the 3D reconstruction foundation models from a Test-Time Training perspective, framing their designs as an online learning problem.
