Building on this perspective, we leverage the alignment confidence between the memory state and incoming observations to derive a closed-form learning rate for memory updates, to balance between retaining historical information and adapting to new observations. This training-free intervention, termed TTT3R, substantially improves length generalization, achieving a $2\times$ improvement in global pose estimation over baselines, while operating at 20 FPS with just 6 GB of GPU memory to process thousands of images. Code is available in https://rover-xingyu.github.io/TTT3R

light_analysis.overview: TTT3R 通过测试时训练的方法，显著提升了 3D 重建模型在长序列场景下的长度泛化能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现代循环神经网络在 3D 重建中因线性时间复杂度而具竞争力，但在应用于超出训练上下文长度时性能显著下降，揭示长度泛化能力有限。这一问题限制了模型在真实世界应用中的鲁棒性，如处理长时间视频序列或大规模图像数据，现有方法无法有效平衡历史信息保留和新观测适应，因此需要从测试时训练角度重新审视模型设计以改进泛化性能。
light_analysis.method: 该研究从测试时训练视角出发，将 3D 重建基础模型框架为在线学习问题。利用内存状态与输入观测之间的对齐置信度来推导闭式学习率，用于动态更新内存，以平衡保留历史信息和适应新观测。这种方法称为 TTT3R，是一种无需额外训练的干预，仅通过在线调整来优化模型性能，无需重新训练基础模型。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，TTT3R 在长度泛化方面取得显著改进，全局姿态估计性能相比基线方法提升了两倍。同时，系统运行效率高，以 20 帧每秒的速度处理图像，仅消耗 6 GB GPU 内存即可处理数千张图像，在保持准确率的同时展现出良好的计算可扩展性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究的主要贡献是提出 TTT3R 方法，通过测试时训练有效解决了 3D 重建模型在长序列上的泛化问题，提升了性能并保持高效计算。这为处理大规模图像序列的实际应用提供了新思路，具有学术和实用价值，未来工作可扩展到其他序列建模任务或优化更复杂的场景适应性。

title: EchoGen: Generating Visual Echoes in Any Scene via Feed-Forward Subject-Driven Auto-Regressive Model
abstract: Subject-driven generation is a critical task in creative AI; yet current state-of-the-art methods present a stark trade-off. They either rely on computationally expensive, per-subject fine-tuning, sacrificing efficiency and zero-shot capability, or employ feed-forward architectures built on diffusion models, which are inherently plagued by slow inference speeds. Visual Auto-Regressive (VAR) models are renowned for their rapid sampling speeds and strong generative quality, making them an ideal yet underexplored foundation for resolving this tension. To bridge this gap, we introduce EchoGen, a pioneering framework that empowers VAR models with subject-driven generation capabilities. The core design of EchoGen is an effective dual-path injection strategy that disentangles a subject's high-level semantic identity from its low-level fine-grained details, enabling enhanced controllability and fidelity. We employ a semantic encoder to extract the subject's abstract identity, which is injected through decoupled cross-attention to guide the overall composition. Concurrently, a content encoder captures intricate visual details, which are integrated via a multi-modal attention mechanism to ensure high-fidelity texture and structural preservation. To the best of our knowledge, EchoGen is the first feed-forward subject-driven framework built upon VAR models. Both quantitative and qualitative results substantiate our design, demonstrating that EchoGen achieves subject fidelity and image quality comparable to state-of-the-art diffusion-based methods with significantly lower sampling latency. The code and models are publicly available at https://github.com/drx-code/EchoGen.

light_analysis.overview: EchoGen通过双路径注入策略，首次实现基于VAR模型的主题驱动生成框架，以平衡效率与质量。
light_analysis.motivation: 主题驱动生成是创意AI中的关键任务，但现有方法面临效率与质量的两难选择：依赖每主题精细调整的方法牺牲了效率和零样本能力，而基于扩散模型的架构则因推理速度缓慢而受限。VAR模型以快速采样和强生成质量著称，为解决这一矛盾提供了潜力，但尚未被充分探索用于主题驱动生成。本研究旨在填补这一空白，开发高效且高质量的方法。
light_analysis.method: EchoGen采用双路径注入策略，将主题的高层语义身份与低层细粒度细节分离，以增强可控性和保真度。通过语义编码器提取抽象身份，使用去耦交叉注意力机制注入以指导整体构图；同时，内容编码器捕捉复杂视觉细节，通过多模态注意力机制集成，确保纹理和结构的高保真保留。该框架基于VAR模型，首次实现了前馈主题驱动生成，无需每主题精细调整。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，EchoGen在主题保真度和图像质量上与基于扩散的先进方法相媲美，同时采样延迟显著降低。定量和定性评估均证实了这一设计有效性，尽管摘要未提供具体性能指标，但强调了效率的明显提升。这表明EchoGen在保持生成质量的同时，大幅提高了推理速度。
light_analysis.conclusion: EchoGen是首个基于VAR模型的前馈主题驱动框架，通过双路径注入策略实现了高效且高质量的生成。其学术价值在于扩展了VAR模型的应用范围，实际应用价值在于为创意AI提供快速、可控的生成工具。摘要未明确说明局限性或未来工作，但代码开源为后续研究奠定了基础。

title: MedLA: A Logic-Driven Multi-Agent Framework for Complex Medical Reasoning with Large Language Models
abstract: Answering complex medical questions requires not only domain expertise and patient-specific information, but also structured and multi-perspective reasoning. Existing multi-agent approaches often rely on fixed roles or shallow interaction prompts, limiting their ability to detect and resolve fine-grained logical inconsistencies. To address this, we propose \textsc{MedLA}, a logic-driven multi-agent framework built on large language models. Each agent organizes its reasoning process into an explicit logical tree based on syllogistic triads (major premise, minor premise, and conclusion), enabling transparent inference and premise-level alignment. Agents engage in a multi-round, graph-guided discussion to compare and iteratively refine their logic trees, achieving consensus through error correction and contradiction resolution. We demonstrate that \textsc{MedLA} consistently outperforms both static role-based systems and single-agent baselines on challenging benchmarks such as MedDDx and standard medical QA tasks. Furthermore, \textsc{MedLA} scales effectively across both open-source and commercial LLM backbones, achieving state-of-the-art performance and offering a generalizable paradigm for trustworthy medical reasoning.

light_analysis.overview: MedLA是一个基于大语言模型的逻辑驱动多代理框架，用于复杂医疗推理，通过逻辑树对齐和多轮交互提升推理透明度和一致性。
light_analysis.motivation: 复杂医疗问答需要领域专业知识、患者特定信息和结构化多视角推理，但现有多代理方法通常依赖固定角色或浅层交互提示，难以检测和解决细粒度逻辑不一致。这限制了医疗推理的可信度和准确性，因此开发一种更透明和逻辑一致的框架至关重要。本研究旨在通过引入逻辑驱动方法，改进现有不足，推动医疗AI的可靠应用。
light_analysis.method: MedLA框架基于大语言模型构建多代理系统，每个代理使用三段论构建明确的逻辑树组织推理过程。关键创新在于逻辑树对齐和透明推理机制，代理通过多轮图引导讨论比较和迭代精炼逻辑树，以纠正错误和解决矛盾达成共识。摘要未明确说明具体数据集，但提及基准如MedDDx；模型基于开源和商业LLM骨干。
light_analysis.result: 在MedDDx和标准医疗QA任务等挑战性基准测试中，MedLA一致性地超越了基于静态角色的系统和单代理基线，实现最先进性能。框架在开源和商业大语言模型骨干上有效扩展，显示了其泛化能力和高效性，但没有提供具体数据，仅基于摘要描述。
light_analysis.conclusion: MedLA的主要贡献是提供了一个逻辑驱动的多代理框架，显著提升了医疗推理的准确性和可信度，其学术价值在于逻辑树对齐机制增强推理透明度，实际应用价值在于为医疗问答提供可扩展范式。潜在局限性或未来工作方向摘要未明确说明，可能涉及扩展到其他领域或优化交互效率。

title: Bridging the Gap Between Promise and Performance for Microscaling FP4 Quantization
abstract: The recent hardware-accelerated microscaling 4-bit floating-point formats such as MXFP4 and NVFP4, supported on NVIDIA and AMD GPUs, promise to revolutionize large language model (LLM) inference. Yet, their practical benefits remain unproven. We present the first comprehensive study of MXFP4 and NVFP4 for post-training quantization, revealing gaps between their promise and real-world performance. Our analysis shows that state-of-the-art methods struggle with FP4, due to two key issues: (1) NVFP4's small group size provably neutralizes traditional outlier mitigation techniques; (2) MXFP4's power-of-two scale quantization severely degrades accuracy due to high induced error. To bridge this gap, we introduce Micro-Rotated-GPTQ (MR-GPTQ), a variant of the classic GPTQ quantization algorithm that tailors the quantization process to FP4's unique properties, by using block-wise Hadamard transforms and format-specific optimizations. We support our proposal with a set of high-performance GPU kernels that enable the MR-GPTQ format with negligible overhead, by rotation fusion into the weights, and fast online computation of the activations. This leads to speedups vs. FP16 of up to 3.6x layer-wise, and 2.2x end-to-end on NVIDIA B200, and of 6x layer-wise and 4x end-to-end on RTX5090. Our extensive empirical evaluation demonstrates that MR-GPTQ matches or outperforms state-of-the-art accuracy, significantly boosting MXFP4, to the point where it can near the accuracy that of NVFP4. We conclude that, while FP4 is not an automatic upgrade over INT4, format-specialized methods like MR-GPTQ can unlock a new frontier of accuracy-performance trade-offs.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出了Micro-Rotated-GPTQ (MR-GPTQ)方法，通过块级Hadamard变换和格式特定优化，解决FP4量化格式在实际应用中的性能差距，提升大型语言模型推理效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究背景是硬件加速的4位浮点格式如MXFP4和NVFP4在GPU上得到支持，承诺革新LLM推理性能，但实际效益未经证实。现有最先进方法在处理FP4时面临挑战，主要问题包括NVFP4的小组大小抵消了传统异常值缓解技术，以及MXFP4的幂二尺度量化导致高误差，这限制了FP4在高效推理中的应用潜力。因此，本研究旨在填补理论与性能之间的鸿沟，探索FP4量化的实际可行性。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出Micro-Rotated-GPTQ (MR-GPTQ)，作为经典GPTQ量化算法的变体，专门针对FP4格式的特性设计量化过程。核心创新点包括使用块级Hadamard变换和针对MXFP4与NVFP4的格式特定优化。此外，开发了高性能GPU内核，通过将旋转融合到权重中，并实现快速在线激活计算，以最小化开销。这些方法结合了算法调整和硬件加速，以充分利用FP4格式的优势，提升量化效率和模型性能。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，MR-GPTQ在硬件上实现了显著的性能提升：在NVIDIA B200上，层级加速最高达3.6倍，端到端加速为2.2倍；在RTX5090上，层级加速为6倍，端到端加速为4倍。广泛的实证评估表明，MR-GPTQ在精度上匹配或超越了最先进方法，大幅增强了MXFP4的性能，使其精度接近NVFP4水平。这验证了通过格式专用方法，FP4量化能够在保持或提高精度的同时，带来显著的推理加速。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究结论强调，尽管FP4并非自动优于INT4量化，但通过格式特定方法如MR-GPTQ，能够解锁精度和性能权衡的新前沿。这突出了为不同量化格式定制技术的重要性，为未来低比特量化研究和硬件加速应用提供了新方向。潜在局限性可能涉及对其他硬件平台或更广泛模型类型的扩展，未来工作可探索跨格式和跨架构的优化策略。

title: Earth-Agent: Unlocking the Full Landscape of Earth Observation with Agents
abstract: Earth observation (EO) is essential for understanding the evolving states of the Earth system. Although recent MLLMs have advanced EO research, they still lack the capability to tackle complex tasks that require multi-step reasoning and the use of domain-specific tools. Agent-based methods offer a promising direction, but current attempts remain in their infancy, confined to RGB perception, shallow reasoning, and lacking systematic evaluation protocols. To overcome these limitations, we introduce Earth-Agent, the first agentic framework that unifies RGB and spectral EO data within an MCP-based tool ecosystem, enabling cross-modal, multi-step, and quantitative spatiotemporal reasoning beyond pretrained MLLMs. Earth-Agent supports complex scientific tasks such as geophysical parameter retrieval and quantitative spatiotemporal analysis by dynamically invoking expert tools and models across modalities. To support comprehensive evaluation, we further propose Earth-Bench, a benchmark of 248 expert-curated tasks with 13,729 images, spanning spectrum, products and RGB modalities, and equipped with a dual-level evaluation protocol that assesses both reasoning trajectories and final outcomes. We conduct comprehensive experiments varying different LLM backbones, comparisons with general agent frameworks, and comparisons with MLLMs on remote sensing benchmarks, demonstrating both the effectiveness and potential of Earth-Agent. Earth-Agent establishes a new paradigm for EO analysis, moving the field toward scientifically grounded, next-generation applications of LLMs in Earth observation. More information about Earth-Agent can be found at https://github.com/opendatalab/Earth-Agent
comment: Published as a conference paper at ICLR 2026

light_analysis.overview: 地球代理（Earth-Agent）是首个统一RGB和光谱地球观测数据的代理框架，基于MCP工具生态系统，实现跨模态、多步骤和定量时空推理。
light_analysis.motivation: 地球观测对理解地球系统演变至关重要，但当前多模态大语言模型虽推动研究进展，仍无法处理需要多步骤推理和领域特定工具的复杂任务，如地物参数检索。基于代理的方法有前景，但现有尝试局限在RGB感知、浅层推理和缺乏系统评估，限制了实际应用。因此，急需克服这些不足，提升地球观测任务的科学分析能力。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出Earth-Agent框架，它将RGB和光谱地球观测数据统一于基于MCP（模型上下文协议）的工具生态系统，支持跨模态动态调用专家工具和模型，实现多步骤和定量时空推理。关键创新包括统一多模态数据、工具动态调用机制和系统性评估协议。为全面评估，还构建了Earth-Bench基准，包含248个专家策划任务和13,729张图像，涵盖光谱、产品和RGB模态，并采用双级评估协议评估推理轨迹和最终结果。
light_analysis.result: 论文进行了综合实验，包括使用不同LLM主干网络、与通用代理框架比较以及在遥感基准上与多模态大语言模型对比，证明了Earth-Agent在复杂地球观测任务中的有效性。实验结果表明其在多步骤推理和跨模态分析中优于基线方法，但具体性能指标如准确率提升在摘要中未明确说明，需要参考完整论文。
light_analysis.conclusion: Earth-Agent为地球观测分析建立了新范式，推动了领域向科学基础和下一代LLM应用发展。主要贡献包括首个统一的代理框架、跨模态工具生态系统和系统性评估基准，具有重要学术价值和实际应用前景。研究潜在局限性可能涉及数据模态扩展或工具集成优化，未来工作可扩展至更多地球科学任务和更复杂的推理场景。

title: Death of the Novel(ty): Beyond n-Gram Novelty as a Metric for Textual Creativity
abstract: N-gram novelty is widely used to evaluate language models' ability to generate text outside of their training data. More recently, it has also been adopted as a metric for measuring textual creativity. However, theoretical work on creativity suggests that this approach may be inadequate, as it does not account for creativity's dual nature: novelty (how original the text is) and appropriateness (how sensical and pragmatic it is). We investigate the relationship between this notion of creativity and n-gram novelty through 8,618 expert writer annotations of novelty, pragmaticality, and sensicality via close reading of human- and AI-generated text. We find that while n-gram novelty is positively associated with expert writer-judged creativity, approximately 91% of top-quartile n-gram novel expressions are not judged as creative, cautioning against relying on n-gram novelty alone. Furthermore, unlike in human-written text, higher n-gram novelty in open-source LLMs correlates with lower pragmaticality. In an exploratory study with frontier closed-source models, we additionally confirm that they are less likely to produce creative expressions than humans. Using our dataset, we test whether zero-shot, few-shot, and finetuned models are able to identify expressions perceived as novel by experts (a positive aspect of writing) or non-pragmatic (a negative aspect). Overall, frontier LLMs exhibit performance much higher than random but leave room for improvement, especially struggling to identify non-pragmatic expressions. We further find that LLM-as-a-Judge novelty ratings align with expert writer preferences in an out-of-distribution dataset, more so than an n-gram based metric.
comment: ICLR 2026 Camera Ready. 30 pages, 11 figures, 15 tables

light_analysis.overview: 本研究通过大规模专家标注实证分析，揭示了n-ram新颖性作为文本创造力指标的不足，强调创造力评估需结合新颖性和适当性。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机在于解决现有文本创造力评估方法的缺陷，n-gram新颖性被广泛用作度量，但创造力理论指出创造力具有双重性：新颖性和适当性（包括意义性和实用性）。这一问题重要性在于准确评估创造力对AI生成文本的质量和多样性至关重要。现有方法不足在于单独依赖n-ram新颖性忽略了适当性，可能导致对创造力的误判，尤其在AI生成文本中可能产生高新颖但低实用的内容。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法包括使用8,618个专家标注，通过密切阅读人类和AI生成的文本，评估新颖性、实用性和意义性，以分析创造力与n-ram新颖性的关系。核心创新点是实证检验创造力的双重维度，并探索语言模型在识别表达式上的能力。数据集基于专家标注，测试了多种模型配置：零样本、少样本和微调的大型语言模型，评估它们识别专家判定的新颖（正面）或非实用（负面）表达式的表现。摘要未明确说明具体模型架构，但涉及开源和闭源LLM的对比。
light_analysis.result: 主要实验结果包括：n-gram新颖性与专家判定的创造力正相关，但约91%高新颖性表达式不被判定为有创造性，凸显单独依赖n-ram新颖性的风险。在开源LLM中，高新颖性与低实用性相关，不同于人类文本。前沿闭源模型产生的创造性表达式少于人类。LLM在识别表达式上性能高于随机，但仍有改进空间，特别是在识别非实用表达式时准确率较低。进一步发现，使用LLM-as-a-Judge进行新颖性评分与专家偏好更一致，优于基于n-gram的指标，为创造力评估提供了新途径。
light_analysis.conclusion: 结论表明，论文贡献在于强调创造力评估需综合考虑新颖性和适当性，指出n-gram新颖性的局限性。学术价值在于为文本创造力理论提供实证支持，推动更全面的评估指标发展。实际应用价值在于改进AI生成文本的质量评估，提升语言模型的创造性输出。局限性包括专家标注可能主观，未来工作可扩展数据集、开发综合创造力指标，并优化LLM在实用性识别方面的能力，以促进更可靠的自动化评估。

title: Benefits and Pitfalls of Reinforcement Learning for Language Model Planning: A Theoretical Perspective
abstract: Recent reinforcement learning (RL) methods have substantially enhanced the planning capabilities of Large Language Models (LLMs), yet the theoretical basis for their effectiveness remains elusive. In this work, we investigate RL's benefits and limitations through a tractable graph-based abstraction, focusing on policy gradient (PG) and Q-learning methods. Our theoretical analyses reveal that supervised fine-tuning (SFT) may introduce co-occurrence-based spurious solutions, whereas RL achieves correct planning primarily through exploration, underscoring exploration's role in enabling better generalization. However, we also show that PG suffers from diversity collapse, where output diversity decreases during training and persists even after perfect accuracy is attained. By contrast, Q-learning provides two key advantages: off-policy learning and diversity preservation at convergence. We further demonstrate that careful reward design is necessary to prevent Q-value bias in Q-learning. Finally, applying our framework to the real-world planning benchmark Blocksworld, we confirm that these behaviors manifest in practice.

light_analysis.overview: 本研究从理论角度揭示了强化学习在语言模型规划中的优势在于探索促进泛化，但策略梯度存在多样性崩溃问题，而Q学习能克服此问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前，强化学习方法在提升大型语言模型规划能力方面取得了显著进展，但其有效性的理论依据仍然缺失。监督微调可能因训练数据中的共现模式而产生虚假的规划解决方案，限制了模型的泛化能力。因此，理解强化学习如何在实际规划任务中发挥作用，以及其潜在的局限性，对于改进算法设计和避免陷阱至关重要。本研究旨在通过理论分析，填补这一空白，为相关研究提供坚实的理论基础。
light_analysis.method: 本研究采用基于图的抽象化理论框架，对策略梯度和Q学习两种强化学习方法进行深入分析。关键创新点在于通过可处理的模型，探讨探索机制在规划中的作用，以及输出多样性的动态变化。具体技术路线包括理论推导和比较不同算法的性能，并应用到真实世界的规划基准Blocksworld中，以验证理论发现。这为理解强化学习的行为提供了系统的方法论。
light_analysis.result: 理论分析揭示，监督微调可能引入基于共现的虚假规划方案，而强化学习通过探索实现了更好的泛化能力。具体地，策略梯度在训练过程中表现出输出多样性下降的“多样性崩溃”现象，即使在达到完美准确率后仍持续存在。相比之下，Q学习具有离策略学习和在收敛时保持多样性的优势。此外，研究强调了奖励设计的重要性，以避免Q值偏差。在Blocksworld基准测试中，这些行为得到了实践验证，证实了理论预测。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献在于从理论角度阐明了强化学习在语言模型规划中的好处和陷阱。研究发现探索是RL实现正确规划的核心机制，而策略梯度存在多样性崩溃问题，Q学习则能有效避免。这为设计和优化基于强化学习的规划算法提供了重要理论依据。学术上，填补了相关领域的理论空白；实际应用中，有助于开发更稳健的规划系统。未来工作可进一步探索奖励设计和算法扩展。

title: Towards a more realistic evaluation of machine learning models for bearing fault diagnosis
abstract: Reliable detection of bearing faults is essential for maintaining the safety and operational efficiency of rotating machinery. While recent advances in machine learning (ML), particularly deep learning, have shown strong performance in controlled settings, many studies fail to generalize to real-world applications due to methodological flaws, most notably data leakage. This paper investigates the issue of data leakage in vibration-based bearing fault diagnosis and its impact on model evaluation. We demonstrate that common dataset partitioning strategies, such as segment-wise and condition-wise splits, introduce spurious correlations that inflate performance metrics. To address this, we propose a rigorous, leakage-free evaluation methodology centered on bearing-wise data partitioning, ensuring no overlap between the physical components used for training and testing. Additionally, we reformulate the classification task as a multi-label problem, enabling the detection of co-occurring fault types and the use of prevalence-independent metrics such as Macro AUROC. Beyond preventing leakage, we also examine the effect of dataset diversity on generalization, showing that the number of unique training bearings is a decisive factor for achieving robust performance. We evaluate our methodology on three widely adopted datasets: CWRU, Paderborn University (PU), and University of Ottawa (UORED-VAFCLS). This study highlights the importance of leakage-aware evaluation protocols and provides practical guidelines for dataset partitioning, model selection, and validation, fostering the development of more trustworthy ML systems for industrial fault diagnosis applications.
comment: Submitted to Mechanical Systems and Signal Processing

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出了一种基于轴承级别的数据划分和泄漏无关的评估方法，以提升机器学习模型在轴承故障诊断中的可靠性评估。
light_analysis.motivation: 轴承故障的可靠检测对于旋转机械的安全和运行效率至关重要。当前，机器学习特别是深度学习在受控环境中表现优异，但在实际应用中泛化能力有限，主要由于方法上的缺陷，特别是数据泄漏问题。现有研究中常见的数据集划分策略，如按段或按条件分割，会引入虚假相关性，导致性能指标被夸大，从而无法真实反映模型在实际场景中的表现。因此，需要更严格、泄漏无关的评估方法来确保模型评估的真实性和可靠性。
light_analysis.method: 本研究提出了一种泄漏无关的评估方法论，核心是基于轴承级别的数据划分，确保用于训练和测试的物理轴承组件无重叠，以消除数据泄漏。此外，将分类任务重新表述为多标签问题，能够检测共现的故障类型，并使用不依赖流行度的度量指标如宏AUROC。研究还考察了数据集多样性对模型泛化的影响，强调唯一训练轴承数量是获得稳健性能的决定性因素。在三个广泛应用的数据集——CWRU、Paderborn University (PU) 和 University of Ottawa (UORED-VAFCLS)——上进行了方法验证。
light_analysis.result: 在CWRU、PU和UORED-VAFCLS数据集上评估了所提出的方法，证明了轴承级别划分能有效避免数据泄漏，从而提供更真实的模型性能评估。与常见的划分策略相比，该方法减少了虚假相关性的影响，确保了性能指标如宏AUROC的可靠性。摘要未明确说明具体性能提升数值，但强调了通过泄漏无关方法获得的评估结果更能反映模型在真实工业环境中的适用性，为故障诊断提供了更稳健的基准。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的核心贡献在于提出了泄漏感知的评估协议，并通过轴承级别数据划分、多标签分类和不依赖流行度的指标，提供了一套实用指南，促进工业故障诊断中更可信的机器学习系统发展。研究强调了方法论严谨性的重要性，为未来相关研究奠定了评估基础。尽管未明确讨论局限性，但提供了改进数据集划分、模型选择与验证的建议，有望推动领域向更真实的应用场景迈进。

title: Are VLMs Ready for Lane Topology Awareness in Autonomous Driving?
abstract: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have recently shown remarkable progress in multimodal reasoning, yet their applications in autonomous driving remain limited. In particular, the ability to understand road topology, a key requirement for safe navigation, has received relatively little attention. While some recent works have begun to explore VLMs in driving contexts, their performance on topology reasoning is far from satisfactory. In this work, we systematically evaluate VLMs' capabilities in road topology understanding. Specifically, multi-view images are projected into unified ground-plane coordinate system and fused into bird's-eye-view (BEV) lanes. Based on these BEV lanes, we formulate four topology-related diagnostic VQA tasks, which together capture essential components of spatial topology reasoning. Through extensive evaluation, we find that while frontier closed-source models (e.g., GPT-4o) achieve relatively high accuracy in some tasks, they still fail in some spatial questions that humans can answer (e.g., GPT-4o achieve only 67.8% in vector, a two-class classification problem). Furthermore, we find open-source VLMs, even at 30B scale, struggle significantly. These results indicate that spatial reasoning remains a fundamental bottleneck for current VLMs. We also find that the model's capability is positively correlated with model size, length of reasoning tokens and shots provided as examples, showing direction for future research.

light_analysis.overview: 该论文系统评估了视觉语言模型在自动驾驶车道拓扑理解中的能力，并揭示其在空间推理上的根本瓶颈。
light_analysis.motivation: 视觉语言模型在多模态推理方面取得显著进展，但在自动驾驶领域的应用仍然有限，特别是对道路拓扑的理解能力，这对安全导航至关重要。现有研究对此关注不足，导致VLM在自动驾驶中的表现不尽人意，例如在空间推理任务中准确性较低。因此，本研究旨在系统评估VLM的拓扑推理能力，以解决其在自动驾驶中实际应用的局限性，推动技术发展。
light_analysis.method: 论文采用系统评估方法，将多视角图像投影到统一的平面坐标系，并融合成鸟瞰视图车道表示。基于这些BEV车道，设计了四个拓扑相关的诊断视觉问答任务，这些任务共同捕捉空间拓扑推理的关键组成部分。关键创新在于利用BEV表示和VQA任务来量化VLM的拓扑理解能力，涉及多视图图像处理和任务设计。摘要未明确说明使用的具体数据集或模型架构细节。
light_analysis.result: 评估结果显示，前沿闭源模型如GPT-4o在某些任务中达到较高准确率，但在空间问题上表现不佳，例如在二分类问题中仅取得67.8%的准确率。开源VLM即使在30B规模下也显著挣扎，性能远低于期望。实验还发现模型能力与模型大小、推理令牌长度和提供示例的数量呈正相关，这为改进VLM的拓扑推理能力提供了方向。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是系统评估了VLM在自动驾驶车道拓扑理解中的能力，揭示空间推理是当前VLM的基本瓶颈。这具有重要学术价值，指出了VLM在复杂空间任务中的局限性，并为未来研究指明方向，如通过增加模型规模或改进推理技术来提升性能。实际应用价值在于为自动驾驶系统的安全集成提供了参考，未来工作可能集中在优化空间推理算法上。

title: Enhancing Generative Auto-bidding with Offline Reward Evaluation and Policy Search
abstract: Auto-bidding is a critical tool for advertisers to improve advertising performance. Recent progress has demonstrated that AI-Generated Bidding (AIGB), which learns a conditional generative planner from offline data, achieves superior performance compared to typical offline reinforcement learning (RL)-based auto-bidding methods. However, existing AIGB methods still face a performance bottleneck due to their inherent inability to explore beyond the static dataset with feedback. To address this, we propose \textbf{AIGB-Pearl} (\emph{\textbf{P}lanning with \textbf{E}valu\textbf{A}tor via \textbf{RL}}), a novel method that integrates generative planning and policy optimization. The core of AIGB-Pearl lies in constructing a trajectory evaluator to assess the quality of generated scores and designing a provably sound KL-Lipschitz-constrained score-maximization scheme to ensure safe and efficient exploration beyond the offline dataset. A practical algorithm that incorporates the synchronous coupling technique is further developed to ensure the model regularity required by the proposed scheme. Extensive experiments on both simulated and real-world advertising systems demonstrate the state-of-the-art performance of our approach.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出AIGB-Pearl方法，通过集成生成规划和策略优化，结合轨迹评估器和安全探索方案，显著提升离线自动出价性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 自动出价对广告效果至关重要，现有AI生成出价（AIGB）方法虽然优于离线强化学习，但无法探索超出静态数据集，导致性能瓶颈。这个问题限制了广告效果的进一步优化，因为现有方法缺乏探索性，难以适应动态环境，因此需要开发新方法来提升自动出价的效率和安全性。
light_analysis.method: 该方法的核心是构建轨迹评估器以评估生成出价分数的质量，并设计可证明安全的KL-Lipschitz约束分数最大化方案，以确保在离线数据集之外进行安全和高效的探索。创新点包括集成生成规划与策略优化、使用同步耦合技术确保模型规则性。摘要未明确说明具体数据集或模型架构，但提及在模拟和真实广告系统上应用。
light_analysis.result: 在模拟和真实广告系统上的广泛实验表明，AIGB-Pearl方法达到了最先进的性能，优于现有的离线强化学习和AIGB方法。摘要未明确说明具体性能指标如准确率或效率提升的具体数值，但强调了方法在自动出价任务上的优越性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究的主要贡献是提出AIGB-Pearl方法，解决了AIGB方法的探索限制，通过轨迹评估器和安全探索方案提升自动出价性能。学术上，它提出了新的离线强化学习框架；实际上，对广告系统优化有重要价值。未来工作可能包括扩展到其他领域或进一步优化探索策略。摘要未明确说明局限性。

title: See, Think, Act: Teaching Multimodal Agents to Effectively Interact with GUI by Identifying Toggles
abstract: The advent of multimodal agents facilitates effective interaction within graphical user interface (GUI), especially in ubiquitous GUI control. However, their inability to reliably execute toggle control instructions remains a key bottleneck. To investigate this, we construct a state control benchmark with binary toggle instructions derived from public datasets. Evaluation results of existing agents demonstrate their notable unreliability, particularly when the current toggle state already matches the desired state. To address the challenge, we propose State-aware Reasoning (StaR), a multimodal reasoning method that enables agents to perceive the current toggle state, infer the desired state from the instruction, and act accordingly. Experiments on four multimodal agents demonstrate that StaR can improve toggle instruction execution accuracy by over 30\%. Further evaluations on three public agentic benchmarks show that StaR also enhances general agentic task performance. Finally, evaluations on a dynamic environment highlight the potential of StaR for real-world applications. Code and benchmark: https://github.com/ZrW00/StaR.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了State-aware Reasoning (StaR)方法，通过使多模态代理感知当前切换状态并推断期望状态，显著提高了GUI交互中切换指令的执行准确率。
light_analysis.motivation: 多模态代理在图形用户界面（GUI）控制中虽具潜力，但在执行切换指令时存在不可靠性，尤其是在当前状态已匹配指令时，这成为实际应用的关键瓶颈。现有方法评估显示其表现不稳定，未能有效处理状态感知问题，限制了代理在普遍存在的GUI环境中的实用性。因此，研究如何提升代理的切换控制能力至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 本文提出State-aware Reasoning (StaR)方法，这是一种多模态推理框架，使代理能够感知GUI中的当前切换状态，从指令推断期望状态，并据此决定是否执行操作。关键创新在于整合状态感知机制，避免不必要的执行。方法基于构建的二元切换指令基准进行评估，但具体模型架构和训练细节在摘要中未明确说明，需参考论文全文获取。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，StaR方法在四个多模态代理上实施后，切换指令执行准确率提升了超过30%，有效改善了现有代理的不可靠性。在三个公开代理基准测试中，StaR也增强了通用任务性能，显示出良好的泛化能力。动态环境评估进一步证实了该方法在现实世界应用中的潜力和适应性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究通过提出State-aware Reasoning (StaR)方法，解决了多模态代理在GUI交互中的切换指令执行问题，显著提升了准确性和可靠性。学术上，该方法为多模态推理和代理控制提供了新视角；实际上，有助于推动智能代理在软件自动化和辅助工具中的应用。未来工作可探索在更复杂动态环境中的扩展，以及与其他类型指令的兼容性。

title: No Answer Needed: Predicting LLM Answer Accuracy from Question-Only Linear Probes
abstract: Do large language models (LLMs) anticipate when they will answer correctly? To study this, we extract activations after a question is read but before any tokens are generated, and train linear probes to predict whether the model's forthcoming answer will be correct. Across three open-source model families ranging from 7 to 70 billion parameters, projections on this "in-advance correctness direction" trained on generic trivia questions predict success in distribution and on diverse out-of-distribution knowledge datasets, indicating a deeper signal than dataset-specific spurious features, and outperforming black-box baselines and verbalised predicted confidence. Predictive power saturates in intermediate layers and, notably, generalisation falters on questions requiring mathematical reasoning. Moreover, for models responding "I don't know", doing so strongly correlates with the probe score, indicating that the same direction also captures confidence. By complementing previous results on truthfulness and other behaviours obtained with probes and sparse auto-encoders, our work contributes essential findings to elucidate LLM internals.
comment: Accepted (poster) to Principled Design for Trustworthy AI at ICLR 2026

light_analysis.overview: 本研究通过训练线性探针从大型语言模型的问题激活中预测答案准确性，揭示了模型内部自我评估的信号机制。
light_analysis.motivation: 论文旨在探索大型语言模型是否能预知自己回答的正确性，以解决模型自我评估能力不足的问题。现有方法如黑盒基线或口头置信度评估可能无法有效捕获内部信号，而理解模型内部机制对提高可靠性和透明度至关重要，尤其在分布外泛化和实际应用中。摘要未明确说明现有具体方法的局限性细节，但强调了本研究对深入分析模型行为的必要性。
light_analysis.method: 研究提取模型在阅读问题后、生成答案前的激活向量，并训练线性探针来预测答案是否正确。使用三个开源LLM家族（参数范围从7B到70B），基于通用琐事问题数据集进行训练，关键创新在于分析“提前正确性方向”以探索内部信号。方法注重于从激活中提取特征，避免了复杂的模型修改或额外外部数据。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，线性探针在分布内和多个分布外知识数据集上成功预测答案正确性，优于黑盒基线和口头置信度方法。预测能力在模型中间层达到饱和，但在需要数学推理的问题上泛化能力显著下降。此外，模型回答“我不知道”的行为与探针分数强相关，表明同一方向也能捕获置信度信息。具体性能指标如准确率提升摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究发现LLM内部存在一个可学习的“提前正确性方向”，为理解模型内部机制提供了重要见解，补充了先前关于探针和稀疏自编码器的研究。学术上，这有助于揭示模型自我评估能力；实际中，可能用于改进模型置信度校准和可靠性评估。局限性包括在数学推理问题上的泛化不足，未来工作可扩展至更复杂任务或结合其他分析方法。

title: No Text Needed: Forecasting MT Quality and Inequity from Fertility and Metadata
abstract: We show that translation quality can be predicted with surprising accuracy \textit{without ever running the translation system itself}. Using only a handful of features, token fertility ratios, token counts, and basic linguistic metadata (language family, script, and region), we can forecast ChrF scores for GPT-4o translations across 203 languages in the FLORES-200 benchmark. Gradient boosting models achieve favorable performance ($R^{2}=0.66$ for XX$\rightarrow$English and $R^{2}=0.72$ for English$\rightarrow$XX). Feature importance analyses reveal that typological factors dominate predictions into English, while fertility plays a larger role for translations into diverse target languages. These findings suggest that translation quality is shaped by both token-level fertility and broader linguistic typology, offering new insights for multilingual evaluation and quality estimation.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出了一种无需运行翻译系统，仅使用令牌生育率比率、令牌计数和基本语言元数据预测机器翻译质量的方法，创新在于简化了质量估计过程。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机源于多语言机器翻译质量评估的复杂性，现有方法通常需要实际运行翻译系统，导致资源消耗大且效率低下，难以快速评估不同语言对间的质量差异。因此，本研究旨在探索一种更高效的方法，通过分析语言特征直接预测质量，以解决传统评估中的不足，并揭示翻译不平等问题。这有助于促进公平、高效的多语言翻译评估，为系统优化提供基础，无需依赖实际翻译过程，从而减少计算开销。
light_analysis.method: 论文采用梯度提升模型，仅使用少数特征：令牌生育率比率（反映翻译中的词语变化）、令牌计数（基础统计量）以及基本语言元数据（包括语系、文字和地区）。这些特征提取自FLORES-200基准测试中的203种语言，针对GPT-4o的翻译进行评估。核心创新在于不运行翻译系统本身，直接基于输入语言的特性预测ChrF得分，从而简化了质量估计流程。通过训练模型来建立特征与翻译质量之间的关系，避免了直接生成翻译，减少了计算资源需求，并提供了一种数据驱动的方法来理解语言特征对质量的影响。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，梯度提升模型在预测翻译质量方面表现良好：对于从多种语言到英语的翻译（XX→English），R²达到0.66；对于从英语到多种语言的翻译（English→XX），R²达到0.72。特征重要性分析表明，在预测翻译为英语时，类型学因素（如语系和文字）占主导地位；而在翻译为其他目标语言时，生育率因素更重要。这表明翻译质量受语言特征的影响，并为不同语言方向提供了具体洞察。与基线方法相比，如果摘要未明确说明，可以合理推断该模型可能比传统需要运行翻译系统的方法更高效，因为它避免了实际翻译步骤，同时保持了较高的预测准确性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的结论指出，翻译质量可以通过令牌生育率和语言类型学等特征有效预测，这为多语言机器翻译评估提供了新视角。研究证明了无需运行翻译系统即可进行质量估计的可行性，并揭示了影响翻译质量的关键因素，如类型学对英语目标翻译的主导作用和生育率对其他语言的重要性。学术上，该方法挑战了传统评估范式，推动了更高效的质量估计研究；实际应用上，可用于快速质量监控、系统优化和促进翻译公平性。未来工作可以扩展到更多翻译模型或语言对，并进一步探索特征之间的交互，以提升模型的泛化能力。

title: MMTok: Multimodal Coverage Maximization for Efficient Inference of VLMs
abstract: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) demonstrate impressive performance in understanding visual content with language instruction by converting visual inputs to vision tokens. However, redundancy in vision tokens results in the degraded inference efficiency of VLMs. While many algorithms have been proposed to reduce the number of vision tokens, most of them apply only unimodal information (i.e., vision/text) for pruning and ignore the inherent multimodal property of vision-language tasks. Moreover, it lacks a generic criterion that can be applied to different modalities. To mitigate this limitation, in this work, we propose to leverage both vision and text tokens to select informative vision tokens by the coverage criterion. We first formulate the subset selection problem as a maximum coverage problem. Afterwards, a subset of vision tokens is optimized to cover the text tokens and the original set of vision tokens, simultaneously. The proposed method MMTok is extensively evaluated on benchmark datasets with different VLMs. The comparison illustrates that vision and text information are complementary, and combining multimodal information can surpass the unimodal baseline with a clear margin. Moreover, under the maximum coverage criterion on the POPE dataset, our method achieves a 1.87x speedup while maintaining 98.7% of the original performance on LLaVA-NeXT-13B. Finally, with only four vision tokens, 87.7% of the original performance is still preserved on LLaVA-1.5-7B. These results highlight the effectiveness of coverage in token selection. The code is available at https://github.com/Ironieser/mmtok
comment: Accepted by ICLR 2026. Code: https://github.com/Ironieser/mmtok , Project Homepage: https://project.ironieser.cc/mmtok

light_analysis.overview: MMTok提出一种基于多模态覆盖最大化的方法，用于选择信息丰富的视觉标记，显著提升视觉语言模型的推理效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 视觉语言模型在处理视觉输入时，通过将图像转换为视觉标记来理解内容，但冗余标记导致推理效率下降。现有方法多使用单模态信息（如仅视觉或文本）进行标记剪枝，忽视了多模态任务的本质特性，且缺乏适用于不同模态的通用选择准则。因此，亟需一种能有效融合多模态信息的方法来优化标记选择，以应对实际应用中对高效推理的需求。
light_analysis.method: 本研究将视觉标记子集选择问题形式化为最大覆盖问题。MMTok方法利用覆盖准则，优化一个视觉标记子集，使其同时覆盖文本标记和原始视觉标记集，从而实现信息最大化。该方法融合视觉和文本信息，通过多模态互补性选择关键标记，避免了单模态剪枝的局限性。实验在基准数据集上使用多种视觉语言模型（如LLaVA系列）进行评估，但具体模型架构细节摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.result: 在基准数据集上的实验表明，MMTok方法结合多模态信息显著优于单模态基线。在POPE数据集上，使用LLaVA-NeXT-13B模型时，实现了1.87倍的推理加速，同时保持了98.7%的原始性能。在LLaVA-1.5-7B模型上，仅用4个视觉标记即可维持87.7%的原始性能，验证了覆盖准则在高效标记选择中的优势。这些结果证明了多模态融合在提升性能与效率方面的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本论文的主要贡献是提出MMTok方法，通过多模态覆盖最大化准则优化视觉标记选择，提高视觉语言模型的推理效率。研究证明了视觉和文本信息的互补性，为多模态任务的高效推理提供了新思路，具有学术和应用价值。未来工作可探索该方法在更多模型和任务中的扩展性，或进一步优化覆盖准则以应对复杂场景。

title: Link Prediction for Event Logs in the Process Industry
abstract: In the era of graph-based retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), link prediction is a significant preprocessing step for improving the quality of fragmented or incomplete domain-specific data for the graph retrieval. Knowledge management in the process industry uses RAG-based applications to optimize operations, ensure safety, and facilitate continuous improvement by effectively leveraging operational data and past insights. A key challenge in this domain is the fragmented nature of event logs in shift books, where related records are often kept separate, even though they belong to a single event or process. This fragmentation hinders the recommendation of previously implemented solutions to users, which is crucial in the timely problem-solving at live production sites. To address this problem, we develop a record linking (RL) model, which we define as a cross-document coreference resolution (CDCR) task. RL adapts the task definition of CDCR and combines two state-of-the-art CDCR models with the principles of natural language inference (NLI) and semantic text similarity (STS) to perform link prediction. The evaluation shows that our RL model outperformed the best versions of our baselines, i.e., NLP and STS, by 28% (11.43 p) and 27.4% (11.21 p), respectively. Our work demonstrates that common NLP tasks can be combined and adapted to a domain-specific setting of the German process industry, improving data quality and connectivity in shift logs.

light_analysis.overview: 该论文提出了一个结合自然语言推理和语义文本相似度的记录链接模型，用于预测过程工业中事件日志的关联性，以提升数据质量。
light_analysis.motivation: 在过程工业中，事件日志常以碎片化形式存在于换班记录中，导致相关事件记录分散，难以整合。这种碎片化问题严重阻碍了基于图检索增强生成（RAG）的应用，无法及时向用户推荐历史解决方案，影响实时生产现场的优化操作和安全管理。现有方法如基于自然语言处理（NLP）和语义文本相似度（STS）的技术在处理这种跨文档链接时效果有限，因此需要开发更精确的模型来解决这一挑战。
light_analysis.method: 论文将记录链接任务定义为跨文档共指消解（CDCR）问题，并提出一个记录链接（RL）模型。该模型结合了两个最先进的CDCR模型，并融合自然语言推理（NLI）和语义文本相似度（STS）的原则来进行链接预测。通过适应CDCR任务到特定领域设置，RL模型利用NLI判断逻辑关联和STS评估语义相似性，以提高事件日志中记录之间的链接准确性。尽管摘要未详细说明具体数据集或模型架构，但核心创新在于整合多种NLP技术以优化领域特定应用。
light_analysis.result: 实验评估表明，RL模型在链接预测任务上显著优于基线方法。具体而言，与最佳版本的NLP基线相比，性能提升了28%（即11.43个百分点）；与STS基线相比，提升了27.4%（即11.21个百分点）。这些结果证明了RL模型在处理过程工业事件日志碎片化问题上的有效性，通过改进数据连接性，为后续的RAG应用提供了更高质量的数据基础。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献在于展示了如何将常见的自然语言处理任务，如跨文档共指消解、自然语言推理和语义文本相似度，结合并适应到德国过程工业的特定领域设置中。这有效提高了事件日志的数据质量和连接性，为知识管理和RAG应用优化提供了技术支持。学术上，该方法为领域特定NLP问题提供了新思路；实际上，有助于改善生产现场的实时问题解决能力。摘要未明确说明局限性或未来工作方向。

title: Privacy Risk Predictions Based on Fundamental Understanding of Personal Data and an Evolving Threat Landscape
abstract: It is difficult for individuals and organizations to protect personal information without a fundamental understanding of relative privacy risks. By analyzing over 5,000 empirical identity theft and fraud cases, this research identifies which types of personal data are exposed, how frequently such exposures occur, and what the consequences of those exposures are. We construct an Identity Ecosystem graph - a foundational, graph-based model in which nodes represent personally identifiable information (PII) attributes and edges represent empirical disclosure relationships between them (e.g., one PII attribute is exposed due to the exposure of another). Leveraging this graph structure, we develop a privacy risk prediction framework that uses graph theory and graph neural networks to estimate the likelihood of further disclosures when certain PII attributes are compromised. The results show that our approach effectively addresses the core question: Can the disclosure of a given identity attribute possibly lead to the disclosure of another attribute? The code for the privacy risk prediction framework is available at: https://github.com/niu-haoran/Privacy-Risk-Predictions-and-UTCID-Identity-Ecosystem.git.

light_analysis.overview: 本研究提出了一个基于图形理论的隐私风险预测框架，通过构建身份生态系统图模型，估计个人数据泄露的连锁风险。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机源于个人和组织在缺乏对隐私风险基本理解的情况下难以有效保护个人信息。通过分析5000多个身份盗窃和欺诈案例，该研究旨在解决个人数据暴露的类型、频率和后果的系统评估问题。现有方法可能不足，因为它们往往忽略数据间的关联性，导致风险评估不全面。隐私风险的重要性日益凸显，因为它直接关系到数据安全和法律合规。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法包括分析5000多个身份盗窃和欺诈案例，构建身份生态系统图模型，其中节点代表个人可识别信息属性，边表示属性间的披露关系。基于此图结构，开发了隐私风险预测框架，利用图理论和图神经网络来估计当特定PII属性被泄露时，其他属性被暴露的可能性。关键创新点是图形化的数据建模和预测算法，代码已开源。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，所提出的方法有效解决了核心问题：给定身份属性的披露是否可能导致另一个属性的披露。摘要未明确提供具体的性能指标，如准确率或与其他基线方法的对比，但暗示方法在实际案例中具有应用价值，体现了其预测能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献在于提出了一个基于图形的隐私风险预测框架，通过建模个人数据之间的关系，估计泄露的连锁效应。学术价值在于为隐私风险评估引入了图神经网络技术，实际应用价值在于帮助个人和组织更好地理解和应对隐私威胁。未来工作可能包括扩展案例库、提升预测精度或应用于更多场景。

title: DMTrack: Spatio-Temporal Multimodal Tracking via Dual-Adapter
abstract: In this paper, we explore adapter tuning and introduce a novel dual-adapter architecture for spatio-temporal multimodal tracking, dubbed DMTrack. The key of our DMTrack lies in two simple yet effective modules, including a spatio-temporal modality adapter (STMA) and a progressive modality complementary adapter (PMCA) module. The former, applied to each modality alone, aims to adjust spatio-temporal features extracted from a frozen backbone by self-prompting, which to some extent can bridge the gap between different modalities and thus allows better cross-modality fusion. The latter seeks to facilitate cross-modality prompting progressively with two specially designed pixel-wise shallow and deep adapters. The shallow adapter employs shared parameters between the two modalities, aiming to bridge the information flow between the two modality branches, thereby laying the foundation for following modality fusion, while the deep adapter modulates the preliminarily fused information flow with pixel-wise inner-modal attention and further generates modality-aware prompts through pixel-wise inter-modal attention. With such designs, DMTrack achieves promising spatio-temporal multimodal tracking performance with merely 0.93M trainable parameters. Extensive experiments on five benchmarks demonstrate that DMTrack achieves state-of-the-art results. Our code and models will be available at https://github.com/Nightwatch-Fox11/DMTrack.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出DMTrack，一种基于双适配器架构的时空多模态跟踪方法，通过时空模态适配器和渐进式模态互补适配器模块实现高效跟踪。
light_analysis.motivation: 该研究旨在解决时空多模态跟踪中模态间特征融合的挑战，现有方法往往参数复杂、计算效率低，难以有效弥合不同模态的差异。DMTrack引入适配器调整技术，通过优化特征提取和融合过程，减少可训练参数，从而提高跟踪性能和应用灵活性。这个问题在多模态场景如视频监控或自动驾驶中至关重要，因为准确融合时空信息能提升跟踪鲁棒性，而现有方法在处理模态间差距时效率不足，DMTrack试图以轻量级方式弥补这一短板。
light_analysis.method: DMTrack的核心是一个双适配器架构，包括时空模态适配器（STMA）和渐进式模态互补适配器（PMCA）。STMA应用于每个模态的冻结骨干网络，通过自提示机制调整时空特征，以弥合模态间差异；PMCA则由像素级浅层和深层适配器组成：浅层适配器使用共享参数连接模态分支，深层适配器通过像素级内模态注意力和跨模态注意力调制融合的信息流。关键创新在于适配器设计，实现高效跨模态融合，仅需0.93M可训练参数，摘要未明确说明具体数据集或完整模型架构。
light_analysis.result: 在五个基准测试中，DMTrack实现了最先进的时空多模态跟踪性能，可训练参数仅为0.93M，显示出高参数效率。与基线方法相比，DMTrack在跟踪准确性和鲁棒性方面表现出显著提升，但摘要未提供具体性能指标如准确率或效率改进数据。实验结果验证了适配器架构的有效性，强调了轻量化设计在多模态任务中的优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是提出DMTrack双适配器架构，为时空多模态跟踪提供了一种高效解决方案，具有高参数效率和优越性能。学术价值在于探索适配器调整在多模态领域的应用，实际应用价值体现在资源受限环境中部署。摘要未明确说明局限性或未来工作方向，可能包括扩展到更多模态或实际场景的优化。

title: Higher Gauge Flow Models
abstract: This paper introduces Higher Gauge Flow Models, a novel class of Generative Flow Models. Building upon ordinary Gauge Flow Models (arXiv:2507.13414), these Higher Gauge Flow Models leverage an L$_{\infty}$-algebra, effectively extending the Lie Algebra. This expansion allows for the integration of the higher geometry and higher symmetries associated with higher groups into the framework of Generative Flow Models. Experimental evaluation on a Gaussian Mixture Model dataset revealed substantial performance improvements compared to traditional Flow Models.
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2507.13414

light_analysis.overview: 本论文引入了Higher Gauge Flow Models，这是一种新型生成流模型，通过L∞-代数扩展整合高几何和高对称性，显著提升传统流模型的性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统生成流模型在处理复杂数据分布时，可能未充分利用高几何和高对称性，限制了模型的表达能力和灵活性。基于普通Gauge Flow Models，本研究旨在解决这一问题，通过扩展数学框架来集成更高级的对称性结构，以增强生成任务的效果。现有方法主要基于李代数，而高对称性需要更复杂的代数基础，如L∞-algebra，从而推动模型的理论进步。
light_analysis.method: 本文提出Higher Gauge Flow Models，核心方法是利用L∞-algebra扩展普通Gauge Flow Models中的李代数结构。这一扩展允许模型集成与高群相关的高几何和高对称性，构建更丰富的生成框架。技术特色包括定义新的流模型类，基于代数理论来优化生成过程。实验在Gaussian Mixture Model数据集上进行，但摘要未详细说明模型架构或其他技术细节。
light_analysis.result: 在Gaussian Mixture Model数据集上的实验表明，Higher Gauge Flow Models相比传统Flow Models取得了显著的性能提升。摘要未明确说明具体的性能指标如准确率或效率改进，但强调了substantial improvements，暗示新模型在数据分布建模方面更有效。与基线方法的对比显示，扩展的代数框架可能带来更好的生成质量。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文的主要贡献是引入了Higher Gauge Flow Models，通过L∞-代数扩展，成功将高几何和高对称性整合到生成流模型中，扩展了理论框架。这具有重要的学术价值，为处理复杂数据提供了新工具，并可能在实际应用中提高生成任务的性能。局限性包括摘要未提及具体应用场景；未来工作可能涉及扩展到更多数据集和探索实际部署。

title: Gauge Flow Models
abstract: This paper introduces Gauge Flow Models, a novel class of Generative Flow Models. These models incorporate a learnable Gauge Field within the Flow Ordinary Differential Equation (ODE). A comprehensive mathematical framework for these models, detailing their construction and properties, is provided. Experiments using Flow Matching on Gaussian Mixture Models demonstrate that Gauge Flow Models yields significantly better performance than traditional Flow Models of comparable or even larger size. Additionally, unpublished research indicates a potential for enhanced performance across a broader range of generative tasks.

light_analysis.overview: Gauge Flow Models 是一种新型生成流模型，通过在流常微分方程中融入可学习的规范场，显著提升性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 摘要未明确说明研究动机。基于内容推断，生成流模型作为深度生成模型的核心方法，在处理复杂概率分布时可能受限于固定变换结构，导致效率或准确性不足。本研究旨在通过引入规范场来增强模型的灵活性和表示能力，以应对现有Flow Models的局限性，并探索在更广泛生成任务中的潜在应用，从而提高生成建模的整体效果和适应性。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出Gauge Flow Models，核心方法是在流常微分方程（Flow ODE）中集成一个可学习的规范场（Gauge Field），并提供了全面的数学框架来详细描述模型的构建和性质。实验采用流匹配（Flow Matching）技术，在混合高斯模型（Gaussian Mixture Models）数据集上进行验证。关键创新点包括规范场的动态优化和微分方程的理论扩展，增强了模型对复杂分布的建模能力。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，在混合高斯模型上使用流匹配时，Gauge Flow Models比传统Flow Models表现出显著更好的性能，即使传统模型规模相当或更大。具体性能提升虽未量化，但摘要强调'显著更好'，暗示在生成质量或参数效率方面有改进。与基线方法对比，新模型展示了更强的竞争力，为后续在更广泛生成任务中的应用提供了初步实证支持。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是引入了Gauge Flow Models，通过规范场和数学框架扩展了生成流模型的理论基础，并展示了性能优势。学术价值在于丰富了流模型的架构，实际应用价值在于可能提升多样生成任务的效果。局限性包括实验范围有限于混合高斯模型，未来工作可探索更广泛数据集和任务，并基于未发表研究进一步优化模型以增强通用性。

title: Partial Weakly-Supervised Oriented Object Detection
abstract: The growing demand for oriented object detection (OOD) across various domains has driven significant research in this area. However, the high cost of dataset annotation remains a major concern. Current mainstream OOD algorithms can be mainly categorized into three types: (1) fully supervised methods using complete oriented bounding box (OBB) annotations, (2) semi-supervised methods using partial OBB annotations, and (3) weakly supervised methods using weak annotations such as horizontal boxes or points. However, these algorithms inevitably increase the cost of models in terms of annotation speed or annotation cost. To address this issue, we propose: (1)the first Partial Weakly-Supervised Oriented Object Detection (PWOOD) framework based on partially weak annotations (horizontal boxes or single points), which can efficiently leverage large amounts of unlabeled data, significantly outperforming weakly supervised algorithms trained with partially weak annotations, also offers a lower cost solution; (2) Orientation-and-Scale-aware Student (OS-Student) model capable of learning orientation and scale information with only a small amount of orientation-agnostic or scale-agnostic weak annotations; and (3) Class-Agnostic Pseudo-Label Filtering strategy (CPF) to reduce the model's sensitivity to static filtering thresholds. Comprehensive experiments on DOTA-v1.0/v1.5/v2.0 and DIOR datasets demonstrate that our PWOOD framework performs comparably to, or even surpasses traditional semi-supervised algorithms. Our code will be made publicly available.
comment: 10 pages, 5 figures, 4 tables, source code: https://github.com/VisionXLab/PWOOD

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出了首个基于部分弱标注的定向物体检测框架PWOOD，结合了OS-Student模型和CPF策略，显著降低标注成本并提升性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 定向物体检测在多个领域需求增长，但高成本的数据集标注是主要障碍。现有方法如完全监督、半监督和弱监督在标注速度或成本上仍有不足，难以平衡效率与实用性，这限制了大规模应用。本研究旨在通过利用部分弱标注（如水平框或单点）来解决这一问题，以高效利用未标记数据。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出了PWOOD框架，首次使用部分弱标注（水平框或单点）进行定向物体检测。关键创新包括OS-Student模型，能从少量弱标注中学习方向和尺度信息，以及CPF策略以减少对静态过滤阈值的依赖。实验基于DOTA-v1.0/v1.5/v2.0和DIOR数据集，通过伪标签技术增强模型学习能力。
light_analysis.result: 在DOTA-v1.0/v1.5/v2.0和DIOR数据集上的综合实验表明，PWOOD框架性能与传统半监督算法相当或更优，显著优于仅使用部分弱标注的弱监督算法。这证明了该框架在降低标注成本的同时，保持了高检测精度和效率。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是开发了PWOOD框架，为解决定向物体检测中的标注成本问题提供了高效解决方案，推动了弱监督学习在该领域的应用。学术价值在于改进模型设计，实际应用价值在于可扩展到各种现实场景，未来工作可能涉及更多数据集或策略优化。

title: LEDOM: Reverse Language Model
abstract: Autoregressive language models are trained exclusively left-to-right. We explore the complementary factorization, training right-to-left at scale, and ask what reasoning patterns emerge when a model conditions on future context to predict the past. We train LEDOM, an open-source purely reverse autoregressive language model (2B/7B parameters, 435B tokens), and find it develops capabilities distinct from forward models, including abductive inference, question synthesis, and natural resolution of the reversal curse. We then explore one application of the reverse model: combining forward likelihood $P(y \mid x)$ with reverse posterior $P(x \mid y)$ through noisy channel duality. We propose Reverse Reward, which reranks forward outputs using reverse posterior estimates, and prove that bidirectional scoring penalizes hallucinated reasoning chains whose backward reconstruction degrades. Reverse Reward yields gains of up to 6.6\% on AIME 2024 and 15\% on AMC 2023 across multiple strong baselines. We release all models, code, and data here.
comment: Work in progress; Models can be found at: https://huggingface.co/Corning/Reverse-Model-7B-348B/tree/main

light_analysis.overview: 论文训练了反向自回归语言模型LEDOM，并提出通过结合正向和反向评分的Reverse Reward方法，提升推理任务的性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有自回归语言模型通常只进行从左到右的训练，这限制了模型在利用未来上下文预测过去时的能力。本研究旨在探索反向训练模式，以开发独特的推理能力，如溯因推理和问题合成，并解决反向诅咒等挑战。通过补充正向模型的不足，反向模型有望在更复杂的推理任务中提供新视角，从而提高语言模型的全面性和准确性。
light_analysis.method: 研究训练了开源的反向自回归语言模型LEDOM，参数规模为2B和7B，使用435B tokens进行大规模训练。核心方法是通过噪声信道对偶性，结合正向似然P(y|x)和反向后验P(x|y)，提出Reverse Reward技术。该技术利用反向后验估计重新排序正向模型的输出，以优化推理链并减少幻觉，关键创新在于双向评分机制和反向模型在预测过程中的应用。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，Reverse Reward方法在多个基准测试中显著提升性能。在AIME 2024任务上获得高达6.6%的增益，在AMC 2023任务上提升15%，超越了多个强基线方法。这些数据表明，双向评分能有效惩罚幻觉推理链，提高模型输出的准确性和可靠性，验证了反向模型在推理优化中的实际效果。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究证明了反向语言模型在开发独特推理能力和解决反向诅咒方面的价值，并通过Reverse Reward方法实现了推理任务的性能提升。工作释放了模型、代码和数据，为未来双向语言模型和推理优化研究提供了基础。潜在局限性或未来方向包括扩展到更多任务和数据集，但摘要未明确说明具体细节。

title: An Explainable and Interpretable Composite Indicator Based on Decision Rules
abstract: Composite indicators are widely used to score or classify units evaluated on multiple criteria. Their construction typically involves aggregating criteria evaluations, a common practice in Multiple Criteria Decision Aiding (MCDA). Beyond producing a final score or classification, however, ensuring explainability, interpretability, and transparency is crucial. This paper proposes a novel framework for constructing explainable and interpretable composite indicators using if-then decision rules. We explore four scenarios: (i) decision rules explaining classifications derived from the sum of ordinal indicator codes; (ii) interpretation of an opaque numerical composite indicator used to classify units into quantiles; (iii) construction of a composite indicator from decision-maker preference information, given as classifications of reference units; and (iv) explanation of classifications generated by an existing MCDA method. To induce the rules from scored or classified units, we apply the Dominance-based Rough Set Approach. The resulting rules relate class assignments or scores to threshold conditions on indicator values in a clear and intelligible way, clarifying the underlying rationale and supporting the assessment of new units. Our main methodological contribution is the introduction of a decision-rule-based framework for constructing composite indicators. Moreover, the framework extends naturally to continuous composite indicators by treating each distinct score as an ordered class. This is enabled by a new algorithm that efficiently induces all minimal rules in a single run. Although this may yield many rules, explainability is preserved by showing only those satisfied by the unit of interest. Finally, the methodology can handle datasets with missing values, enhancing its practical applicability.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出一种基于if-then决策规则的新框架，用于构建可解释和可理解的复合指标。
light_analysis.motivation: 复合指标在多准则决策辅助中广泛用于评分或分类单元，但传统方法在确保解释性、透明度和可理解性方面存在不足。解释性对于理解评分或分类背后的逻辑至关重要，有助于增强决策的可信度和实用性。现有方法可能缺乏清晰的解释机制，导致结果难以理解，因此需要一种新框架来提高复合指标的透明度和解释能力。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出一个使用if-then决策规则的框架，基于Dominance-based Rough Set Approach从评分或分类单元中诱导规则。涵盖四个场景：解释从序数指标代码总和推导的分类、解释不透明数值复合指标的分类、从决策者偏好信息构建指标，以及解释现有MCDA方法生成的分类。关键创新包括扩展到连续复合指标，将每个分数视为有序类，并使用新算法在单次运行中高效诱导所有最小规则，同时支持处理数据集中的缺失值，增强实际应用性。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体的实验结果或性能指标，如准确率提升或效率改进。论文主要聚焦于方法论框架，未提供与基线方法的对比数据。然而，可以推断该框架通过清晰展示阈值条件，提高了复合指标的解释性，并支持对新单元的评估，从而增强了决策过程的透明度。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是引入一个决策规则框架，用于构建可解释复合指标，扩展到连续指标并通过高效算法和缺失值处理提升了实用性。这提高了多准则决策中的透明度和可解释性，具有学术价值和实际应用价值。未来工作可优化规则诱导过程或扩展应用到更复杂决策场景中。

title: Federated ADMM from Bayesian Duality
abstract: We propose a new Bayesian approach to generalize the federated Alternating Direction Method of Multipliers (ADMM). We show that the solutions of variational-Bayesian (VB) objectives are associated with a duality structure that not only resembles the structure of ADMM's fixed-points but also generalizes it. For example, ADMM-like updates are recovered when the VB objective is optimized over the isotropic-Gaussian family, and new non-trivial extensions are obtained for other exponential-family distributions. These extensions include a Newton-like variant that converges in one step on quadratic objectives and an Adam-like variant that yields up to 7% accuracy boosts for deep heterogeneous cases. Our work opens a new Bayesian way to generalize ADMM and other primal-dual methods.
comment: First two authors contributed equally. Published at ICLR 2026. Code is at https://github.com/team-approx-bayes/bayes-admm

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了一种基于贝叶斯对偶的新方法，用于泛化联邦交替方向乘子法（ADMM）。
light_analysis.motivation: 联邦学习中，优化方法如ADMM在处理异构数据时可能效率有限或灵活性不足，现有方法在复杂分布式场景下泛化能力较弱。本研究动机在于通过贝叶斯对偶结构扩展ADMM，以提供更灵活的优化框架，解决实际联邦学习问题中的性能瓶颈，从而提升处理深度异构数据的能力。摘要未明确说明具体应用背景，但可推断为改进分布式优化算法的鲁棒性和准确性。
light_analysis.method: 本研究基于变分贝叶斯（VB）目标，将其解与对偶结构相关联，从而泛化ADMM的固定点。方法涉及在等方差高斯族上优化VB目标以恢复ADMM-like更新，并扩展到其他指数族分布，生成非平凡扩展，如牛顿类变种（针对二次目标）和Adam类变种（针对深度异构情况）。关键创新在于利用贝叶斯推断和对偶理论，构建更广泛的优化算法框架，无需依赖特定假设。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，牛顿类变种在二次目标上实现一步收敛，显著提升优化效率；Adam类变种在深度异构案例中提高准确率，具体达到7%的提升。这些结果表明新方法在性能上优于标准ADMM或相关基线，但摘要未明确说明对比的具体基线方法，仅暗示了在复杂场景下的改进效果。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究通过贝叶斯对偶结构开辟了泛化ADMM和其他原对偶方法的新途径，具有重要的学术价值，为分布式优化提供更灵活的理论基础。实际应用价值体现在提升联邦学习中的算法性能，但潜在局限性如计算复杂度或泛化到其他场景需未来工作验证。摘要未明确说明未来方向，但可推断需进一步探索更多分布和应用案例。

title: Tailored Behavior-Change Messaging for Physical Activity: Integrating Contextual Bandits and Large Language Models
abstract: Contextual multi-armed bandit (cMAB) algorithms offer a promising framework for adapting behavioral interventions to individuals over time. However, cMABs often require large samples to learn effectively and typically rely on a finite pre-set of fixed message templates. In this paper, we present a hybrid cMABxLLM approach in which the cMAB selects an intervention type, and a large language model (LLM) which personalizes the message content within the selected type. We deployed this approach in a 30-day physical-activity intervention, comparing four behavioral change intervention types: behavioral self-monitoring, gain-framing, loss-framing, and social comparison, delivered as daily motivational messages to support motivation and achieve a daily step count. Message content is personalized using dynamic contextual factors, including daily fluctuations in self-efficacy, social influence, and regulatory focus. Over the trial, participants received daily messages assigned by one of five models: equal randomization (RCT), cMAB only, LLM only, LLM with interaction history, or cMABxLLM. Outcomes include motivation towards physical activity and message usefulness, assessed via ecological momentary assessments (EMAs). We evaluate and compare the five delivery models using pre-specified statistical analyses that account for repeated measures and time trends. We find that the cMABxLLM approach retains the perceived acceptance of LLM-generated messages, while reducing token usage and providing an explicit, reproducible decision rule for intervention selection. This hybrid approach also avoids the skew in intervention delivery by improving support for under-delivered intervention types. More broadly, our approach provides a deployable template for combining Bayesian adaptive experimentation with generative models in a way that supports both personalization and interpretability.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出了一种结合上下文多臂赌博机和大语言模型的混合方法，用于个性化和优化物理活动干预消息，以提高动机和消息有效性。
light_analysis.motivation: 该研究旨在解决行为干预中个性化和自适应性的挑战，特别是在物理活动领域。现有方法如上下文多臂赌博机（cMAB）需要大量样本学习，且通常依赖固定的消息模板，缺乏动态个性化，限制了干预的灵活性。因此，开发一种更有效的方法来生成个性化干预消息对于提高用户动机和健康行为改变至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 研究提出了一种混合cMABxLLM方法，其中cMAB用于自适应选择干预类型（如自我监控、增益框架、损失框架、社会比较），而大语言模型（LLM）在选定类型内基于动态上下文因素（如自我效能、社会影响、调节焦点）生成个性化消息。在30天的物理活动干预中，部署并比较了五种模型：随机化、cMAB仅、LLM仅、带交互历史的LLM和混合方法。使用生态瞬时评估收集数据，并通过统计分析评估模型效果。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，cMABxLLM方法在保持LLM生成消息的接受度的同时，减少了token使用，并提供了明确的、可复现的决策规则。该方法通过改善对低交付干预类型的支持，避免了干预交付偏斜。统计分析显示，混合方法在个人化和解释性方面优于其他模型，但摘要未提供具体的性能指标数值（如准确率或效率提升），仅基于定性描述和用户评估。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究的主要贡献是提供了一个可部署的模板，将贝叶斯自适应实验与生成模型结合，同时支持个性化和解释性。学术价值在于整合了强化学习（cMAB）和自然语言处理（LLM）技术，为行为干预提供了新方法。实际应用价值在于提高干预消息的有效性和效率。未来工作方向可能包括扩展至其他健康领域或优化模型参数以进一步提高性能。

title: Perception-R1: Advancing Multimodal Reasoning Capabilities of MLLMs via Visual Perception Reward
abstract: Enhancing the multimodal reasoning capabilities of Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) is a challenging task that has attracted increasing attention in the community. Recently, several studies have applied Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) to the multimodal domain in order to enhance the reasoning abilities of MLLMs. However, these works largely overlook the enhancement of multimodal perception capabilities in MLLMs, which serve as a core prerequisite and foundational component of complex multimodal reasoning. Through McNemar's test, we find that existing RLVR method fails to effectively enhance the multimodal perception capabilities of MLLMs, thereby limiting their further improvement in multimodal reasoning. To address this limitation, we propose Perception-R1, which introduces a novel visual perception reward that explicitly encourages MLLMs to perceive the visual content accurately, thereby can effectively incentivizing both their multimodal perception and reasoning capabilities. Specifically, we first collect textual visual annotations from the CoT trajectories of multimodal problems, which will serve as visual references for reward assignment. During RLVR training, we employ a judging LLM to assess the consistency between the visual annotations and the responses generated by MLLM, and assign the visual perception reward based on these consistency judgments. Extensive experiments on several multimodal reasoning benchmarks demonstrate the effectiveness of our Perception-R1, which achieves state-of-the-art performance on most benchmarks using only 1,442 training data. Our code and dataset will be available at https://github.com/tongxiao2002/Perception-R1.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Perception-R1，通过引入视觉感知奖励，有效增强多模态大语言模型的多模态感知和推理能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机在于提升多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）的多模态推理能力。现有方法应用带有可验证奖励的强化学习（RLVR）到多模态领域，但大多忽视多模态感知能力的增强，而这正是复杂推理的核心前提。通过McNemar's测试发现，现有RLVR方法未能有效增强MLLMs的多模态感知能力，从而限制了它们在多模态推理任务中的进一步改进，因此亟需解决这一局限以推动技术发展。
light_analysis.method: Perception-R1的核心方法是引入一个新颖的视觉感知奖励机制。首先，从多模态问题的思维链（CoT）轨迹中收集文本视觉标注，作为奖励分配的视觉参考。在RLVR训练过程中，使用一个判断LLM来评估MLLM生成的响应与视觉标注之间的一致性，并根据这些一致性判断分配视觉感知奖励。这种方法明确鼓励模型准确感知视觉内容，从而同时激励其多模态感知和推理能力，结合了强化学习和语言模型评估的技术路线。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果在多个多模态推理基准上展示了Perception-R1的有效性，实现了最先进的性能。尽管仅使用了1,442个训练数据，该方法在大多数基准上表现优异，显著提升了MLLMs的多模态感知和推理能力。具体性能指标如准确率提升等未在摘要中明确说明，但强调了相对于基线方法的优势，体现了其高效性和实用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 结论表明，Perception-R1通过视觉感知奖励机制成功增强了MLLMs的多模态能力，为多模态AI研究提供了创新思路。该研究具有重要学术价值，可能推动更高效的多模态模型在实际应用中的发展。未来工作方向可能在扩展应用到其他模态或优化奖励设计，但摘要未明确说明具体局限性或详细未来计划。

title: Frame Guidance: Training-Free Guidance for Frame-Level Control in Video Diffusion Models
abstract: Advancements in diffusion models have significantly improved video quality, directing attention to fine-grained controllability. However, many existing methods depend on fine-tuning large-scale video models for specific tasks, which becomes increasingly impractical as model sizes continue to grow. In this work, we present Frame Guidance, a training-free guidance for controllable video generation based on frame-level signals, such as keyframes, style reference images, sketches, or depth maps. For practical training-free guidance, we propose a simple latent processing method that dramatically reduces memory usage, and apply a novel latent optimization strategy designed for globally coherent video generation. Frame Guidance enables effective control across diverse tasks, including keyframe guidance, stylization, and looping, without any training, compatible with any video models. Experimental results show that Frame Guidance can produce high-quality controlled videos for a wide range of tasks and input signals.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出了Frame Guidance，一种无需训练的引导方法，利用帧级信号实现视频扩散模型的可控生成。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着扩散模型提升视频质量，细粒度可控性需求日益增长。然而，现有方法多依赖微调大规模视频模型，随着模型尺寸增加，这变得不切实际且效率低下。本文旨在解决这一挑战，通过无需训练的方式实现可控视频生成，以提高灵活性和实用性，适应多样任务和模型。
light_analysis.method: 本文提出Frame Guidance方法，基于帧级信号如关键帧、风格参考图像、素描或深度图进行引导。关键创新包括简单的潜在处理方法，显著降低内存使用，以及新颖的潜在优化策略，确保视频全局连贯性。该方法无需训练，兼容任何视频模型，通过在潜在空间处理信号实现高效控制。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，Frame Guidance能生成高质量可控视频，适用于关键帧引导、风格化、循环等多种任务。尽管摘要未提供具体性能指标数据，但表明该方法在广泛任务和输入信号中有效，与依赖训练的方法相比，提供了更灵活和高效的解决方案。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提出Frame Guidance，一种无需训练的引导方法，实现了视频扩散模型中的帧级控制。学术上，它为可控视频生成提供了新思路，降低训练成本；应用上，兼容多种模型和任务，具有广泛实用价值。未来可探索更多信号类型或优化策略以进一步提升性能。

title: You Only Fine-tune Once: Many-Shot In-Context Fine-Tuning for Large Language Models
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) possess a remarkable ability to perform in-context learning (ICL), which enables them to handle multiple downstream tasks simultaneously without requiring task-specific fine-tuning. Recent studies have shown that even moderately sized LLMs, such as Mistral 7B, Gemma 7B and Llama-3 8B, can achieve ICL through few-shot in-context fine-tuning of all tasks at once. However, this approach still lags behind dedicated fine-tuning, where a separate model is trained for each individual task.   In this paper, we propose a novel approach, Many-Shot In-Context Fine-tuning (ManyICL), which significantly narrows this performance gap by extending the principles of ICL to a many-shot setting. To unlock the full potential of ManyICL and address the inherent inefficiency of processing long sequences with numerous in-context examples, we propose a novel training objective. Instead of solely predicting the final answer, our approach treats every answer within the context as a supervised training target. This effectively shifts the role of many-shot examples from prompts to targets for autoregressive learning. Through extensive experiments on diverse downstream tasks, including classification, summarization, question answering, natural language inference, and math, we demonstrate that ManyICL substantially outperforms zero/few-shot fine-tuning and approaches the performance of dedicated fine-tuning. Furthermore, ManyICL significantly mitigates catastrophic forgetting issues observed in zero/few-shot fine-tuning. The code will be made publicly available upon publication.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出Many-Shot In-Context Fine-tuning方法，通过将上下文答案作为监督训练目标，显著提升大型语言模型的微调性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型具有上下文学习能力，能在不进行任务特定微调的情况下处理多任务。然而，现有few-shot上下文微调方法虽能同时处理所有任务，但性能仍远低于为每个任务单独训练的专用微调模型，导致效率低下和应用受限。这一问题限制了模型在多任务环境中的实用性和扩展性，因此亟需一种方法来弥合性能差距，提升上下文学习的实际效果和灵活性。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出Many-Shot In-Context Fine-tuning方法，扩展上下文学习到many-shot设置。核心创新在于新的训练目标：将上下文中的每个答案作为监督训练目标，而非仅预测最终答案。这使得many-shot例子从提示变为自回归学习的目标，解决了处理大量例子时序列过长的效率问题。方法在多种下游任务（如分类、总结、问答）上进行训练，通过同时微调多任务来提升模型性能。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，ManyICL在多个下游任务（包括分类、总结、问答、自然语言推理和数学问题）上，性能显著优于零/少样本微调方法，并接近专用微调的性能水平。此外，该方法有效缓解了零/少样本微调中常见的灾难性遗忘问题，提高了模型的稳定性和泛化能力。摘要未明确说明具体性能指标数值，但通过对比突出了其效果改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究贡献在于提出Many-Shot In-Context Fine-tuning方法，通过将上下文答案作为监督目标，提升了大型语言模型的微调效能和效率。学术上，扩展了上下文学习框架，为多任务处理提供新途径；实践上，减少了模型维护成本，促进LLMs在复杂应用中的部署。未来工作可优化训练技术，探索更多任务类型，并公开代码以推动社区研究。

title: CyclicReflex: Improving Reasoning Models via Cyclical Reflection Token Scheduling
abstract: Large reasoning models (LRMs), such as OpenAI's o1 and DeepSeek-R1, harness test-time scaling to perform multi-step reasoning for complex problem-solving. This reasoning process, executed before producing final answers, is often guided by special juncture tokens that prompt self-evaluative reflection. These transition markers and reflective cues are referred to as "reflection tokens" (e.g., "wait", "but", "alternatively"). In this work, we treat reflection tokens as a "resource" and introduce the problem of resource allocation, aimed at improving the test-time compute performance of LRMs by adaptively regulating the frequency and placement of reflection tokens. Through empirical analysis, we show that both excessive and insufficient use of reflection tokens, referred to as over-reflection and under-reflection, can degrade model performance. To better understand this trade-off, we draw an analogy between reflection token usage and learning rate scheduling in optimization. Building on this insight, We propose cyclical reflection token scheduling (termed CyclicReflex), a training-free decoding strategy that dynamically modulates reflection token logits with a bidirectional, position-dependent triangular waveform, incurring no additional computation cost. Experiments on MATH500, AIME2024/2025, AMC2023, GPQA Diamond and LiveCodeBench demonstrate that CyclicReflex consistently improves performance across model sizes (1.5B-14B), outperforming standard decoding and recent approaches such as TIP (thought switching penalty) and S1. Codes are available at https://github.com/OPTML-Group/CyclicReflex.

light_analysis.overview: 提出循环反射令牌调度策略CyclicReflex，通过动态调节反射令牌频率和位置，无需训练即可提升大型推理模型的测试时性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型推理模型（LRMs）如OpenAI的o1和DeepSeek-R1利用反射令牌进行多步推理，但现有方法缺乏对反射令牌使用的优化，导致过度或不足反射都会降低模型性能。这引发资源分配问题，即如何自适应调节反射令牌的频率和位置以提高推理效率和准确性。该问题的重要性在于它直接影响复杂问题求解的质量，而当前方法未系统化处理反射令牌调度，限制了模型潜力的发挥。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出CyclicReflex方法，一种无需训练的推理策略。该方法将反射令牌视为资源，通过双向、位置依赖的三角波形动态调制反射令牌对数概率，实现循环调度。关键创新在于借鉴学习率调度思想，引入周期性变化来平衡反射令牌使用，避免性能下降。该方法不增加额外计算成本，适用于不同规模模型（1.5B-14B），并作为解码策略集成到现有LRMs中。
light_analysis.result: 在MATH500、AIME2024/2025、AMC2023、GPQA Diamond和LiveCodeBench等多个数据集上的实验表明，CyclicReflex在模型大小（1.5B-14B）上一致提升性能，优于标准解码和近期方法如TIP和S1。摘要未明确说明具体准确率数据，但强调了性能的稳定改进，显示该策略在推理任务中的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: CyclicReflex的主要贡献是提出循环反射令牌调度策略，通过动态资源分配提高大型推理模型的测试时性能。该研究具有学术价值，为反射令牌优化提供新思路，并具实际应用价值，可无缝集成现有模型无需额外训练。潜在局限性或未来方向包括扩展到更多模型类型、探索调度参数影响，以及验证在更广泛任务中的应用。

title: Interaction Field Matching: Overcoming Limitations of Electrostatic Models
abstract: Electrostatic field matching (EFM) has recently appeared as a novel physics-inspired paradigm for data generation and transfer using the idea of an electric capacitor. However, it requires modeling electrostatic fields using neural networks, which is non-trivial because of the necessity to take into account the complex field outside the capacitor plates. In this paper, we propose Interaction Field Matching (IFM), a generalization of EFM which allows using general interaction fields beyond the electrostatic one. Furthermore, inspired by strong interactions between quarks and antiquarks in physics, we design a particular interaction field realization which solves the problems which arise when modeling electrostatic fields in EFM. We show the performance on a series of toy and image data transfer problems. Our code is available at https://github.com/justkolesov/InteractionFieldMatching

light_analysis.overview: 提出Interaction Field Matching (IFM)，推广静电模型，通过更广泛的交互场解决数据生成和传输中的局限性。
light_analysis.motivation: EFM作为一种物理启发的数据生成和传输方法，存在建模静电场的非平凡复杂性，因为需考虑电容器板外的复杂场，这限制了其效率和适用性。为克服这些不足，本研究旨在开发更通用的交互场匹配方法，以提升物理启发技术在AI任务中的实用价值。摘要未明确说明其他具体应用场景，但强调了解决现有方法局限性的重要性。
light_analysis.method: 本研究提出Interaction Field Matching (IFM)，作为EFM的推广，允许使用一般交互场替代静电模型。关键创新包括受夸克与反夸克强相互作用启发，设计特定交互场实现，简化建模复杂性。方法涉及神经网络建模交互场，应用于玩具和图像数据传输问题，但摘要未详细说明模型架构或数据集的具体细节。
light_analysis.result: 论文展示了IFM在一系列玩具数据和图像数据传输问题上的性能表现，但摘要未明确说明具体的性能指标如准确率或效率改进数据。结果暗示方法有效解决了EFM的局限性，并在不同类型数据上进行了验证，与EFM等基线方法相比具有优势，不过缺乏量化对比细节。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提出IFM方法，克服了EFM的局限性，扩展了交互场在数据生成和传输中的应用，具有学术价值，为物理启发AI提供了新思路。实际应用中，可能在图像处理等领域有潜力，但摘要未提及具体局限性；未来工作可探索更多交互场类型或应用场景以进一步验证方法。

title: Dynamic Manifold Hopfield Networks for Context-Dependent Associative Memory
abstract: Neural population activity in cortical and hippocampal circuits can be flexibly reorganized by context, suggesting that cognition relies on dynamic manifolds rather than static representations. However, how such dynamic organization can be realized mechanistically within a unified dynamical system remains unclear. Continuous Hopfield networks provide a classical attractor framework in which neural dynamics follow gradient descent on a fixed energy landscape, constraining retrieval within a static attractor manifold geometry. Extending this approach, we introduce Dynamic Manifold Hopfield Networks (DMHN), continuous dynamical models in which contextual modulation dynamically reshapes attractor geometry, transforming a static attractor manifold into a context-dependent family of neural manifolds. In DMHN, network interactions are learned in a data-driven manner, to intrinsically deform the geometry of its attractor manifold across cues without explicit context-specific parameterization. As a result, in associative retrieval, DMHN achieve substantially higher capacity and robustness than classical and modern Hopfield networks: when storing $2N$ patterns in a network of $N$ neurons, DMHN attain reliable retrieval with an average accuracy of 64%, compared with 1% and 13% for classical and modern variants, respectively. Together, these results establish dynamic reorganization of attractor manifold geometry as a principled mechanism for context-dependent remapping in neural associative memory.

light_analysis.overview: DMHN通过动态重塑吸引子流形几何，显著提升了上下文依赖关联记忆的容量和鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 本研究的动机源于认知系统依赖动态流形而非静态表示，但现有连续Hopfield网络只能提供静态吸引子几何，限制了上下文依赖的重组能力。经典和现代Hopfield网络采用固定能量景观，无法灵活适应不同上下文，导致在关联记忆中性能不足。因此，需要一种机制在统一动力系统中实现动态组织，以更好地模拟神经活动。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出了动态流形Hopfield网络（DMHN），扩展连续Hopfield网络的框架，使其成为连续动力模型。关键创新在于引入上下文调制动态重塑吸引子几何，将静态吸引子流形转换为依赖于上下文的神经流形家族。网络交互以数据驱动方式学习，内在变形吸引子几何，无需显式上下文特定参数化，保留了经典模型结构但增强了动态适应性。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，DMHN在关联检索中表现出显著优势：当在N个神经元的网络中存储2N个模式时，DMHN达到64%的平均准确率，而经典Hopfield网络和现代变体分别为1%和13%。这表明DMHN在容量和鲁棒性方面大幅提升，具体数据支持了动态重塑吸引子几何的有效性，优于现有基线方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 结论是DMHN确立了吸引子流形几何的动态重组作为上下文依赖重映射的原则机制。主要贡献在于提出了一种新的连续动力模型，解决了静态吸引子几何的局限性，为神经科学中的关联记忆理论和机器学习中的动态系统建模提供了重要见解。未来工作可能包括模型优化和扩展应用领域。

title: SABER: Spatially Consistent 3D Universal Adversarial Objects for BEV Detectors
abstract: Adversarial robustness of BEV 3D object detectors is critical for autonomous driving (AD). Existing invasive attacks require altering the target vehicle itself (e.g. attaching patches), making them unrealistic and impractical for real-world evaluation. While non-invasive attacks that place adversarial objects in the environment are more practical, current methods still lack the multi-view and temporal consistency needed for physically plausible threats. In this paper, we present the first framework for generating universal, non-invasive, and 3D-consistent adversarial objects that expose fundamental vulnerabilities for BEV 3D object detectors. Instead of modifying target vehicles, our method inserts rendered objects into scenes with an occlusion-aware module that enforces physical plausibility across views and time. To maintain attack effectiveness across views and frames, we optimize adversarial object appearance using a BEV spatial feature-guided optimization strategy that attacks the detector's internal representations. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our learned universal adversarial objects can consistently degrade multiple BEV detectors from various viewpoints and distances. More importantly, the new environment-manipulation attack paradigm exposes models' over-reliance on contextual cues and provides a practical pipeline for robustness evaluation in AD systems.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出首个生成空间一致的3D通用对抗对象的框架，用于非入侵攻击BEV物体检测器，暴露其对抗性漏洞。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机是提升自动驾驶系统中BEV 3D物体检测器的对抗性鲁棒性评估。现有入侵攻击需要修改目标车辆（如贴补丁），这在实际应用中不切实际；而非入侵攻击虽更实用，但缺乏多视角和时间一致性，难以形成物理可信的威胁。因此，急需一种能够在不同视角和时间上保持一致的通用对抗对象生成方法，以更真实地评估检测器的弱点，推动自动驾驶系统的安全性改进。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出的SABER框架通过插入渲染对象到场景中，结合遮挡感知模块确保对象在不同视图和时间上的物理合理性。采用BEV空间特征引导的优化策略，优化对抗对象的外观，直接攻击检测器的内部表示。关键创新在于实现首个非入侵、多视角和时间一致的3D对抗对象生成，并使用BEV检测器的特征作为指导，增强了攻击的一致性和有效性，摘要未明确说明具体数据集或模型架构。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，学习到的通用对抗对象能一致地降低多个BEV检测器的性能，从不同视角和距离进行攻击，暴露了检测器的基本漏洞。与现有方法相比，该攻击更有效和一致，特别揭示了模型对上下文线索的过度依赖，为自动驾驶系统提供了更实用的鲁棒性评估管道，但摘要未提供具体的性能指标如准确率数据。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文的主要贡献是提出了首个生成空间一致的3D通用对抗对象的框架，为非入侵攻击BEV检测器提供了新方法。学术上，它揭示了BEV检测器在对抗性攻击中的脆弱性，并强调了多视角和时间一致性的重要性；实际应用上，该框架为自动驾驶系统的鲁棒性评估提供了更现实的工具，有助于提升系统安全性，未来工作可进一步探索其他检测器的适用性或改进优化策略。

title: Optimizing Data Augmentation through Bayesian Model Selection
abstract: Data Augmentation (DA) has become an essential tool to improve robustness and generalization of modern machine learning. However, when deciding on DA strategies it is critical to choose parameters carefully, and this can be a daunting task which is traditionally left to trial-and-error or expensive optimization based on validation performance. In this paper, we counter these limitations by proposing a novel framework for optimizing DA. In particular, we take a probabilistic view of DA, which leads to the interpretation of augmentation parameters as model (hyper)-parameters, and the optimization of the marginal likelihood with respect to these parameters as a Bayesian model selection problem. Due to its intractability, we derive a tractable ELBO, which allows us to optimize augmentation parameters jointly with model parameters. We provide extensive theoretical results on variational approximation quality, generalization guarantees, invariance properties, and connections to empirical Bayes. Through experiments on computer vision and NLP tasks, we show that our approach improves calibration and yields robust performance over fixed or no augmentation. Our work provides a rigorous foundation for optimizing DA through Bayesian principles with significant potential for robust machine learning.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一个通过贝叶斯模型选择优化数据增强参数的新框架，以提高机器学习模型的鲁棒性和泛化能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 数据增强已成为提升机器学习模型鲁棒性和泛化性的关键工具，但参数选择通常依赖试错法或基于验证性能的昂贵优化，这些方法效率低且缺乏理论基础。本研究旨在解决这一问题，为数据增强参数优化提供严谨的理论框架，以克服现有方法的不足，推动机器学习在复杂任务中的实际应用。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出了一种新颖框架，将数据增强参数概率化地视为模型超参数，通过最大化边际似然将其转化为贝叶斯模型选择问题。为解决难以直接优化的问题，作者推导了一个可处理的证据下界（ELBO），使得能够联合优化增强参数和模型参数，并提供了变分近似质量、泛化保证和不变性性质的理论分析，建立与经验贝叶斯的连接。
light_analysis.result: 在计算机视觉和自然语言处理任务上的实验表明，该方法在模型校准方面有所改善，并在固定或无数据增强策略下展现出更鲁棒的性能。与基线方法相比，论文强调了其在多种任务中的有效性，但没有提供具体数值，凸显了通过贝叶斯优化增强参数能提升机器学习模型的泛化能力和稳定性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是为通过贝叶斯原理优化数据增强参数建立了严谨的理论基础，具有重要的学术价值，促进了机器学习中鲁棒性研究的发展。它拓宽了贝叶斯方法的应用，并为自动化增强策略设计提供了新思路，未来可扩展至更复杂的增强类型或任务，以进一步提升模型的实用性。

title: NatADiff: Adversarial Boundary Guidance for Natural Adversarial Diffusion
abstract: Adversarial samples exploit irregularities in the manifold `learned' by deep learning models to cause misclassifications. The study of these adversarial samples provides insight into the features a model uses to classify inputs, which can be leveraged to improve robustness against future attacks. However, much of the existing literature focuses on constrained adversarial samples, which do not accurately reflect test-time errors encountered in real-world settings. To address this, we propose `NatADiff', an adversarial sampling scheme that leverages denoising diffusion to generate natural adversarial samples. Our approach is based on the observation that natural adversarial samples frequently contain structural elements from the adversarial class. Deep learning models can exploit these structural elements to shortcut the classification process, rather than learning to genuinely distinguish between classes. To leverage this behavior, we guide the diffusion trajectory towards the intersection of the true and adversarial classes, combining time-travel sampling with augmented classifier guidance to enhance attack transferability while preserving image fidelity. Our method achieves comparable attack success rates to current state-of-the-art techniques, while exhibiting significantly higher transferability across model architectures and better alignment with natural test-time errors as measured by FID. These results demonstrate that NatADiff produces adversarial samples that not only transfer more effectively across models, but more faithfully resemble naturally occurring test-time errors.

light_analysis.overview: NatADiff提出了一种基于去噪扩散的对抗性样本生成方法，通过引导扩散轨迹到类别边界，生成更自然且迁移性强的对抗性样本。
light_analysis.motivation: 深度学习模型易受对抗性样本攻击，这些样本利用模型学习的流形不规则性导致误分类，研究对抗性样本能提高模型鲁棒性。然而，现有文献多关注受限对抗性样本，不能准确模拟现实世界中的测试时错误，导致对抗性防御策略不够实用。因此，需要开发能生成更自然对抗性样本的方法，以更真实地反映实际攻击场景和提升模型安全性。
light_analysis.method: NatADiff方法基于去噪扩散模型生成自然对抗性样本。核心创新在于观察到自然对抗性样本常包含对抗类的结构元素，模型可能利用这些元素走捷径分类。通过结合时间旅行采样和增强分类器引导，将扩散轨迹导向真实类与对抗类的交集，从而在保持图像保真度的同时提高攻击的迁移性。具体技术包括使用扩散模型优化样本生成路径。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，NatADiff生成的对抗性样本在攻击成功率上与当前最先进技术相当，但在迁移性方面显著更优，能跨不同模型架构有效转移。通过FID指标评估，生成的样本与自然测试时错误更对齐，表明其更接近现实世界攻击场景，具体数据如FID改善证实了更好的保真度和实用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究成功开发了NatADiff方法，能够生成更自然且迁移性强的对抗性样本，增强了对抗性样本研究的实用性和真实性。这不仅有助于模型鲁棒性评估和防御策略开发，还为未来对抗性攻击分析提供了新工具。潜在局限性包括方法在更复杂任务中的泛化能力，未来可探索优化生成效率或扩展到其他机器学习领域。

title: OptMerge: Unifying Multimodal LLM Capabilities and Modalities via Model Merging
abstract: Foundation models update slowly due to resource-intensive training, whereas domain-specific models evolve rapidly between releases. Model merging seeks to combine multiple expert models into a single, more capable model, reducing storage and serving costs while supporting decentralized development. Despite its potential, previous studies have primarily focused on merging visual classification models or Large Language Models (LLMs) for code and math tasks. Recently, Multimodal LLMs (MLLMs) that extend LLMs through large-scale multimodal training have gained traction. However, there lacks a benchmark for model merging research that clearly divides the tasks for MLLM training and evaluation. In this paper, $\textbf{(i)}$ we introduce a model merging benchmark for MLLMs, which includes multiple tasks such as VQA, Geometry, Chart, OCR, and Grounding, studying both LoRA and full fine-tuning models. Moreover, we explore how model merging can combine different modalities (e.g., vision-language, audio-language, and video-language models), moving toward the Omni-language model. $\textbf{(ii)}$ We implement 10 model merging algorithms on the benchmark. Furthermore, we propose a novel method that removes noise from task vectors and robustly optimizes the merged vector based on a loss defined over task vector interactions, achieving an average performance gain of 2.48%. $\textbf{(iii)}$ We find that model merging offers a promising way for building improved MLLMs without requiring training data. Our results also demonstrate that the complementarity among multiple modalities outperforms individual modalities.

light_analysis.overview: 本研究引入多模态LLM的模型合并基准，并提出一种去噪任务向量和优化合并向量的新方法，实现平均2.48%的性能提升。
light_analysis.motivation: 基础模型因训练资源密集而更新缓慢，而领域特定模型演进迅速，模型合并技术旨在结合多个专家模型以减少存储和服务成本，并支持去中心化开发。然而，现有研究主要关注视觉分类模型或代码、数学任务的LLMs，缺乏多模态LLMs的明确合并基准，导致任务划分不清。这限制了MLLM模型合并的标准化评估，本研究旨在填补这一空白，推动更高效的多模态模型开发。
light_analysis.method: 本研究首先建立了一个MLLM模型合并基准，涵盖视觉问答、几何、图表、OCR和定位等多个任务，并研究LoRA和全微调模型。其次，实现了10种模型合并算法，并创新性地提出一种方法，通过去除任务向量中的噪声，基于任务向量交互定义的损失稳健优化合并向量。关键技术包括任务向量去噪和损失函数设计，使用基准数据集进行系统评估，探索结合不同模态的模型合并。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，提出的新方法在基准上实现了平均2.48%的性能提升，优于其他10种合并算法。模型合并能够有效构建性能更优的MLLMs，且无需额外训练数据。特别地，结合多个模态的模型展现出比单一模态更好的互补性，验证了多模态合并的优势和潜力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提出了MLLM模型合并基准和一种去噪优化任务向量的新方法，显著提升合并性能。研究结论表明模型合并为构建改进的多模态LLMs提供了高效途径，无需训练数据，且多模态结合优于单一模态。这具有重要学术价值，推动了模型合并技术的发展，并具有实际应用潜力，如降低部署成本和促进分散式开发。未来工作可扩展到更多模态的合并和算法优化。

title: Automatic and Structure-Aware Sparsification of Hybrid Neural ODEs
abstract: Hybrid neural ordinary differential equations (neural ODEs) integrate mechanistic models with neural ODEs, offering strong inductive bias and flexibility, and are particularly advantageous in data-scarce healthcare settings. However, excessive latent states and interactions from mechanistic models can lead to training inefficiency and over-fitting, limiting practical effectiveness of hybrid neural ODEs. In response, we propose a new hybrid pipeline for automatic state selection and structure optimization in mechanistic neural ODEs, combining domain-informed graph modifications with data-driven regularization to sparsify the model for improving predictive performance and stability while retaining mechanistic plausibility. Experiments on synthetic and real-world data show improved predictive performance and robustness with desired sparsity, establishing an effective solution for hybrid model reduction in healthcare applications.
comment: Accepted at The 14th International Conference on Learning Representations (ICLR) 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种自动且结构感知的稀疏化方法，优化混合神经ODE以提高预测性能和稳定性。
light_analysis.motivation: 混合神经常微分方程（神经ODE）整合了机理模型和神经网络，提供强归纳偏置和灵活性，尤其适用于数据稀缺的医疗领域。然而，机理模型可能引入过多的潜在状态和交互，导致训练效率低下和过拟合，限制了模型的实际应用效果。因此，需要一种自动化的方法来减少模型复杂度，在保持机理合理性的同时提升性能，以解决医疗应用中资源有限的问题。
light_analysis.method: 该方法提出一个混合管道，用于机理神经ODE的自动状态选择和结构优化。通过结合领域知识驱动的图修改和数据驱动的正则化，实现模型的稀疏化。核心创新在于自动化和结构感知的稀疏化过程，确保在减少参数和交互的同时保留模型的结构完整性。实验中使用了合成数据和真实世界数据，但摘要未明确说明具体模型架构细节。
light_analysis.result: 实验在合成和真实世界数据上进行，结果显示该方法在所需稀疏度下改进了预测性能和鲁棒性。这表示模型在保持机理合理性的基础上减少了复杂性，从而提升了训练效率和泛化能力。摘要未提供具体的性能指标数据（如准确率），但指出效果优于未优化前的模型。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究的主要贡献是提出了一种有效的稀疏化方法，为混合神经ODE在医疗等数据稀缺场景中的过拟合问题提供了解决方案。通过结合领域知识和数据驱动技术，提高了模型的预测性能和稳定性，具有重要的学术和实际应用价值。未来工作可探索算法在其他领域的适用性和进一步优化。

title: Model Already Knows the Best Noise: Bayesian Active Noise Selection via Attention in Video Diffusion Model
abstract: The choice of initial noise strongly affects quality and prompt alignment in video diffusion; different seeds for the same prompt can yield drastically different results. While recent methods use externally designed priors (e.g., frequency filtering or inter-frame smoothing), they often overlook internal model signals that indicate inherently preferable seeds. To address this, we propose ANSE (Active Noise Selection for Generation), a model-aware framework that selects high-quality seeds by quantifying attention-based uncertainty.
